Todas as nossas Clínicas são arborizadas com muito espaço, em meio à natureza em ambiente saudável, confortável e familiar, para que os pacientes se recuperem mais rapidamente e que assim voltem saudáveis e recuperados para suas famílias.

Name: Association of Registered Graphic Designers (RGD)
Description:
The Association of Registered Graphic Designers (RGD) is Canada's largest professional association for graphic designers. The RGD represents over 4,000 design practitioners, including firm owners, freelancers, managers, educators and students. 

The RGD was created by an Act of the Ontario Legislature (Bill Pr 56) to grant designers with the designation "Registered Graphic Designer" or "RGD," and is the only graphic design association in North America to have this type of legislation. The RGD designation is a signal of quality and competence. Successful candidates have met a rigorous set of standards and completed a test and portfolio interview, administered by an examination board.

The RGD runs numerous industry events and initiatives, including DesignThinkers, Canada’s largest annual conference for graphic designers; Creative Earners, Canada’s comprehensive salary report for creatives; awards programs for branding, in-house design, social good design and students; advocacy against spec work and more.

Through the RGD, Canadian designers exchange ideas, educate and inspire, set professional standards and build a strong, supportive community dedicated to advocating for the value of design.

Name: Design Professionals of Canada (DesCan)
Description:
The Design Professionals of Canada (formerly the Society of Graphic Designers of Canada / GDC) is Canadaʼs national certification body for graphic and communication design and, since 1956, has established standards for design professionals, educators, and leaders. Through our certification program, DesCan licenses the unique CDP certification mark to members whose services meet rigorous, standardized criteria. The CDP certification mark is recognized across Canada as the mark of professional services and ethical business conduct.

The CDP certification mark is Canada’s only certification mark for graphic and communication design. CDP certification requires that an individual’s services meet or exceed the national standard and that the individual adheres to a formalized code of ethics and principles for sustainable design thinking and practice.

AGDA is the peak national organisation representing the Australian communication design industry. We were founded in 1988 when designers from across Australia marched into history, joining together to declare their solidarity and commitment.

Whilst we continue to expand and evolve, that solidarity and commitment remains at our core. We are a community organisation, and we exist to support our members and champion the value and impact of the industry.

We’re not-for profit, we’re here for individual challenges, and always there for common goals – ultimately, we’re here to make a difference. Our purpose is to value, unite and support Australian design, and the design community.

We acknowledge and respect Aboriginal people as the traditional owners and occupants of the land and waters in Australia. We acknowledge that the spiritual, social, cultural and economic practices of Aboriginal people come from their traditional lands and waters and that they maintain their cultural and heritage beliefs, languages and laws, which are of ongoing importance, and that they have made and continue to make a unique and irreplaceable contribution to the country.

Name: Linearity
Description: Linearity, is designed to help you bring your ideas to life. Whether you're a marketing pro or a design enthusiast, you can now create sleek marketing assets with Linearity Curve and then transform them into professional marketing motion graphics with Linearity Move. It all started in 2017 when we introduced Linearity Curve (formally Vectornator) to the world with the goal of making professional digital design accessible to everyone. Over the years our features expanded and our functionalities multiplied, transforming what started as a simple solution into a versatile software that now caters to design teams of all levels. Today, with a focus on offering AI-powered and collaborative tools for creating marketing visual assets and the imminent launch of Linearity Move, a groundbreaking motion graphics software that allows anyone to create animated content quickly and easily, Linearity aims to empower marketing professionals, graphic designers, illustrators, and animators to unlock their creative potential. Recognizing the lack of modern collaboration features in traditional marketing design tools, Linearity Curve's platform empowers marketing teams to work seamlessly together. Real-time collaboration, commenting, proprietary cloud storage and advanced design features will be coming soon and enable marketers to breathe life into their creative ideas, fostering efficient workflows and unleashing their storytelling potential. The company has also just launched its game-changing motion graphics software, Linearity Move, in a completely new take on the way motion marketing assets are created. With its user-friendly interface, Linearity Move enables marketing teams to effortlessly transform their designs into animations within seconds.

Nuestra verdadera satisfacción es el éxito de nuestros clientes, aportándoles un asesoramiento integral de valor añadido a su marca, a través de la creatividad e innovación, una comunicación integral y efectiva que junto a la generación de soluciones creativas de packaging mejoran la visibilidad de marca y envase, y su expectativa de éxito. 
Realizamos proyectos a medida tanto para el mercado nacional como internacional, nuestros diseños se encuentran en los 5 continentes, con proyectos específicos de brand y packaging para EEUU, Méjico, Panamá, Brasil, Reino Unido, Francia, Italia, Portugal, Países Bajos, Suiza, Alemania, Noruega, Rusia, Países del Este, Japón, China, India, Sudáfrica, Países Árabes, etc.



Ser reconocido es un camino de experiencia, búsqueda de la calidad y creatividad de una forma continua.

En Al Margen Branding & Packaging hemos sido galardonados con más de 29 premios de diseño gráfico de packaging tanto nacionales como internacionales. 
Entre ellos podemos destacar el premio nacional de diseño de packaging Lider Pack 2016 -22 y el premio mundial WordStar 2017. Nuestro diseño de envases ha sido reconocido en diferentes concursos de distintos países como Estados Unidos, Argentina, Japón, Israel o Italia.

Si os interesa el mundo del diseño gráfico, branding, packaging y todo lo relacionado con la publicidad, os invitamos a seguirnos en nuestro blog y redes sociales.

Name: Spec's Liquor
Description:
Owned and operated by the same Houston family since 1962, Spec's is a true destination shopping experience. Over 50 stores located all over Houston, the surrounding areas, Beaumont and Austin offer the best selections of wines, spirits, beers, liqueurs, cigars and, in our larger stores, fine gourmet foods.

The Warehouse Store is the crown jewel of our operation. With over 40,000 labels of wines, spirits, liqueurs, beers, and finer foods, Spec's indeed fills all 80,000 square feet of selling space. Our walk-in cigar humidor offers over 900 cigars - more than many tobacconist stores. Our deli offers the finest in deli meats, pates, domestic and imported cheeses, fresh caviar, and a complete assortment of domestic and imported smoked fish and salmon. Our full line of jams and jellies, pastas and sauces, oils and vinegars, crackers and cookies make our selection limited only by your imagination.

We roast our own coffee beans and offer over 100 different coffees. We have teas from around the world, and we even have Godiva Chocolates.

We also offer a huge selection of Riedel glassware and decanters.
We can also offer you:

* Wine consultants to answer any questions you may have or to help you find a particular wine.
* Party Planning services.
* Custom Gift Baskets or Catalog Gifts available for delivery or pick-up.
* Gift Registry.
* WIne Cellar Assessment - If you have a wine cellar, you know it's important to keep it insured at current market value. Provide us with a list and we would be happy to help you with current valuation.

Name: visualquimia
Description:
Matías Corado is a Designer in Visual Communication and an illustrator.

Matías Corado was born in 1981 in Mercedes/Argentina. Since he was a child he began to draw in an autodidactic way. He studied at the Bachelor of Fine Arts at the La Plata National University, where he received his first formal contact with art and design. He graduated in 2000 as a Special Bachelor in Visual Languages and as a Special Teacher in Arts, with four years specializing in engraving.

Later, he studied Design in Visual Communication at the Fine Arts Faculty at the La Plata National University, where he was engaged as a honorary teacher at the Course on Visual Communication Design 3 A (2006) and at Technology on Visual Communication Design cathedra (2006-2008).

Since 2003 he works as a designer and as an illustrator, having done work for Spain, USA, Germany and Latin America.

During his labor at Guerrini Design Island, he realized works for clients such as Organic World Foundation, Abbott Laboratories and Los Grobo Group. As a web project leader at F5design he did work for Sony and Dior, among others clients.

Name: Ekole
Description:
Ekole : L'agence de communication de l'éducation 

Les établissements, l’enseignement supérieur et les CFA font face à des défis croissants :

1 Se démarquer dans un environnement concurrentiel où l’offre est de plus en plus variée.
2 Valoriser leur identité pour attirer apprenants, parents et partenaires tout en restant fidèles à leurs valeurs.
3 Engager leurs publics (apprenants, parents, entreprises, politiques) sur des canaux numériques en constante évolution.
4 Manquer de temps, d’expertise ou de ressources pour mettre en place une stratégie de communication performante.

Chez Ekole, nous comprenons ces enjeux. Notre mission est de vous accompagner pour surmonter ces obstacles et construire une communication efficace, adaptée à vos besoins.

 Nos solutions "360°" pour répondre à vos défis :

     Stratégie digitale et web : booster votre visibilité et votre présence en ligne.
     Marketing & branding : mettre en avant votre unicité pour mieux vous différencier.
     Supports print & visuels : moderniser vos outils pour capter l’attention.
     Réseaux sociaux & influence : engager vos publics là où ils se trouvent.
     Création vidéo & storytelling : raconter votre histoire de manière impactante.
     Formation & accompagnement : renforcer les compétences de vos équipes.

Nous sommes une équipe d’experts passionnés et réactifs, dédiée à transformer vos défis en opportunités et vos idées en réussites.

Ekole : plus qu’une agence, un partenaire stratégique pour valoriser l’éducation.
Location: La Chapelle-sur-Erdre, Pays de la Loire

Name: Sam DeLoof LLC
Description:
My interest in web design began as a self-taught coder in the MySpace era. Growing up in Troy, I took a few high school courses on website development that led me to a newfound love for cascading style sheets. To pursue my passion for digital design, I acquired a Bachelor’s in Fine Arts with a major in Graphic Design from Western Michigan University’s comprehensive program in 2015 — where each graduating class consisted of 20 hand-selected students.

I began freelancing in 2014, focusing on logo design and visual brand identities. Later, I expanded my offering to include web design, digital marketing, and print design. In 2019, I founded Sam DeLoof LLC to specialize in providing custom website solutions for clients across the country.

In addition to freelancing, I have two years of experience working at Circa Creative Studios as a Studio Coordinator & Designer, helping establish their second location in Kalamazoo, MI.

In 2017, I founded the Kalamazoo chapter of the professional networking group Ladies, Wine & Design. I organized and hosted monthly events for two years to promote connections and facilitate conversation within the local creative community.

When I’m out of the office, you can find me keeping up with the drama on Bravo TV, cheering on the boys at a Griffin’s hockey game, or staying active with my terrier mix, Cami. Combining my love for dogs and fashion, I’m also working on launching an online store of small-batch goods for the whole pack.

Name: AIGA Philadelphia
Description:
AIGA brings design to the world, and the world to designers.
As the profession’s oldest and largest professional membership organization for design—with 70 chapters and more than 25,000 members—we advance design as a professional craft, strategic advantage, and vital cultural force. From content that defines the global practice to events that connect and catalyze, we work to enhance the value and deepen the impact of design across all disciplines on business, society, and our collective future.

You belong at AIGA.
From design fans to the profession’s leading practitioners, AIGA members come from all backgrounds, all fields, and all levels of experience—from all around the world. Whether you’re a design enthusiast, student, freelance designer, in-house designer, design educator, design thinker, or a business owner, AIGA is here to welcome you into the wider world of design

We were the first local chapter.
We are the local all-volunteer chapter of AIGA. In 1981, a group of Philadelphia designers formed AIGA Philadelphia, the first local chapter of the American Institute of Graphic Arts. Presently the chapter is comprised of over 600 members. AIGA Philadelphia’s purpose is both integral and complementary to the national organization: to provide the highest standards within the profession and the business community and to stimulate interest and understanding of graphic design and visual communication through lectures, exhibitions, periodicals and other activities.

Description:
Hello, I'm Professional Canva Designer. I Do Design Logo Design, Cover Photo Design, Book Cover Design, Social Media Post Template Design, T-Shirt Design, Social Media Ads Video Create, Animation Video Create, etc

                               ****What is Canva?
Canva is an Australian graphic design platform that is used to create social media graphics, presentations, posters, documents, and other visual content. It’s a design tool that is ideal for use in education, business, organization, non-profits, and individuals to create beautiful designs, and projects.

It’s a free graphic design platform that allows you to easily create invitations, logos, business cards, flyers, docs, lesson plans, videos, Zoom backgrounds, websites, and more using professionally designed templates. You can even upload your own photos and add them to Canva’s templates using a drag-and-drop interface. It’s like having a basic version of Photoshop that’s free and doesn’t require extensive photo editing knowledge to use. You can create designs from blank also and you can choose from a variety of sizes for different platforms and even you can enter a custom design size.

Name: Grilli Type
Description:
Grilli Type is a Swiss type foundry and graphic design studio, offering retail typefaces and commissioned projects. Noël Leu and Thierry Blancpain founded Grilli Type in Switzerland in late 2009 as a collaborative avenue for working with other designers. Although the foundry is based in Lucerne, we’re active on a global scale. Thierry now lives in New York City, and Noël travels extensively, ricocheting between East Asia, North America, and Europe. There are eight people on team Grilli, with colleagues dispersed across the globe.

Just because we’re Swiss doesn’t mean we’re neutral—we make type with a point of view, type that conveys meaning beyond the words it spells out. What matters to us is this: What story does a typeface tell? What kind of personality does it have?

We’re graphic designers by training and temperament who happen to run a type foundry. The relationships we’ve forged with other designers are collaborations in the truest sense of the word. They’re essential to our mission and inform our desire to produce useful type. That’s why we make minisites for our typefaces. We want to show them in action, in context—to give them a voice and let them tell a compelling story in their own words.

 choisi le bon format, le bon dispositif : web app, IA, motion design, réalité augmentée, photo, Gif, print… Tout est possible
 accepter d’être challengé : chercher un partenaire, pas un exécutant
 ouvrir ses données ou ses sujets à notre équipe de journalistes, datascientists, designers et développeurs

Why Cheese Monster? Well that’s easy. Everyone loves cheese and so many of us can relate to the Cheese Monster within us. Here at Cheese Monster Studio we always say: “Why not slap some cheese on it?” Just like cheese makes most food dishes amazing, so too we can make your brand, advertising, marketing and visual communication so much better through effective creative graphic design. Yes we love adding the cheese to your marketing & advertising and when it comes to communicating your product and services to potential clients we tackle it like a real monster. 

Completely steeped in modern creative graphic design we embrace both the old and new to deliver a professional graphic design service to our clients using some old school values and principles that keep us disciplined, focused and deadline driven. We practice these old school values to reach heightened levels of performance and self-discipline in the most creative way while having fun every step of the way.

We are focused on ensuring that we have the creative insight to think laterally, and not pursue what others think we should peruse. We believe that each client is different and has different needs which we pay special attention to and always try to facilitate and serve. We see ourselves as flexible, quirky, easy going, professional and reliable. 

We don’t think we are better than others, simply unique, creative & quirky in our own right. We respect and pay tribute to all industries, specialists and professionals and always try and educate ourselves in our clients products, services and endeavors. 

We respect the background, culture, beliefs and ethics of all which enables us to work with a diverse variety of clients from many different industries in the knowledge that the world’s a far more colorful place because of all of us and not just a few.

Description:
Cacao Design è uno studio creativo che si occupa di naming, logo, visual identity, cataloghi, monografie, packaging, allestimenti, eventi e materiali BtL così come di video, web design e digital, coprendo tutte le esigenze di immagine e comunicazione di un brand. Nata nel 2004 a Milano, è da allora guidata da un “unico” Direttore Creativo composto dai tre fondatori: Alessandro Floridia, Masa Magnoni e Mauro Pastore, amici colleghi e soci da ormai oltre 30 anni.
Cacao Design è in grado di rivolgersi ad aziende di qualsiasi dimensione e operanti nei settori più disparati, con l’eccellenza e l’attenzione al dettaglio come unici comuni denominatori. I progetti di Cacao Design sono stati più volte premiati/pubblicati all’interno di annual e testate di design a livello internazionale. I soci sono anche stati più volte chiamati in qualità di giurati o di speaker in occasione di eventi internazionali legati al design (ReBrand a Rhode Island, Syzigy a Barcellona e Graphic Stories a Cipro).

Cacao Design is a creative studio with a strong expertise in naming, logos, visual identity, brochures, catalogues, packaging, booths, events and below the line materials, as well as videos, web design and digital assets, that cover all brand identity and brand communication needs. Born in 2004, it has been managed by a unique Creative Director, embodied by the three founders ever since, Alessandro Floridia, Masa Magnoni and Mauro Pastore: friends, colleagues and partners for almost 30 years now. Cacao Design relates to companies of all sizes, operating in any sector, the only common denominators being excellence and attention to detail. Cacao Design projects have won numerous awards and been published in annuals and publications of international renown. The three partners themselves have been jury members or speakers at several design events.

Name: Icons8
Description:
Icons8 is:
• A library of 165,000+ icons
• Free design resources: photos, vectors, tools
• Free graphic design software
• A community that generates the icon ideas

Icons8’ Impact

Thousands of great websites and applications use our icons - we see a lot of them in our digital life. More to say, we see our icons merely walking by the city: signs, ads, posters — our icons form a part of the urban landscape. 

City authorities use our icons too; for example, Malaga has used our icons for anti-domestic violence campaign. Think icons can’t beat violence?


Icons8 Story

We work with icons full time since 2001. Being 1 of 3 leading designers of the time, we had a choice to work for the clients like Oracle, Motorola, Europol, and thousands of other clients.

Many icons were the same as for different clients, and many were quite similar to the ones we’ve already done. I was sure they would be useful for others.

So, we've (We were an agency of 3 people at the time) compiled a collection of 200 icons and published it for free. The effect was overwhelming. We felt that we made something that people need. Over the period of a year, we've closed all other projects and concentrated on Icons8. 


Community

While working on Icons8, we've interviewed dozens of great designers in front-end development, then front-end.  In other words, we owe our community; we owe people that helped us during these years, those who helped us with support, endless hours of usability studies and interviews, with the credits for our work, and for the money that they paid for our licenses.

We're looking for an opportunity to pay back for all the support. We give the icons to the open source projects for free. We develop Open Source, and we help students with the free licenses - I know how it is, trying to design and code with a student's budget  (Photoshop cost $600 at the time, so let me admit it: I used a cracked version)

For over 40 years, Signbox has remained the first name in aspirational signage solutions that push the boundaries of innovation and challenge convention. We apply a conceptual, holistic approach to signage meticulously across market sectors, including high-end corporate and residential interiors, education, healthcare, retail, hotel and leisure environments, across the globe, inside and out.

It’s all thanks to a team of the industry’s finest signage specialists, our great British design and engineering brilliance and an intrinsic desire to look at signage differently. Our intelligent architectural signage solutions transform buildings from functional structures into unforgettable landmarks, turn settings into eye-catching scenic masterpieces – and bring spaces to life.

We know that great signage can build powerful brands too. From the sublime to the statement, Signbox’s ingenious signage solutions create an instant, impactful perception of the bigger picture and inspire brand loyalty. For those on the inside, we’re enhancing human behaviour and helping people to interact with their environment, to move effortlessly within it and to rely on signage structures and symbols that inform and guide.

Name: Ruth Rowland Lettering Artist & Illustrator
Description:
• Who: Hello! My name is Ruth Rowland, I work as a professional lettering artist, calligrapher, mapmaker and illustrator.

• Where: Based in London, I work globally for a wide range of clients from the music, advertising and publishing industries. 

• What: I create unique, handcrafted lettering, calligraphy, handwriting and illustration for books, magazines, albums and posters amongst many other projects.

• Who with: Over the years, I have built up a portfolio of high profile jobs but I am still very happy working on interesting smaller projects. You can read about some of these projects in more detail by clicking through the folders on my website via the link below.

Clients include: Coca Cola, BBC, Starbucks, Quercus Publishing, Virgin Records, Newsweek, Cosmopolitan, Harper Collins, Pilot Pens, Marks & Spencer, Heathrow, Penguin Random House, Southern Poverty Law Center, BAA and Neiman Marcus amongst many others.

• Why: My work is informed by a lifelong passion for my subject. With a Bachelor's Degree in illustration, an interest in letterforms led me to study a Master's Degree in hand drawn lettering, calligraphy and experimental typography at Central St Martins School of Art, London.

• What else: I am an experienced visiting lecturer at the University of the Arts London and have taught workshops at the British Library and Wallace Collection, London. I have an interest in the decorative process of gilding and enjoy designing creative workshops inspired by the collections of leading museums and galleries. I was honoured to be awarded the Peter Esslemont Prize for Calligraphy and Illumination 2024 based on this work. 

• What now: Head over to my website and choose the best way to get in touch with me, either via my agent for new hand lettering or illustration commissions or via the form on my About page, if you've commissioned me before or would like to discuss workshops, demonstrations or exhibitions.

Duas paixões pelo design. A marca Duas Designers foi desenhada pela Underware, conceituada type foundry de Amsterdan. Duas formas diferentes de pensar. A marca não vai ser paga com dinheiro ou trabalho. Vai ser paga com uma música. Duas formas de atuar. Só as duas ou buscando parceiros em diversas áreas para viabilizar o projeto completo. Name: Color Clipping Ltd.
Description:
Color Clipping is a dream project of some passionate photography wizards. It started with a vision of enhancing perfection in photographs back in 2010. The dream has turned into a verified company registered in Bangladesh and Canada with a liaison office in the UAE. The growth has been steady, and the number of clients is surging. 

For over a decade, Color Clipping has been working with clients from all different parts of the globe. The services include Jewelry Retouching, Photo Retouching, Image Editing, E-commerce Image Editing, Product Photo Editing, Headshot Retouching, Real Estate Image Editing, Mannequin, Clipping Path, and Background Removing.

The clients rely on us not only for the awe-striking photo post processing but also for the fantastic customer service policy.  We ensure your photo never looks unrealistic by balancing the light, shape, and color as the image requires. The perfect photography sense of our photographers, thus, makes your venture a success. The raw files of the experts go through proper examination through a color checker. The experts study the object thoroughly to produce the ultimate realistic result. There will be no single dot of spot or scratch in your macro photography in the hands of CC (Color Clipping) retouchers. Adding metallic luster, Color correction, fixing angles, adjusting white balance, and everything are done with care. The clients get Camera RAW Correction, Free Focus Stacking, Adjustable Layer File, and Image Format as per the client’s requirements with free revisions and quick delivery. 

Color Clipping believes in high-end performance and never compromises on quality. From the tools to the techniques used in photo retouching, it is always in tune with the latest tech and tricks. Clients need their photos to look perfect, not overly or poorly done, and we know the deal spot on.

We are here to remove distractions from your photo and let it stand out. It is worth each penny, and you can easily avail a free trial!

Name: Abhishek Graphics
Description:
22nd June, 1990 saw the inception of a dynamic enterprise in the name of Abhishek Graphics (A division of Abhishek Branding LLP). With a bare minimum of resources and infrastructure it managed to see work beyond its potential and saw consistent work premise for its identity. There has always been a concentrated effort on coming up with productive creative output leveled with an insightful overview on brand excellence.
We take pride in giving our clients the very best possible solution for their Designing needs and provide great service that fits any budget. We offer a wide range of solutions for nearly any type of business from full brand development to a monthly graphic design and big hoarding design contract.

We not only reached our aim of being the best the Vadodara but also achieved the target of being the best in Gujarat. On our journey we picked up the idea of MAKE IN INDIA and made it our motto. Today we are a part of Make In India campaign and most of our staff and product is produced in India by hardworking Indians. In the year of 2003 we thought to expand our business so we started to work as web developer and some of the supporting service. But our roots still remained in the Graphic Designing business. From 2003 to 2007 mainly we focused upon Indian market and worked with outer state.

Future is really unpredictable. With the constantly changing demands of the customers one thing is clear that Graphic Designing will play a key role in the coming years. We obviously wish to be the best in the world but still not forget our core roots and move forward with MAKE IN INDIA campaign and with products and services made in India serve the whole world. We invite you to be a part of our future.

EL MUNDO COMO INSPIRACIÓN
Con los ojos bien abiertos miramos a un mundo en constante cambio, alertas a lo que sucede. Hay que cuidar nuestra fuente conocimiento, las relaciones humanas y las relaciones con las marcas. Debemos tener una visión abierta a la experiencia de marcas en cualquier momento de nuestra vida.

EL MENSAJE ES IMPORTANTE
Hay que tener claro antes de cualquier actuación, como marca, cual es nuestro mensaje que queremos comunicar a las personas y como nos dirigimos a ellas. Siempre queremos, y cada vez más, estrechar la relación entre marcas y personas, siendo este el elemento clave del éxito.

LA EXPERIENCIA CUENTA
Más de 14 años haciendo lo que amamos: Diseño gráfico. Nuestra larga trayectoria no se ciñe solamente a un estudio, nos acompañan historias fantásticas y emocionantes, clientes variopintos, y un historial de proyectos imborrables que aún perduran entre nosotros.

 Un accompagnement sur-mesure en 5 points 

 Contenu : Une présentation efficace commence par un contenu clair. Comptez sur nous pour réorganiser, diviser ou alléger vos slides sans les dénaturer afin de vous proposer un résultat lisible et pertinent. En cas de besoin plus poussé, nos partenaires externes nous prêtent main forte pour améliorer le copywriting et le content strategy de votre présentation.
 Création : Nous créons pour vous un univers graphique adapté au contexte de votre évènement. Sur base de votre message, de votre audience ou même de votre baseline, un logo à la fois épuré et cohérent vous est proposé. Il est ensuite utilisé pour créer l’identité visuelle de votre PowerPoint : charte graphique, template, iconographie, ...
 Mise en page : Vous possédez déjà une charte graphique ? Aucun problème, nous veillons à la respecter dans le traitement de vos slides, tout en vous proposant les modifications pertinentes pour son adaptation dans PowerPoint. Typographie, couleurs, alignements, traitement des images, … l’ensemble de notre travail respecte votre univers visuel !
 Animation : Retenez toute l’attention de votre audience lors d’une réunion, une convention ou une conférence ! Une fois définis, vos contenus graphiques et écrits prennent vie : motion design, interactivité, traitement et intégration de vos vidéos ou musiques. 
 Présence sur site : Lors de votre événement, vous pouvez compter sur notre présence afin d’assurer le bon déroulement de votre présentation. Nous profitons des répétitions pour se coordonner avec les orateurs afin d’effectuer directement les modifications sur leur présentation PowerPoint.

We believe that visual language has the power to shape, reinforce, and change perceptions. Through initiatives like Iconathons, community design workshops, and the Redefining Women collection, we have been building the most extensive and diverse collection of icons ever created. Noun Project and Lingo are led by co-founders Sofya Polyakov and Edward Boatman. Based in Los Angeles, California, Noun Project has been recognized as one of the top 100 places to work in the city.

----- 
Our Journey

Founded in March 2020, NTMY embarked on a transformative journey with a bold vision. From day one, we've operated fully remotely, not just for operational efficiency but from a deep-seated belief in the power of remote work.

This approach has allowed us to tap into the vast pool of local talent spread across Indonesia, enabling these skilled individuals to work on multinational and even global brands while living in their local communities.

-----
Our Impact

Our model doesn't just change the way design is done; it changes lives. By embracing remote work, we're not only fostering a flexible and efficient work environment but also contributing to local economies and communities.

Our designers, no matter where they are, become part of a larger movement, creating impactful work that transcends geographical boundaries.

-----
The Future

Looking ahead, we see a world where NTMY's influence extends beyond design and into communities, nurturing local talent and supporting sustainable growth.

We're more than a design service; we're a catalyst for change, and we invite you to join us on this exciting journey towards a more connected, creative, and empowered world.

Name: Scientific Illustrations
Description:
My artistic approach to scientific illustrations is due to the reason I chose to study biology at the Hebrew University of Jerusalem. The visuals of nature have always fascinated me and I have always wanted to know how things work. I remember when I was a little girl, I would look at my mother's medical books and marvel at the strange and magical forms of all kinds of bacteria. I started illustrating scientific illustrations when I worked as a research assistant in an evolutionary developmental biology lab during my studies. I suggested to the lab professor Ariel Chipman to illustrate for a course called "Introduction to Biology and Evolution of Organisms". I learned that the students enjoyed studying the course material accompanied by colorful illustrations that facilitated comprehension. Since then, I have continued to illustrate for many researchers in Israel and around the world. I help them present their research and knowledge more clearly and beautifully.

I'll be happy to offer you my services as an illustrator for academic articles and books that will enhance your content and improve the audience's understanding of your research. 

netta.kasher@mail.huji.ac.il

Name: Enfermera en apuros
Description:
Enfermera en apuros es mucho más que una marca: es una comunidad creada por y para profesionales sanitarios.

Nacimos hace más de una década con una idea sencilla: diseñar productos que entendiesen de verdad lo que significa ser enfermera. Hoy, somos la mayor comunidad enfermera de habla hispana, con presencia en España, Portugal y Latinoamérica. 

Nuestro propósito es VISIBILIZAR la enfermería y la sanidad en TODO EL MUNDO. Enseñar al mundo lo que hacemos, de lo que somos capaces, y todo lo que valemos.

Creamos artículos que acompañan dentro y fuera del hospital: desde accesorios para el uniforme, bolsos, calzado, papelería, agendas y todo lo que puedas imaginar. Cada producto está pensado para hacer el día a día más fácil y más bonito para cada uno de los trabajadores de salud.  

Con puntos de venta en más de 50 centros de El Corte Inglés, distribución internacional, la publicación de 2 libros y colaboraciones con grandes marcas, seguimos trabajando para visibilizar la enfermería y conectar a una comunidad que no deja de crecer.

Porque ser enfermera es mucho más que una profesión.
Es una forma de vida.

#Enfermeraenapuros

Name: studio FM milano
Description:
studio FM milano deals with Graphic design and creative direction with particular attention to the field of architecture, industrial design, art and culture.

Established in 1996 by Barbara Forni and Sergio Menichelli who worked together in Ettore Sottsass's studio in the early nineties and by Cristiano Bottino, who had returned from New York.

In addition to the three founders, the studio has now expanded to four other junior designer partners: Libero Corti, Domenico Liberti, Francesco Scagliarini and Ilaria Tomat.

FM's projects range from print to digital, from publishing to display and signage projects.

Over the years, the studio's works for Italian and international clients have deserved many awards and publications.

Some members of the FM studio accompany the profession of graphic designer with an intense didactic activity in different schools.
-
Lo studio FM Milano si occupa di Graphic design e Art direction con una particolare attenzione al mondo dell’architettura, del disegno industriale, dell'arte e della cultura. 

È stato fondato nel 1996 da Barbara Forni e Sergio Menichelli che lavoravano insieme nello studio di Ettore Sottsass nei primi anni novanta e da Cristiano Bottino, rientrato da New York. 

Oltre che dai tre fondatori, lo studio FM è costituito oggi da altri quattro soci designer più giovani: Libero Corti, Domenico Liberti, Francesco Scagliarini e Ilaria Tomat. 

I progetti di FM spaziano dalla carta stampata all'ambito digitale, dall’editoria a progetti di allestimento e segnaletica. 

I lavori dello studio per committenti italiani ed internazionali hanno meritato, nel corso degli anni, molti riconoscimenti e pubblicazioni.

Alcuni soci dello studio FM accompagnano la professione di designer grafico con una intensa attività didattica in differenti scuole.

Name: Rosemood
Description:
Nous, c’est Rosemood… enchantés ! 
Nous sommes un atelier spécialisé dans la création en ligne de faire-part, d’albums photo, et depuis peu de tirages photo, de calendriers et de carnets personnalisés. Nous sommes présents en France, en Belgique, en Allemagne et au Royaume-Uni. Nous avons la chance de connaître une forte croissance. Nous n’étions que 3 en 2010 et nous sommes maintenant presque 120 !

Notre vision est simple : nous voulons « faire du bien avec du beau ». Nous mettons donc tout en œuvre pour accompagner, à notre manière, les plus beaux moments de la vie de nos clients avec de la jolie papeterie et de magnifiques albums photo. Nous pensons également que cela ne doit pas seulement s’appliquer à nos clients mais également à nos équipes et au-delà, à l’environnement dans lequel nous vivons.

Name: Dice Academy Delhi
Description:
DICE Academy is an institute for Graphics Design Courses and Web Design Courses in Delhi. Weekend Graphics Design Courses and Weekend Web Design Courses are also available for working professionals and full time students.
DICE was founded with a vision to bring the classroom training to standard where it can fulfil graphic desigm & web design industry’s needs. The co-founders of DICE have a rich experience in this field and were constantly witnessing that the freshers or trained freshers were not up to the mark where they can get a good start in web design industry. This was applicable even to students graduating from top web design institutes. So, with a vision to raise the education & training standard to industry levels, DICE or Delhi Institute of Continuing Education was incorporated. The co-founders brought in their collective experience and expertise to design and prepare courses, programs and course materials specifically aimed at what the web design companies would need. This approach is very different from other institutes where “by-the-book” system is used to stress more on concepts that either obsolete or not relevant to web design companies’ current needs.

Name: European Design Awards
Description:
The European Design Awards is the comprehensive annual awards organisation celebrating the best of graphic design, illustration and digital design in Europe. The ED-Awards are joint effort by 15 communication design magazines from across Europe.

The ED-Awards boast a highly qualified jury, composed of representatives from the leading European design magazines. They are specialised design editors and critics who, who on a daily basis, recognise and promote the best of communication design internationally. An Icograda-appointed observer is also present to ensure competition guidelines are respected.

The ED-Awards receive the widest publicity in the design awards field in Europe. Agencies and designers who excel in the competition, receive ample coverage since the ED-Awards are organised by a network of design media.

I do this primarily through sharing minimalist visuals that help you to get wiser in a second, the WISER Newsletter and soon to be other mediums.

Name: 3DS GROUPE
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle de 3DS Groupe !

Depuis 1998, nous sommes experts en communication visuelle et branding architectural. Notre mission : créer des espaces identitaires forts qui traduisent l’univers de marque de nos clients. Nous regroupons, au sein d’une même structure, toutes les compétences clés pour réussir vos projets : de la conception à la fabrication, jusqu’à l’installation sur site.

Notre offre s’articule autour de 8 domaines d’expertise, dont la signalétique, la vitrophanie, les enseignes, les visuels & adhésifs, ainsi que le déploiement d’image multisites.

Avec plus de 75 collaborateurs et 14 M€ de chiffre d’affaires en 2024, 3DS Groupe conjugue savoir-faire et maîtrise technologique.
Nos locaux de 1 500 m² à Bagneux (92) intègrent notre siège, un atelier principal, une Experience Room immersive, et un parc machines de dernière génération. Un second atelier à Manchecourt (Loiret) renforce notre capacité de production tout en assurant une couverture nationale optimale.

Notre valeur ajoutée repose sur une approche sur mesure et transversale :
• Un bureau d’études pour structurer chaque projet avec rigueur
• Un pôle conception graphique pour sublimer les identités visuelles
• Une équipe gestion de projets dédiée à un déploiement fluide
• Des ateliers intégrés pour une fabrication française de haute précision

 Certifiés ISO 9001 (qualité) et ISO 45001 (santé & sécurité), partenaires 3M et SolarScreen, nous bénéficions de labels reconnus garantissant la performance et la durabilité de nos solutions.

 Engagés dans une démarche RSE ambitieuse, nous avons obtenu la médaille Platinum Ecovadis 2025, ainsi que la certification ISO 14001, attestant d’un management environnemental rigoureux.

3DS Groupe, un partenaire de confiance pour sublimer vos espaces et valoriser votre identité visuelle !

Name: The Graphic Design School
Description:
The Graphic Design School is an Australian Registered Training Organisation — RTO provider number 91706. 

We offer training specialising in Graphic & Web Design to Australia and the world through our incredible online learning environment that we call ‘The Schoolyard’. 

We are passionate about our students, education and above all graphic design! We pride ourselves on having the best online courses available at an affordable price. 

Our course authors and tutors are revered amongst their industry for their consistent efforts in maintaining a high standard in Graphic Design, through both Teaching and Professional Practice. 

Awards include: Nicki Awards Business Woman of the Year, AcademicKeys Who's Who in Fine Arts Education 2005, LogoLounge 4, Metropolitan Who's Who 2007, Solo Entrepreneur award. 

Our tutors boast prestigious clients such as Vogue Australia, Vogue USA, Mirabella USA, Elle USA, American Express, Virgin, Toyota, Dove, Maybelline, Siemens, Sky UK, Hilton, HP, Marriot, LG, Paramount studio, Visa, Creative Method, RWK Design, Scarlet Design Group, DeMo Design, and The Collective, Jack in the Box, Shell, Avis, Honda, and many many more.

Name: Fried Design Company
Description:
We take our bourbon neat. Hot Chicken five stars. Amps overdriven. We prefer bonfires to fire pits. Monster trucks over luxury coups. Our passions in life are the ones teachers said were a waste of time, our relatives didn’t understand, and the pastor, bless his heart, said would lead us to ruination.

We believe in working hard and playing harder. We believe in rock n' roll. We believe the only path to a nice deep sleep is a hard day’s work and sometimes a hard day’s night. We believe in punching above our weight class. We believe in taking a blue-collar approach to the very cushy job we have of being lucky enough to draw cool stuff for even cooler people. We believe in setting goals, having a good plan, and basking in the glow of accomplishment.

We love clients who like to push buttons, get loud and have some fun doing it. We love to work. It's what we do when we aren't working.

Feel like we might be a good fit? Pull up a seat and pour a drink - let's get started.

Name: Lo Siento
Description:
After starting his career in Industrial Design at Escola de Disseny Elisava (Barcelona), Borja Martínez moved to London in 1999 to study Graphic Design at the London College of Printing (today, London College of Communication).

During those four years, he combined his studies with a a part time job as a designer at Visioncorp; in 2004, he returns to Barcelona to work at Gráfica (www.graficadesign.com) and, a year later, at Basedesign (www.basedesign.com) part time.

In 2005, Borja Martinez on his own founds Lo Siento, where he starts developing different Graphic Design and art direction projects for clients such as Sandro Desii (italian pasta and ice cream manufacturer), The Pinker Tones (electronic music band), Txoco (gastronomy), Roca (bathroom fittings), El Bulli (gastronomy), Macaco (musician) o Easyled (lighting company). In 2010, LoSiento is awarded by the FAD (Fomento de las Artes Decorativas) with the Grand Laus award.

Nowadays, Lo Siento gathers a team of 5 professionals and continues to work in design projects from the fields of corporative, packaging, editorial and carrying out personal projects as well.

The studio is specially interested in taking over identity projects as a whole. The main feature of its work is its physical and material approach to the graphic solutions, resulting in a field where graphic and industrial go hand by hand, in a constant search for an alliance with the artisan processes.

Description:

Hemos logrado ser el proveedor referente y líder en el mercado de desarrollo de identidad y comunicación institucional atendiendo las necesidades específicas de los clientes, superando sus expectativas de manera profesional, efectiva e integral.

Quienes nos escogen cada día, encuentran una atención personal y un equipo de profesionales interdisciplinario que trabajan de manera proactiva y sinérgica, con el objetivo de lograr que cada cliente encuentre una identidad y comunicación corporativa óptima para su desarrollo.

Además de los servicios tradicionales de diseño y rediseño de logos a medida, prestamos servicios de creación de papelería institucional, diseño de folletería, publicidades, rótulos para locales y vehículos, creación y mantenimiento de sitios Web. 

Contamos también con una excelente plataforma web desarrollada para el asesoramiento, venta, ejecución de proyectos y atención post venta vía Internet, telefonía y correo. De esta manera, garantizamos el logro de una óptima identidad corporativa de manera ágil, segura, eficiente y económica, desde la comodidad del lugar donde se encuentre el cliente.

Name: Paper Stone Scissors
Description:
We're a global creative and production agency, with offices in three major cities across Australia and China, working with some of the world’s most iconic brands.

Our teams work seamlessly as one agency through every stage of a project. Research and consumer insights are constantly shared across borders to help inform strategy and creative outcomes.

We've been in the game long enough to know that success comes from being totally consumer focused and results driven.

We believe that creativity can change the world. We work together, bounce ideas off each other and bring our own perspectives into the mix. Appreciating the value of new perspectives, we’re always open to fresh talent.

Our educational program YourTurn, invites emerging designers into our Melbourne or Shanghai studio, offering them an immersive educational experience over a 3 month period. We know the smart-thinkers, hard-workers and creative innovators are out there, and we want to work with them.

We believe that creative expression touches all of us in profound ways. Aiming to promote the importance of creativity, we launched Now&Them. After two successful events, we're proud to expand and grow our endeavour in 2021 and beyond.

Name: The Feebles
Description:
C’est en 2013, après 10 années de collaborations créatives et de projets communs, que Gaëtan Guerlais et Anaël Moreau fondent le studio the Feebles et se spécialisent dans la création graphique et l’illustration.

Ensemble, ils proposent un travail audacieux et intelligent mêlant sans cesse différentes techniques et supports. Conduits par un état d’esprit libre et curieux,
ils façonnent un univers ludique et moderne, offrant par leurs créations, un moment d’évasion. Pour autant l’efficacité n’est pas oubliée, l’image fait passer le message. Cette pertinence, ils la doivent à leur complicité ; cette capacité à travailler chaque projet à deux et à construire avec une vision commune.

Les Feebles c’est une histoire de rencontres, entre réflexion & création,
pensée & outil, rires & accolades. Design & happiness.

Description:
InDesign user groups exist around the United States, Canada, Australia, Europe, Latin America, Africa, and the Middle East.

The InDesign User Group community provides a fantastic networking and learning platform for graphic designers, publishers, educators etc..

Membership of an InDesign User Group is free as is the meeting attendance.

Presently there are 57 user groups in over 22 countries around the world, each organizing meetings for their members around 4-times a year. Membership now exceeds 32,000 people world-wide.

O design vem, assim, se consolidando como uma disciplina capaz de projetar um futuro melhor – e para todos.

Description:
Transforme seu bar em um espaço inesquecível com nossas soluções de decoração personalizadas! Papéis de Parede Temáticos: Dê um toque especial ao seu bar com nossos papéis de parede personalizados. Sejam temas retrô, modernos, industriais ou naturais, temos opções que combinam perfeitamente com a atmosfera que você deseja criar.

Letreiros e Fachadas em ACM: Destaque a entrada do seu bar com letreiros modernos e fachadas em ACM de alta qualidade. Nossos designs exclusivos garantem que seu bar seja visto e lembrado, atraindo novos clientes e fidelizando os antigos.

Backlights e Iluminação Decorativa: Crie um ambiente envolvente com nossa iluminação decorativa. Os backlights são perfeitos para destacar áreas específicas do bar, criando um efeito visual incrível e uma atmosfera convidativa.

Peças em Acrílico: Adicione um toque de sofisticação com nossas peças em acrílico. Desde placas de sinalização até elementos decorativos, o acrílico traz modernidade e elegância ao seu espaço.

Decoração Personalizada: Cada bar tem sua própria identidade e nós estamos aqui para ajudar a expressá-la. Trabalhamos em conjunto com você para criar uma decoração que reflete a essência do seu negócio, desde a escolha dos materiais até o design final.

Itens de PDV e Comunicação Visual: Maximize o potencial do seu ponto de venda com nossos itens de PDV personalizados. Placas, banners e outros elementos de comunicação visual são fundamentais para promover eventos, ofertas especiais e produtos, criando uma experiência completa para seus clientes.

Na Coralsign, nossa equipe de especialistas está pronta para transformar seu bar em um ambiente único e memorável. Entre em contato conosco e descubra como podemos ajudar a decorar seu bar .

Name: Stoëmp
Description:
Founded in 2009, Stoëmp Studio is a full-service design agency elevating brand identities through a signature, strategy-based methodology. Active across all sectors, we strive for significance where others strive for visibility. Welcome to the realm of meaningful brand building. Whatever your goal or need, we develop a tailored package held to the highest standards in design that is grounded in mutual understanding and close collaboration. No go-betweens, never one-size-fits-all. Our passionate, surgical approach is intended to leave room for surprises.

OFF THE WALL SINCE 2009 

Stoëmp Studio is an agency on a human scale dedicated to creating brand identities rooted in authentic person-to-person exchange. This guiding principle means clients are in direct contact with skilled designers and studio directors from desire to design, allowing us to dedicate our time to staying ahead of the creative and tech curves, perfecting new and old techniques, and cultivating a spirit of disruption—project by project.


A measure of precision, and a dash of audacity: our prescribed dose.


Existing outside of the rules and margins imposed by overscaled corporate agencies, our structure is high-level horizontal: Stoëmp Studio is a crew of creative experts who approach design with work ethic and penchant for fun in equal measure.

Originaire des Monts du Lyonnais et vivant à Saint-Martin-en-Haut, je peux me déplacer dans les départements du Rhône (69) et de la Loire (42) pour échanger avec vous si vous le désirez. Ensemble, prenons soin de votre image ! 
 
Vous trouverez sur mon site l’ensemble des services que je propose ainsi que les créations graphiques que j’ai déjà pu réaliser. Jetez un œil à mon portfolio, et si mon travail de graphiste freelance vous intéresse et que vous avez un projet sur lequel nous pouvons travailler ensemble, n’hésitez pas à me contacter !

DL SYSTEM, au service de l’industrie
Grâce à un parc machines moderne comprenant une imprimante UV à plat, des imprimantes écosolvant roll to roll, des laminateurs, des plotters de découpe, une fraiseuse CNC et une cabine de peinture, nous avons la capacité de produire vos articles en série.
En tant qu’industriel, nous répondons à toutes vos demandes de sous-traitance pour la conception de produit nécessitant le mise en œuvre de nos nombreux savoir faire : étude technique, impression numérique, découpe adhésif, covering, lamination, éclairage led, fraisage, gravure, peinture…

Description:
Agence de design, branding, stratégie, web, publicité

NOTRE CULTURE -  Chez Bleuoutremer, nous croyons à l’importance de prendre sa place et de s’y illustrer.

Pour vous amener plus loin, notre équipe évolue dans un espace collaboratif ouvert et vibrant, où les idées voyagent. Nous estimons que l’écoute et la transparence nous font progresser individuellement et collectivement.

Hommes et femmes de cœur, nous valorisons l’entraide et la solidarité. Nous misons sur les aptitudes de chacun pour obtenir une synergie propice à la créativité. Ce qui nous rassemble? Des liens durables, des rapports authentiques, une vision commune.

L’AGENCE - Une équipe engagée

Conscients de l’empreinte durable du design dans la société, nous prenons la mesure de votre univers avec respect et empathie. Notre objectif: donner du sens, de la profondeur, de la pérennité et de la valeur à votre message.

Le design fait partie de notre vie quotidienne, mais c’est votre réalité qu’il fait rayonner. Voilà pourquoi notre métier est si passionnant et nous tient en éveil à chaque nouvelle démarche créative.

NOTRE APPROCHE - Dans une ère où la morosité prend parfois le pas sur l’enthousiasme ou l’optimisme, Bleuoutremer promet de faire la différence en mettant de l’avant son concept de Design engagé(MC).

Le Design engagé(MC) énonce clairement la couleur de notre implication auprès de nos clients, de nos partenaires et de la communauté. Nous croyons qu’un design beau, bon et juste émerge d’une approche qui fusionne analyse en profondeur et pensée innovante.

Vecteur essentiel à la croissance d’une organisation, le design de qualité génère des retombées significatives, sur le plan commercial, artistique ou social. Bleuoutremer vous propose une véritable démarche de marque, en phase avec la réalité de votre monde.

Pequeño estudio, grandes ideas.

Pasión por el diseño.
Para nosotros no es solo un trabajo: es curiosidad, método y actitud. Cada proyecto es una oportunidad para experimentar, resolver, sorprender. Nos gustan los desafíos y creemos en la fuerza delle buenas ideas.

Nuestra forma de trabajar.
Diseñar bien significa también organizar bien. Por eso combinamos creatividad y rigor, cuidamos el proceso, respetamos los plazos y mantenemos siempre una comunicación clara, tanto con el cliente como dentro del equipo.

¿Qué hacemos?
Identidad visual · Materiales promocionales · Diseño web y presencia online · Comunicación para eventos y ferias · Fotografía · Video y Motion Graphics · Ilustración e infografía animada (2D).

Name: Currículum Solidario
Description:
Hola!

Lo primero de todo, esperamos que estés bien.

Somos un grupo de diseñadores y directores de arte que estamos intentando echar una mano como podemos. Sabemos que cuando algo entra bien por los ojos, es mucho más fácil que sea bien recibido (trabajamos en ello) y, por eso, queremos ayudar en lo que sabemos hacer: que las cosas sean bonitas.

Por eso, si te has quedado sin trabajo, nosotros podemos ayudarte a que tu CV se presente de forma atractiva. Ojo, no somos profesionales en RRHH, así que no podremos ofrecerte ayuda en cuanto al contenido, sino más en la forma en la que lo presentas.

La idea es muy sencilla: 
Escríbenos a curriculumsolidario@gmail.com
Te ponemos en contacto con uno de los diseñadores que se han prestado a ayudar.
Mediante email, el diseñador te mandará un diseño de tu CV renovado y de forma totalmente gratuita.

Te agradecemos que dejes el turno a aquellas personas que desgraciadamente se han quedado sin empleo a causa del Coronavirus.

Si tú mismo eres diseñador o has trabajado en una profesión donde puedes fácilmente conseguir recursos para poder elaborar un CV, nuestros diseñadores podrían decidir no diseñarlo.

Vamos atendiendo solicitudes a medida que nos van llegando y nuestro número de diseñadores, aunque
va creciendo poco a poco, es limitado, por lo tanto
te pedimos un poco de paciencia y comprensión.
Los diseñadores son voluntarios que quieren aportar
su pequeño grano de arena de la forma que saben.

De nuevo, esperamos que estés bien
y esperamos serte de utilidad.

Name: Des Signes - Studio Muchir Desclouds
Description:
Élise Muchir et Franklin Desclouds, graphistes associés fondateurs du studio, se sont formés aux Arts décoratifs de Paris où ils se sont connus, puis auprès de personnalités et d’agences de référence chacun de leur côté, avant de créer Des Signes en 2003. Ils orientent l’activité du studio dès l’origine dans le domaine culturel, un positionnement qui n’a fait que s’affirmer en 10 ans d’exercice mais reste ouvert sur tous les univers.

Le studio développe aujourd’hui principalement pour des acteurs du monde culturel – qu’il s’agisse d’expositions, de musées, d’événements, de monuments, d’établissements, d’éditeurs… – des identités visuelles complètes, allant de la définition de la charte graphique à la communication de projets, incluant aussi bien la création de signalétiques, de logotypes, que de sites web, catalogues et programmes, papier ou numérique.

Clients : Bibliothèque nationale de France (BNF), Ministère de la Culture et de la Communication, Château et domaine national de Versailles, Château de Fontainebleau, Région Île-de-France, Mairie de Paris, Ville de Levallois, Ville de Boulogne-Billancourt, RMN-Grand Palais, direction des Musées de France, Musée de la Chasse et de la Nature, Musées en Haute-Normandie, Universcience, Palais de la découverte, Parc de la Villette, Cité des sciences et de l’industrie, éditions des Arènes, L’Iconoclaste et XXI, éditions Gallimard, éditions Plon, groupe Libella, éditions Palette, librairie Atout Livre, réseau LibrEst, Inrap/réseau ACE, Université Paris 8, Labex artsH2H, CNSMD Lyon, Centre International d’Études Pédagogiques (CIEP), CNDP scérén, Délégation générale à la langue française et aux langues de France, association UNI-Presse, Hapax Conseil, agence O’Design, société DécoD, Michel Desvigne paysagiste, Paul Andreu et Richez associés, Quadri Fiore architectes, Théâtre des Bouffes du Nord, etc.

We are a shared brain, multiple intelligences: we disassemble and reassemble intuitions to create imagination. We combine experiences and suggestions lifted from many worlds. We are inspired by music, art, cinema. But also by comics, TV shows, books. And the bartender, the butcher and the queue at the supermarket. We look for alternative solutions to find what perhaps we were not looking for.

We are a Factory and there are many of us, but not too many.
We are a creative studio and we deal with Branding and Strategic Design. Yes, but what do we do? We give our clients the most effective tools to tell their audience about physical and digital spaces. We take an idea and dismantle it to study its potential, risks, audience and context. When everything becomes clear, we build a house around it, a visual universe that represents its identity. To our experience and professionalism we also add a whole range of freelance collaborators to support the client in every moment of communication. We grow because we never stop wondering.
We believe in the power of the imagination, in the mind which plays with everything.

We look at images and see stories, we read stories and hear music. We change the way we look at things. And everything else just follows naturally.

Name: ATypI: Association Typographique Internationale
Description:
ATypI (Association Typographique Internationale) is a mission-driven nonprofit membership organization dedicated to type and typography. Founded in 1957, ATypI provides a structure for communication, information, education, inspiration, innovation, and action in the international type community.

We not only preserve the culture, tradition, and history of type and typography, we also promote contemporary digital fonts and creators, encourage outstanding typography and typographic design, and publish resources and other materials on type and design.

We encourage innovation, inclusivity, sharing, and collaboration, and support those who are doing the same. We produce in-person, online, and hybrid conferences, workshops, seminars, and other relevant events.

Occasionally, ATypI awards the Prix Charles Peignot for Excellence in Type Design to a designer under the age of 35 who has made an outstanding contribution to type design.

ATypI is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization incorporated in the State of California, USA.

Name: Turnstyle
Description:
Born in 2004

We are a full-service creative agency with offices in Seattle and Portland. A dedicated team of designers, strategists, developers and account specialists, we create highly-crafted brand experiences that clarify purpose, encourage action, and inspire brand loyalty. We’d love to get to know you and help tell your story.  

"Style is a simple way of saying complex things."
—Jean Cocteau 

Style is Not a 4-letter Word. In our experience, the brands that are the most magnetic are those which project distinct, memorable and charismatic personalities. These brands place equal emphasis on what they say and how they say it. Some design purists might say that style is merely artificial decoration that should be avoided in favor of logic—“form follows function” and all that. Don’t get us wrong, we’re not proponents of style for its own sake, or as ornament applied after an idea has already been defined. Rather, we employ style as an integral and strategic component of our brand-development process. At its best, style can be that magical something about a company or product that pulls people in and transcends the logical. So, to us, style is not a 4-letter word. On the contrary, we embrace it, harnessing its power to cut through the clutter. And besides, style has five letters.

We Do:
Strategy
Identity
Digital
Print
Packaging
Environment

View our portfolio at:
turnstyle.studio

Cette approche nous permet de proposer des solutions personnalisées, adaptées à vos besoins, à votre budget et à votre calendrier.

Pourquoi travailler avec nous ?
Parce que nous considérons le design graphique comme un véritable levier stratégique pour votre marque. Nous combinons créativité, expertise technique et sens du détail pour que chaque projet ait un impact mesurable. Avec La Raffinerie, vous bénéficiez d’un accompagnement complet : conseil stratégique, conception, suivi et production.

De la création d’une identité visuelle au déploiement sur tous vos supports de communication, nous donnons vie à des projets qui font la différence.

Name: Graphic Design Jobs
Description:
Calling all Graphic Design Dreamers!

Welcome to the vibrant world of graphic design jobs! Whether you're a seasoned pro or a passionate newbie, this community is your one-stop shop for all things graphic design careers.

What's in it for you?

Land your dream job: Browse hundreds of open positions across various design disciplines, from branding and packaging to UI/UX and motion graphics.
Connect with industry experts: Network with experienced designers, recruiters, and hiring managers to gain valuable insights and advice.
Sharpen your skills: Attend workshops, webinars, and masterclasses to stay ahead of the curve and learn new design trends and techniques.
Showcase your portfolio: Create your profile and upload your best work to get noticed by potential employers.
Get inspired: Dive into a creative hub of design inspiration, with galleries showcasing stunning projects and thought-provoking discussions.
Stay informed: Keep up-to-date on the latest industry news, trends, and salary benchmarks.
This community is more than just job postings – it's a thriving ecosystem for graphic design professionals to:

Build meaningful connections: Collaborate with like-minded individuals, find mentors, and build lasting professional relationships.
Give and receive feedback: Share your work, get constructive criticism, and help others in their design journey.
Celebrate success: Applaud each other's achievements and build a supportive network of fellow creatives.
No matter where you are in your graphic design journey, this community has something for you. So come on in, unleash your creativity, and join the movement!

Here are some additional things you can add to your community description to make it even more appealing:

Testimonials from satisfied members.
Specific examples of successful job placements.
Links to your community's social media channels.
A call to action, inviting people to join the community.
We hope this helps you create a thriving graphic design jobs community!

Name: Wink
Description:
Wink crafts brands with wit that inspire and impact commerce and culture. 

OUR PHILOSOPHY:
*Every brand has a unique story to tell. We are problem solvers, thinkers and communicators that creatively bring that story to life.
 
*We work smarter, not harder, by collaborating and partnering with our clients upfront. We ask our clients to be involved and engaged because we demand a lot from ourselves.
 
*Each and every project has a firm footing in strategy. This provides a road map to where the business wants to go and how to get there. We work with a holistic understanding of the entire design process.
 
*Wit is in our DNA and namesake. Attention to detail with a twist makes our work memorable, invites participation, forms a bond and captivates. It’s the difference between a product that is glanced at for 10 seconds and one that is poured over for 10 minutes.

BACKGROUND:
The Minneapolis-based firm was named as one of the Style and Design 100 by Time magazine for their work with clients such as Target, Nike, MTV, Express, American Eagle Outfitters, Turner Classic Movies, JCPenney's, The Thymes, Macy’s, Neiman Marcus, Gaiam, Minnetonka Moccasin Co., and The New York Times. 

Design work is included in the permanent collection of The Chicago Antheaum Museum, the Library of Congress, the Cooper Hewitt National Design Museum and have been featured on the best seller's list of the New York Times.

Name: studio guild
Description:
We are change-makers, driven by the belief that standing out starts with thinking differently. In a market overflowing with sameness, brands can no longer rely on familiar strategies for brand creation.

To truly resonate, and leave a lasting impression, they must reimagine how they speak to today’s ever-evolving consumer. The game has changed and those who adapt boldly will shape the future.

Led by Founder and Creative Director Trish Dunstone, Studio Guild is an Australian based packaging design studio specialising in the food and drinks industries.

With more than 25 years of shaping brands in the movable world of drinks, we've weathered every storm and emerged stronger each time. Adaptation isn’t just a skill, it’s our craft. We dive deep into your business, making your challenges our own. Our mission? To craft brands with stories worth telling. Not just eye-catching for the now, but built to stay relevant for the long run. Because we don’t just want your brand to be noticed, we want it to be remembered.

We have been awarded globally for our brands and most recently ranked 4th in the world for 24/25 World Brand Design Awards after receiving 9 awards for 9 entries.

We like working with great clients who match our ethos so we always go the extra mile to build successful, happy and healthy relationships that last.

    Digital Marketing: Our digital marketing services, including SEO, social media marketing, and content creation, are designed to increase your online visibility and drive traffic to your business.

Name: Petrikór Design
Description:
Somos um estúdio brasileiro de branding que acredita que bom design não nasce do conforto. Ele provoca, desafia e carrega personalidade.

Acreditamos que todo projeto relevante precisa de um certo grau de estranheza. É isso que impede o design de se acomodar na mediocridade. O mundo já está saturado de marcas genéricas, e nosso papel é não adicionar mais uma à lista.

Para nós, branding é uma disciplina transversal, que atravessa estratégia, produto, comunicação e experiência, conectando todas as camadas do negócio para criar marcas vivas e memoráveis.
Nossa trajetória soma mais de 110 prêmios nacionais e internacionais, incluindo o Studio of the Year no Latin America Design Awards e o Estúdio do Ano no Prêmio Brasileiro de Design. Troféus nunca foram o objetivo, mas a consequência de uma obsessão constante por ir além.

Acreditamos no poder dos pequenos estúdios, onde o designer se torna o elo entre visão, estratégia e expressão.

–

We are a Brazilian branding studio that believes great design is never born from comfort. It provokes, challenges, and carries personality.

We believe every relevant project needs a certain degree of strangeness. That’s what keeps design from settling into mediocrity. The world is already saturated with generic brands, and our role is not to add another one.

For us, branding is a transversal discipline. It moves through strategy, product, communication, and experience, connecting every layer of the business to create brands that are alive and memorable.

Our journey includes more than 110 national and international awards, including Studio of the Year at the Latin America Design Awards and Studio of the Year at the Brazilian Design Award. Trophies were never the goal, but the consequence of constantly pushing boundaries.

We believe in the power of small studios, where designers become the link between vision, strategy, and expression.

Name: Umlaut
Description:
Hey, from the team at Umlaut!

We have a saying: "Marketing is asking somebody on a date. Branding is the reason they say yes."

You see, you can have the best marketing chops in the land, but if your story, your reason for being, doesn't make sense, or doesn't live up to the promo, then eventually the wheels are going to fall off. That's where branding comes in.

Brands operate best when they don't exist in a vacuum, rather when they're a part of the fabric of society, so to create them without leaning on references from all around you, would be a tad odd.

It’s about seeing how a brand fits into its surroundings, drawing out the best bits that you find, and then creating something that looks and feels so authentic, that it’s hard to understand how it hasn’t been there forever.

We're a small team of brand designers, brand strategists, and web and app designers and developers, who see branding not just as a logo and some nice colours, but as the entire personality of your company, from the way it looks, to the way it works.

Say hey. Let's create a brand together that's built to last.

Name: PHd Design
Description:
PHd is a multi discipline agency that works in many aspects of marketing communications. We work on single projects right through to integrated campaigns. Specific services include advertising, identity, literature, web design, packaging, signage, printing and P.R.

At PHd we like to make things as transparent and as simple as possible for everyone involved internally and externally.

When a project starts we create a written brief which is approved prior to any costs or design work, then a proposal is created based on the work involved, this details all aspects of the project and breaks down the costs into straightforward categories. Once we have a purchase order then the design work begins…with pens and paper and creative minds. We try to look at a project from the end customer’s point of view and design a solution which works for them. 

This is the best way to get a positive result to any task. We present sketches, scamps and design thoughts to the client and discuss them to get to a stage where a number of options are worth fleshing out to become proper visuals. These visuals are then re-presented and one is normally chosen as the end result. We then go on to create the high resolution digital artwork and finally the finished end product. This simple process works for all types of projects from a website, to a pack design right the way to a new brand identity or literature project. 

BRIEF - QUOTATION - SKETCH - ARTWORK - PRINT

EEN HELDERE STRATEGIE ALS FUNDAMENT

OVER ONS

DE KERN UITVERGROTEN

JOUW VERHAAL ZICHTBAAR

Name: Ets GESRET - Peinture en lettres
Description:
Située à Grand-Champ dans le Morbihan, l'ETS GESRET - Peinture en lettres est spécialisée dans la peinture en lettres traditionnelle. 

Nous réalisons tous types de lettrages pour des enseignes ou des vitrines, pour de la signalétique, mais également pour des véhicules ou des bateaux...

À la peinture ou à la feuille d’or, le peintre en lettres trace avec son pinceau et à main levée, toutes sortes de lettres et de fantaisies (empattements divers, ombres portées, logos et petites illustrations) allant de quelques centimètres à plusieurs mètres de hauteur.

Les supports sont variés et nous nous adaptons en fonction de leur nature : façades, vitrines, pignons, miroirs, carrosseries ou encore enseignes en bois fabriquées en atelier...

Nous étudions tous les projets et pouvons ainsi proposer une création
originale, accompagnée de sa déclinaison sur tous supports, ou reproduire à l’identique une charte graphique existante.

L'ETS GESRET- Peinture en lettres perpétue ce vieux métier quasiment disparu aujourd’hui en France et attache énormément d’importance à l’esthétisme, aux détails et au patrimoine. Nous veillons donc à proposer des projets cohérents qui s’adaptent aux bâtiments et qui s’intègrent au mieux dans l’environnement.

Très impliqués dans la transmission de savoir-faire, nous faisons tout notre possible pour intervenir dans les écoles, organiser des portes ouvertes ou accueillir des stagiaires.

Nous intervenons principalement sur le Grand Ouest, mais étudions tous les projets.

Alors, si vous souhaitez apporter une petite touche d'originalité et d'authenticité à votre établissement, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter !

When you work with Paliant Design, you don’t just get design, you gain:

A team that gets you. We dive deep into your brand, interpreting briefs with precision to create designs that don’t just look great but work seamlessly.
An extension of your team. We align with your vision, maintaining brand consistency across all mediums so you don’t have to.
Your brand’s memory bank. We track every design decision, ensuring brand cohesion at every touchpoint.
Creative problem-solvers. Whether it’s branding, print, digital, packaging or long-form content, we create solutions that connect with your audience.
Designers who evolve with you. We stay ahead of trends, refining our skills to deliver industry-leading, strategic design.
A fresh perspective. We challenge the norm, helping you see beyond the now to unlock new possibilities.
A team that treats your brand like their own. We care about your success and help you adapt, grow and make an impact.
A trusted creative partner. Established in 2008 by Alice in Sydney and now based in Adelaide, we bring global experience with a local focus.
Let’s chat over coffee. Your brand deserves more than just design, it deserves strategy, consistency and impact.
