Name: Business Key
Description:
We believe in the power of dreams which is the heart of what we do. We help realize your business goals and turn them into a reality whether you have a business idea or whether you’re a startup or a mature business. Business keys is a UAE-based team of creative experts specialized in branding, digital marketing, optimization and web design and development. With a mix of young and experienced minds with a passion for design and innovation, our business creates strong brand identities and all-encompassing communications that serve companies of all sizes and industries such as the arts and leisure to consulting and trading. 

Step into our world and prepare to be awed: we break down your vision into realistic goals by providing top-notch solutions and expert advice for your brand and company. From managing digital content to designing brand identity to producing videos and tweaking websites, everything we do is created with your success in mind. We work in small teams and start by intently listening to you to better understand your company, target audience and competition. Then, we get down to business and create unique, tailored solutions made especially for your company, which are born from honest and collaborative partnerships with you. Don’t expect us to unveil solutions cooked up on our own, we want you to be part of the process so we could create amazing projects and content together because we care about forging long-term relationships with brands and clients. This happens effortlessly thanks to our down-to-earth attitude with just the right amount of wit and charm. We’re never satisfied, so we don’t just stop there. We measure, hone and refine everything we do with the aim of creating your unique corporate and brand identity, driving demand and delivering success to you. We love the work that we do and we can’t wait to get started and help you tell your story to the world.

Name: DGCV
Description:
En mayo de 2005 cuando comenzaba a surgir el concepto de la web social o 2.0 (mucho antes del surgimiento de las redes sociales) un grupo de estudiantes creaba uno de los primeros blogs de noticias sobre Diseño Gráfico en Argentina. A su vez el mismo resultó como un medio de consulta para usuarios de toda Latinoamérica.

Continuando con nuestra misión fue que el proyecto pasó a un segundo nivel y es por eso que así surgió DGCV / Medio informativo sobre Diseño Gráfico y Comunicación Visual.

Nuestro objetivo fue siempre poder ampliar la red de información y fomentar el intercambio de contenido de una forma más fluida.

Es por eso que ofrecemos este espacio a estudiantes, docentes, profesionales, agencias, estudios, productoras y a todas aquellas personas que deseen formar parte de un proyecto de interés común.

Queremos que nuestros seguidores y colegas no solo se limiten a visualizar información sino que además puedan participar en la generación de los contenidos.

Proponemos ahora aprovechar nuestra plataforma y el poderoso recurso de las redes sociales para acceder a la información de una forma simple y efectiva.

Esperamos que DGCV sea de utilidad y gusto de todos ustedes.

Managementinformatie voor zelfsturende teams, implementatie van een nieuw ECD, de client centraal. Ga d’r maar aan staan. Blik levert beeldtaal die op gang brengt en mensen een zetje geeft. 

Je wilt communicatie die hardop zegt: hier staan wij voor. Grote begrippen maken we concreet, ingewikkelde materie halen we dichtbij. Iedereen weet opeens weer: hé, dit gaat ook over mij. Ik hou van communicatie die niet alleen klopt, maar vooral raakt.

Name: SRS do Brasil Comercial Ltda
Description:
SRS is an Italian company. In Brazil, it began its operations in 1993, in the city of Criciúma, Santa Catarina, at the production of serigraph screens for the ceramic industry.
In 1997, the branch of Rio Claro, São Paulo, was created, since the region is a ceramic center, as well as Criciúma. We introduced lots of technology into the market, such as: the use of rotary screens, use of silicone-‐based screen printing frames, technologies that reduced the production costs and improved the performance of the manufacturing plants of our clients. Some innovations have happened in ceramic and SRS has innovated as well.
In the market, we are well-‐known for the quality of our products, agility, responsibility with our deadlines and good customer service. SRS has become Gruppo SRS, because nowadays it owns the following companies:
SRS Comercial, head office in Criciúma-‐SC, develops the activities below:
- Ceramic sector: rotary and flat serigraph screen printing, phenolic resin and/or plaster cylinders and embossments, besides the development of drawings.
-Leather / Synthetic sector: printing on phenolic resin boards and development of drawings.
-Textile sector: rotary and flat serigraph screen printing and development of drawings.
- Furniture sector: printing of rubber cylinders and sleeves for the painting line and development of drawings.
SRS Comercial Rio Claro-SP develops the following activities:
- Ceramic sector: rotary and flat serigraph screen printing, cylinders and embossments, besides the development of drawings.
- Furniture sector: printing of rubber cylinders and sleeves for the painting line and development of drawings.
SRS Indústria, working exclusively in the textile area, manufacturing serigraph screens, engraving and erasing nickel cylinders and creating exclusive prints, with head office in Brusque-SC.
Gruppo SRS has about 90 employees distributed at the units of Santa Catarina and São Paulo, with its own facilities that comprise 10,000 m² of build.

Name: Extra Estudio
Description:
Extra! es un estudio de diseño gráfico y comunicación visual fundado en Barcelona el año 2006 por Iñigo Jerez y José Bellés. Creemos en la comunicación basada en ideas. Somos simplicidad, servicio, concepto, estética y tendencias creativas destiladas con funcionalidad. 

Trabajamos con conceptos, formas, tipografía e imagen, siempre con el compromiso por el trabajo bien hecho. Desde la versatilidad y heterogeneidad aportamos soluciones gráficas a través de la flexibilidad y el rigor, ya sean productos de consumo de masas o proyectos editoriales de tendencia.

Escuchamos. Todo empieza con una conversación para comprender el reto y las necesidades. Es nuestro punto de vista desde hace más de 10 años: nuestra creatividad se asienta siempre en el beneficio del cliente. 

Somos metódicos. Tenemos consciencia de que los procesos son fundamentales. Nos movemos con fases de trabajo contrastadas y eficientes, siempre en sintonía con el cliente.

Nos comprometemos. Nos responsabilizamos del seguimiento de todas las etapas de un proyecto, desde el concepto inicial hasta la entrega final. Coordinamos equipos, gestionamos la producción, y colaboramos en red con profesionales según las necesidades de cada encargo, ya sea de diseño editorial, identidad corporativa, comunicación, packaging, diseño web, tipografía, ilustración…

Aportamos nuestra profesionalidad y nuestra visión del trabajo a clientes grandes o pequeños, a instituciones o empresas, siempre con la misma pasión por cada proyecto. A lo largo de nuestra trayectoria han confiado en nosotros empresas de moda, arte, cultura y del sector de la alimentación entre otras.

Name: ImmoExplorer24 - der Flatfinder für Neubauprojekte
Description:
Schöne Grüße aus Hamburg...

ImmoExplorer24 ist ein #flatfinder, der im passenden Farbdesign auf Ihre Firme-Landingpage eingebunden werden kann.

Der ImmoExplorer24 zeigt ihre Neubauprojekte in einer übersichtlichen interaktiven 3D-Darstellung und führen ihre Interessenten zu den noch freien Wohneinheiten mit allen Details.

Damit verbessern Sie die Vertriebsprozesssteuerung und optimieren die „customer journey“.

Mit diese Wohnungsfinder ermöglichen Sie Ihren Interessenten eine komfortable Übersicht der verfügbaren Wohneinheiten im Gesamtprojekt. Diese sehen somit auf einem Blick das gesamte Neubauprojekt. Mit dem Verständnis des Gesamtprojektes, können Interessenten gezielt Ihre Wunschwohnung begutachten und sich über die entsprechenden Details informieren.

Die Bedienung des Wohnungsfinder im Login-Bereich für unsere Kunden ist einfach und überschaubar. Die wichtigen Parameter wie Verkaufsstatus und Preisgestaltung können Sie hier in Echtzeit anpassen. 
Alternativ lassen sich diese Anpassungen auch über Ihre Maklersoftware automatisieren.

-DSGVO-Konform-
Da der ImmoExplorer24 in der Anwendung keine Personenbezogene Daten erhebt, kann er ohne weiteren eingesetzt werden, ohne gegen Datenschutz-Richtlinien zu verstoßen.

Wir sind ein innovatives Unternehmen aus Hamburg, dass eine langjährige Erfahrung in der Präsentation von Neubauprojekten hat. Unser Team besteht mittlerweile aus über 15 Mitarbeitern die uns in den Bereichen: Programmierung, Webdesign und 3D erstklassig unterstützen.
Wir könnten bereits schon viele tolle Projekt umsetzen und freuen uns auf neue Herausforderungen.
Ihre IE24 Team.

Name: AIGA Saint Louis
Description:
MISSION STATEMENT
AIGA St. Louis is a professional organization that promotes visual communications excellence and its value to the community.

ABOUT AIGA
AIGA is the place design professionals turn to first to exchange ideas and information, participate in critical analysis and research and advance education and ethical practice.

AIGA is the oldest and largest membership association for professionals engaged in the discipline, practice and culture of designing. Founded as the American Institute of Graphic Arts in 1914 as a small, exclusive club, AIGA now represents more than 16,000 designers through national activities and local programs developed by 48 chapters and more than 150 student groups.

AIGA serves as a hub of thought-leadership and activity for the designing community. The association is committed to stimulating thinking about design through conferences, competitions, exhibitions, publications and websites. AIGA inspires, educates and informs designers, helping them to realize their talents and to advocate the value of design among the media, the business community, public agencies and the general public. While AIGA was created to advance the design profession, its members now place a higher priority on AIGA's work in communicating the value of design to audiences outside the profession.

We’re also known for our specialist expertise in Microsoft Office templates and presentation systems, helping teams communicate clearly and confidently every day, not just at pitch time.

We work closely with our clients, often over many years, acting as calm, reliable creative partners who understand the bigger picture as well as the detail. If you value clear thinking, well-crafted design and a collaborative approach, you’ll feel at home working with us.

Based in Soho, working nationally and internationally.

Name: Penorama - Strategic Visual Communication
Description:
Welcome to Penorama 
Where complex messages become clear and engaging!

At Penorama, I believe that when people see the same picture, they understand each other better. A shared visual helps create a common language, align teams, and drive progress.

That’s why I specialize in visual communication - helping companies transform complex strategies, processes, and messages into simple, engaging visuals that people get and remember. Whether it’s through graphic recordings, animations, or visual summaries, my goal is to make your communication clearer, more impactful, and easier to act on.

How does it work?
I start with your situation: listening carefully, asking the right questions, and uncovering what truly matters. Then, I translate those insights into visuals that not only support understanding and discussions but also help people connect with the message and commit to the way forward.

What can you expect from this page?
 Insights on how visual communication makes strategies, change processes, and internal messages stick.
 Real-world examples of how companies use visuals to engage employees and drive alignment.
 Tips and inspiration on making complex topics simple and engaging.

I’m excited to share, inspire, and start conversations about how we can make communication work better visually.

 Ready to see how visuals can support your organization? 
Let’s connect

Name: Northwest College of Art & Design
Description:
Founded in 1982 by Craig Freeman as Northwest Art Center, NCAD has been since its beginning a specialized school of art. Originally located on the waterfront of Liberty Bay, Northwest College of Art & Design began its journey with a small student body and a two-year certificate program.

As the years went by the College grew in size and the demand for a degree program prompted the Founder to expand the curriculum. Today, NCAD continues its history of positive growth and change. In early 2017, the college purchased a building in downtown Tacoma, WA. Starting in September of 2017, Tacoma is the new home to NCAD.

Over the years, NCAD has maintained its mission to educate and prepare individuals for creative careers. We invite you to be a part of our exciting and challenging future.

The B.F.A. degree program in Visual Communication is 9 semesters 
(4.5 academic years) and is typically completed in 36 months. 
The program is considered a full time program. 

DOUBLE MAJOR COMBINATIONS 
IN THE B.F.A. DEGREE PROGRAM IN 
VISUAL COMMUNICATION
Graphic Design & Illustration 
Graphic Design & Interactive Design 
Graphic Design & Motion Design 
Entertainment Art & Interactive Design 
Motion Design & Interactive Design 

NCAD’s accelerated and highly structured sequential B.F.A. program does not lend itself to flexibility in terms of alternative scheduling. Instead, students’ schedules are set each term so they have access every semester to the classes needed to graduate on time.

Specialties
Graphic Design, Illustration, Interactive Design, Photography, Entertainment Art, Motion Design

Name: Pois Chiche Design
Description:
Pois Chiche Design c'est une équipe de stratèges créatifs basée à Lorient.
Notre métier : clarifier, créer et rendre utile. On conçoit des identités et des dispositifs de communication (print & digital) qui racontent juste, modernes, bien pensés, logiques et faciles à utiliser. L’objectif est simple : vous aider à grandir et à faire circuler ce que vous avez de meilleur.

Notre méthode : on écoute, on cadre, on creuse, on aligne enjeux business & expérience utilisateur, puis on dessine, prototype, mesure. Chez nous, le fond conditionne la forme - un bon design naît d’un travail de réflexion, de stratégie et d’une vraie pédagogie tout au long du projet (de musique et de chocolat aussi).

Nos clients sont variés (PME, marques locales, institutions, restauration, artisanat, culture…). Cette diversité nourrit la création et notre exigence de clarté.
Autour du noyau des #chiches, nous activons un réseau d’experts (SEO/SEA, développement spécifique, photo/vidéo, RP, impression...) pour composer l’équipe sur-mesure selon le projet et le budget.

Nos convictions (et notre façon de travailler)
	• Simplicité & exigence : aller à l’essentiel sans sacrifier la qualité.
	• Créativité joyeuse : des idées qui donnent envie d’agir.
	• Transparence & pédagogie : on explique, on outille, on transmet.
	• Sens du collectif : client, équipe, partenaires - même cap, même énergie.
	• Ancrage local : Bretagne dans le cœur, standards pros partout (on rêve en grand).

Nos outils pour faire la différence
• Stratégie & conseil (positionnement, plateforme de marque, plan d’actions)
• Identité visuelle (logo, chartes, territoires d’expression)
• Sites web (UX/UI, SEO-first, maintenance)
• Contenus & social media (lignes éditoriales, calendriers, campagnes)
• Édition & signalétique (magazines, brochures, PLV, wayfinding)
• Accompagnement long terme (pilotage com’ externalisé)

Envie d’un design utile et de résultats visibles ? Parlons-en.

Draws Studio is a creative company that specialises in live sketchnoting. Our team of talented artists is skilled at capturing the essence of any event by creating visually engaging illustrations that highlight key takeaways in real-time. 

Our live sketchnotes are perfect for virtual events, hybrid conferences, and internal company meetings. By graphically recording your message in an impactful and memorable way, we help you make a lasting impression on your audience.

We offer a range of services in addition to live sketchnoting. Our services include visual content creation, infographics, animated videos, and explainer videos. Our animated and explainer videos are perfect for breaking down complex ideas and procedures, generating hype for a product launch or special event, or inspiring action, such as making a purchase or donating. Meanwhile, our visual content and infographics are an excellent way to increase engagement, enhance comprehension, and simplify complex information, all while boosting brand awareness.

At Draws Studio, we have had the pleasure of working with a wide range of clients, including some of the biggest names in the industry such as Nike, Adobe, PayPal, AWS, Google Fiber, Google Chrome, DocuSign, Cloudflare, and more. We pride ourselves on our proven track record of delivering high-quality work that exceeds our clients' expectations.

Our services are designed to help you effectively communicate your message to your audience in a visually appealing and engaging way.

Name: ATypI: Association Typographique Internationale
Description:
ATypI (Association Typographique Internationale) is a mission-driven nonprofit membership organization dedicated to type and typography. Founded in 1957, ATypI provides a structure for communication, information, education, inspiration, innovation, and action in the international type community.

We not only preserve the culture, tradition, and history of type and typography, we also promote contemporary digital fonts and creators, encourage outstanding typography and typographic design, and publish resources and other materials on type and design.

We encourage innovation, inclusivity, sharing, and collaboration, and support those who are doing the same. We produce in-person, online, and hybrid conferences, workshops, seminars, and other relevant events.

Every four to six years, ATypI awards the Prix Charles Peignot for Excellence in Type Design to a designer under the age of 35 who has made an outstanding contribution to type design.

ATypI is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization incorporated in the State of California, USA.

Name: Bruno Porto Comunicação Visual
Description:
Having worked as graphic designer, educator and consultant since the 1990s, Bruno Porto (Rio de Janeiro, 1971) moved to Toronto in 2022. He currently is a PhD Researcher on visual communication aspects in Comics medium in the School of Humanities and Digital Sciences, Department of Culture Studies, at Tilburg University, in The Netherlands. Curator of the 12th and 10th Brazilian Graphic Design Biennials (Brasília 2017 and São Paulo 2013), as well as a dozen other graphic arts exhibitions presented in Brazil, China, Colombia, Germany, United Kingdom, Uruguay, Venezuela and Vietnam, his work has been featured in over 50 international publications and exhibited in the Americas, Asia, Africa and Europe.

He consistently takes part in design juries for international awards – such as iF Design Awards, Adobe Design Achievement Awards and the CLAP Awards on Graphic Design, Branding and Communication – and national project competitions held in Brazil. He has authored, co-authored and organized several books on design and communication, as well as contributed with numerous publications in Brazil and China. Having sat on the boards of divers Latin American and Brazilian design organizations, he was appointed Ambassador of Latin Design by the Latin Design Committee in Argentina, 2015, and is the recipient of the Brasil Design Award 2017 Honor “for the contribution that his work gives to Brazilian design, being a reference and spokesperson of the industry”. 

From 2012-2017 he was the program director of the Graphic Design course at Centro Universitário IESB, in Brasília, having also been a faculty member at the Raffles Design Institute (2006-2010) in Shanghai, China, and at Centro Universitário da Cidade (1996-2006) in Rio de Janeiro. He holds a Master's Degree in Communication (Universidade de Brasília), a Postgraduate degree in Marketing and Enterprise Management (Universidade Candido Mendes) and a Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design (Faculdade da Cidade).

Name: UK Clipping Path
Description:
UK Clipping Path is an online-based outsourcing firm specializing in product photo editing services, including clipping path, photo masking, background removal, color correction, and eCommerce photo editing services. Our company is based in the UK, and we have been in the business since 2010.

We strive to provide extraordinary image editing services such as creating clipping paths in Photoshop, background removal, ghost mannequin, shadow creation, and more globally. Our team of expert and skilled designers ensures that every client we work with gets a good service experience through us.  

As the demand for graphic works and image editing increases, we are continuously growing and improving ourselves to provide the best service possible. Our clients and customers are highly satisfied with our provided service to them, and we have had a good experience working for them as well. 

Our main focused service, what we are named after, clipping path, is a background removal technique from any photo or image and adding a white background to it. Also known as deep etching, it is usually a closed vector cut out from a 2D image mainly done in Photoshop by the pen tool.

Using the clipping path technique helps to change small or specific parts of any image, retouch photos, color change, remove background, shape, shadow, and more in a single image. 

The most important question lies in why our service is important to the client and why we are unique in trying to provide and give the best service, among others. In the present image editing industry, the clipping path method is currently the most popular and widely used editing service among businesses. This is because the clipping path is multifunctional and can greatly benefit the customer, helping them to reach out to potential buyers of their product.

Name: Leiautar
Description:
O Leiautar é um curso de imersão em design criado pela Itamara Ferreira.

O conteúdo é teórico e ensina os principais conceitos que todo designer precisa saber para começar a pensar como um profissional de verdade: Fundamentos, Gestalt, Semiótica, Cores, Tipografia, Hierarquia Visual, entre outras disciplinas.

Além de curso online, o Leiautar também é uma COMUNIDADE, um lugar seguro para o aprendizado. Alguns dos valores do projeto são: respeitar todos os níveis de conhecimento, valorizar a curiosidade, aproximar professores e aprendizes, defender a autenticidade e espontaneidade, estimular o senso coletivo, construir pontes e não cagar regras.

O curso existe desde 2016 no modo presencial e em 2020 teve sua primeira edição online.

Por visar o crescimento horizontal o Leiautar sempre traz aulas especiais com diferentes professores e desenvolve projetos internos em conjunto com os alunos.

Name: Jump Branding & Design Inc.
Description:
We Are Jump.

In 2004, we sat around a table and talked about what we wanted to be as an agency. Then we set out to execute. This many years later, we’re proud to say we’ve delivered.

We Have Big Ears.
The first step in solving any problem is understanding it. We spend a great deal of time up front getting to know our clients, and discovering why it is they’ve come to us. Sometimes they can articulate it clearly…other times we have to pull it out of them. We ask a lot of questions. Then we ask some more. But we never start to work on a solution until we’ve uncovered exactly what the problem is. And that starts with a healthy dose of listening.

We Keep Our Eyes On The Prize.
Communicating your brand essence. That’s why you call us. So that’s what we deliver. At every touchpoint, in every nook, cranny, and surface in your environment, and even in places you’re unaware of. We will articulate your brand in every medium, and in the process, find ways to extend it and more clearly define it. We’ll make your brand better than it was. It’s all we do.

We Know The Difference.
Between art and design. Between on strategy and simply creative. Between right and knocked-it-out-of-the-park awesome. We demand excellence in execution, and unsurpassed creativity. We don’t think outside the box, we destroy it and design a better one so we don’t have to. We see the world through your customers’ eyes and develop solutions that convert them from passive consumer to loyal brand ambassador. Because we know the difference between what is real and what is fake. And so do they.

Name: Ion Brand Design
Description:
Ion is a team of branding experts that collaborates with cities, communities and destinations to help realize their full potential through stakeholder engagement, brand strategy, design and tactical implementation. Formed in 1988 by David Coates, Ion has become one of Canada’s best known graphic design firms. 

Ion has earned hundreds of awards and been published in many internationally recognized design publications. The company’s 36 year track record is a testament to successful collaboration with clients and their stakeholders – some of who have been with the firm for decades. 

Ion remains a boutique firm by choice, believing that high level, personal client service is best provided by a focussed firm. One whose principals are actively involved at all levels of the company’s activities. 

Ion was the first graphic design firm in Canada to offer website design. In the ‘90s they developed their own website CMS software called Smallbox. This dynamic company has since been incorporated and now operates independently from Ion, although the firms often collaborate on projects. This exceptional software is used by cities, municipalities and other public and private sector organizations around the world. 

Believing in strong communities, David has served as National President of the Society of Graphic Designers of Canada (now Design Professionals of Canada) and made large contributions to both Canadian and international design communities. David has also served on other design and community executive boards while donating his time and design skills. 

Over the past decade, the firm has donated over $250,000 in fees to the community through its One Good Idea Sustainability Award. The award is granted to the organization with the best sustainability concept or business.

Vi får brands til at skille sig ud gennem digitale løsninger skabt med blik for den væsentlige detalje. Faktisk går vi usigeligt meget op i detaljer, fordi vi tror på stærke detaljer giver en desto stærkere helhed. Det gør vi bl.a. via Vokseværks egen kreative grundlov, som vi arbejder ud fra og ikke er blege for at hænge os selv op på: Vi stræber efter konstant at overraske og udfordre gennem en skæv tilgang, et nytænkende design med brugeren i centrum og en implementering, der understøtter det og giver værdi.

Kort sagt; vi styrker den visuelle grobund og vi vil udfordre(s) undervejs!

Name: Lycée Claude-Garamont
Description:
Notre établissement doit sa particularité au fait qu’il est le seul établissement de la région à proposer l’ensemble des formations de la chaîne graphique.

La chaîne graphique désigne l’ensemble des professions qui interviennent de la conception à la réalisation d’un produit graphique qui sera produit à de multiples exemplaires par un procédé d’impression ou qui sera diffusé via un support numérique. Les quatre maillons principaux de cette chaîne sont :
- La création qui se charge du développement du concept, de sa mise en forme en maquette et de l’étude de sa réalisation et qui se concrétise à Garamont par la filière BAC Pro AMA Communication Visuelle Pluri média et le D.N. Made.
- Le pré-presse qui s’occupe de la préparation de la forme imprimante et qui s’illustre à Garamont par la filière Bac Pro Réalisation de Produits Imprimés et Plurimédias (option A production graphique) et le BTS Études de réalisation d'un projet de communication.
- L’impression qui se charge de la production en série du produit et se traduit à Garamont par la filière Bac Pro Réalisation de Produits Imprimés et Plurimédias (option B produits imprimés offset et numérique) et le BTS Études de réalisation d'un projet de communication.
- La finition et le routage (F.P.I.R.) sont les dernières étapes de la chaîne graphique. En fin de parcours, les produits imprimés sont assemblés puis préparés avant d’être envoyés chez le destinataire. Ces techniques sont vues dans le Bac Pro Façonnage Produits Imprimés –Routage. Ce secteur est actuellement pourvoyeur de nombreux emplois spécialisés.
Production graphique, production imprimée et FIR font l’objet d’une seconde commune. Le choix définitif pour la filière se fait en fin de seconde. Le but est de favoriser un choix plus muri et de développer une certaine polyvalence nécessaire dans les métiers de la chaîne graphique.

Quelque soit la filière, l’équipe pédagogique du lycée Garamont vise l’excellence pour tous les élèves.

Name: Beeldprikkels
Description:
Beeldprikkels 
Strategie. Ontwerp. Impact

Wij denken verder dan vorm. De wereld verandert sneller dan ooit. Technologie, AI en maatschappelijke vraagstukken dwingen organisaties om zich steeds opnieuw uit te vinden. Juist dan is creativiteit geen luxe, maar een strategie.Beeldprikkels helpt merken en organisaties om met een frisse blik te kijken, richting te kiezen en betekenis te maken in verandering.

Wij zijn geen bureau dat alleen ontwerpt wij denken, duiden en vertalen. Vanuit inzicht en strategie naar ideeën die raken en ontwerpen die werken. Zo wordt communicatie niet alleen mooier, maar ook slimmer, menselijker en effectiever.

Onze aanpak
Wij geloven dat de kracht van vernieuwing begint bij anders kijken. Daarom combineren we creatief denken met strategisch inzicht. We onderzoeken, analyseren, ontwerpen en activeren altijd samen met jou en de doelgroep. 

Zo ontstaat werk dat verder gaat dan vorm:
* Heldere strategieën die richting geven.
* Slimme ontwerpen die verbinding maken.
* Concrete impact die voelbaar is in gedrag, beleving en resultaat.

Of het nu gaat om een merk, campagne of maatschappelijke opgave: wij helpen je om complexiteit eenvoudig te maken en ideeën te laten landen.

Mens x AI
Wij omarmen technologie, maar houden de mens centraal. AI versnelt, maar betekenis ontstaat nog altijd uit menselijke verbeeldingskracht. Wij gebruiken AI als creatieve motor, maar sturen met strategie, empathie en intuïtie. Zo bouwen we aan merken die relevant blijven in een digitale wereld met menselijke intelligentie als kern.

Beeldprikkels werkt op het snijvlak van strategie, design en (maatschappelijke) impact.We bouwen merken, ontwikkelen creatieve concepten en maken communicatie toegankelijk en inclusief. Altijd met dezelfde ambitie: ideeën laten werken, merken laten groeien, en mensen raken.

Cloud Gehshan Design is an internationally recognized environmental graphic design consultancy based in Philadelphia. We specialize in place branding, signage and wayfinding, and interpretive and interactive design. Our clients include cities and towns, universities, medical centers, heritage areas, parks, and public spaces.

Our work is designed to integrate seamlessly into the architecture and landscape—providing clarity and guidance without overwhelming the environment. Each design vocabulary is carefully developed after studying the place, its architecture and streetscape, and the client’s identity and mission.

Our expertise also extends to gateways, donor recognition programs, banners, and environmental enhancements. The Cloud Gehshan team brings a wide range of skills including graphic and industrial design, identity and map development, architectural renderings, model making, and symbol design.

XXIX is a design studio based mostly in New York City and Berlin. We’re a small team that helps people turn ideas into things.

Often those things are brands, products, and experiences (online & IRL) but we’ve also made data visualizations about prison reform, helped big tech companies improve their meeting culture, launched typefaces for global corporations, and very nearly put a giant pizza mural on Sunset Blvd.

We partner with people who are interested in new ways of doing things and are obsessive about quality. We’re as likely to work with first-time founders as with large teams, with artists as startups, to write code as we are to make a poster, to be as concerned about photography as usability. We like variety and new challenges. Our focus, then, is on answering briefs with unique and meaningful solutions.

Name: Studio Mast
Description:
Studio Mast is a Denver based branding design firm. 

To us, a relevant message is simple: an honest message. We aren’t particularly interested in persuasion, arm-twisting, or making something pretty for the sake of making it pretty. Beautiful ideas, whether world-changing, community-changing, or just day-changing, are inherently beautiful. We just want to give those the face and voice to match. An honest message that is worth being communicated will be, and should be, beautiful.

There are a lot of design firms, branding studios, marketing agencies, etc. We are not unique in our profession. So when you work with us, we aren’t only grateful, but excited. Excited to partner with you, learn about your goals, and figure out how to vividly and honestly relate them to your audience.

We love to trust our clients and earn our clients’ trust. We love to make friends with them along the way. We love to help our friends tell their stories. So, let’s be friends.

Name: Volume Inc.
Description:
Volume is a creative studio helping architects, developers, creative institutions, and forward-thinking companies to enhance the built world where people work, gather, learn, and play. We specialize in place-based identities, branded environments, exhibit programs, and other spatial activations.

We uncover and highlight the narratives embedded in these places, whether they are long-lost histories or present-day stories. We devise frameworks that invite people to ponder, reflect, and even participate. We design memorials in civic spaces, create identities for neighborhoods, insert poetry into corporate workplaces, program history lessons in public parks, and even teach sustainability in remote forests.

Our work is site-specific. It’s site-sensitive. Informed by local character—the history, landscape, people, function, and experience. Emerging from the place, whatever that “place” is—physical or virtual, civic or commercial.

Description:
Met Schetsfabriek help ik informatie duidelijk en simpel over te brengen in tekeningen

Trainingen en online cursussen zakelijk tekenen
Van een dagtraining om de basis van zakelijk tekenen te leren tot verschillende online cursussen: ik leer jou de kracht van tekenen voor je werk en ook prive. Om meer creativiteit te ervaren en duidelijk je verhaal te vertellen in simpele tekeningen.
Kijk voor een overzicht op https://www.schetsfabriek.nl/trainingen/

Incompany trainingen
Met een team collega's samen leren tekenen? Tof! Ik kom naar jullie toe en leer jullie hoe jullie tekenen kunnen inzetten in jullie werkpraktijk.

Visuals | praatplaten 
* Wil je jouw boodschap in één oogopslag overbrengen? 

Met een praatplaat help ik de kern van je verhaal in beeld te brengen. Ik geloof in de kracht van beeld. Want beelden zeggen veel meer dan alleen woorden én blijven veel beter hangen. Een krachtige en duidelijke manier om jouw boodschap te vertellen!

Live verslag in tekeningen 
Organiseer je een bijeenkomst of event dat je visueel wilt vastleggen met tekeningen? Ik help je graag. Ik teken digitaal op mijn iPad en vat de kern van een bijeenkomst in tekeningen. Leuke toevoeging én handig achteraf voor de aanwezigen. 

Training zakelijk tekenen
Picture your Power! Ik heb mijn eigen training zakelijk tekenen ontwikkeld. Ik leer je de basis van zakelijk tekenen en je gaat aan de slag met jouw persoonlijke doel óf je zakelijke (team)doel. Een inspirerende creatieve training waarbij je vooral zelf aan de slag gaat. Op open inschrijving of incompany. Kijk op mijn website voor meer informatie.

Volg mijn persoonlijke account, daar plaats ik regelmatig updates: https://www.linkedin.com/in/stefaniejansen/

Name: ARTSER
Description:
Artser is a benchmark Spanish company in the photoluminescent occupational health and safety signs market with an excellent track record spanning over 25 years.

Our wide and varied product range includes the following safety signs: fire safety signs, emergency and evacuation signs, emergency and evacuation maps, high intensity photoluminescent signs for tunnels, IMO signs, photoluminescent markings, occupational risk prevention signs (ORP), prohibition signs, mandatory signs, hazard warning signs, worksite signs, hotel signs, hospital signs, airport signs, information signs, AMYS regulation signs, edge protection and warnings, pipe identification labels, adhesive vinyl, etc.

Artser offers an extensive catalogue of safety and hazard pictograms to its customers, including those governed by the new ISO 7010 regulations.
Our safety signs are used everywhere, from public works to the private sector. Our distribution network targets our products at signage for local council authorities, hospitals and medical clinics, airports, universities and schools, hotel chains, tunnels and other road, rail and metro infrastructures, office blocks and shop chains, factories, sports facilities, mines, construction companies, shopping centres, ports and shipping companies, etc.

Name: Mykola Kovalenko Studio
Description:
Mykola Kovalenko is a famous Ukrainian graphic designer. 

He studied at the Kyiv State Academy of Decorative and Applied Art and Design named after Mykhailo Boychuk. 

Mykola Kovalenko has 20 years of experience in design. 

He runs his own design studio Mykola Kovalenko Studio.

Mykola Kovalenko is an honorary member of the Ukrainian Art Directors Club, a member of the Slovakian Art directors Club, a member of the Ukrainian Graphic Designers Association "The 4-th Block" and Czech Brno Biennale Designers Association. 

Won more than 150 awards at international design contests and festivals, including Red Dot Design Award (Germany), Mut zur Wut (Germany), Golden Drum (Slovenia), The European Design Awards (Greece), HOW Poster Design Competition & Awards (USA), Graphis (USA), LogoLounge (USA), BICeBé (Bolivia), WOLDA (Italy), Good 50X70 (Italy), ADI Design Award (China), International Poster Triennial in Toyama (Japan), IPBM (Mexico), International Poster Biennale in Warsaw (Poland), International Triennial "The 4th Block" (Ukraine), Ukrainian Design: The Very Best Of (Ukraine), Kiev International Advertising Festival KIAF (Ukraine), ADC*UA Awards (Ukraine), Golden Bee Global Biennale of Graphic Design (Russia), Identity: Best of the Best (Russia), Lahti Poster Triennial (Finland), Graphic Matters (the Netherlands), Poster Quadrennial Bardejov (Slovakia), Ecuador Poster Bienal (Ecuador) and others.

He often served as a member of the jury at international design festivals in Ukraine, Spain, Russia, Belarus and in other countries. 

Mykola Kovalenko regularly participates in international exhibitions. He also holds solo poster exhibitions in Ukraine, Slovakia, Poland and in other countries.

Mykola gives lectures and runs workshops on graphic design. His works have been featured in magazines and catalogues all over the world. 

Mykola Kovalenko is a creator of many international cultural and social projects

With a multidisciplinary team of design experts, AG operates internationally and produces work that includes diverse brand identities, products, logos, annual reports, packaging, websites, corporate loyalty programs, fintech products with global reach for clients such as national and international organizations, fabrication laboratories, educational centers, startups, small & large scale corporations.

AG’s identities, products and communications have received numerous awards of excellence – including including coveted distinctions at Art Directors Club of New York, Red Dot in Berlin, Dieline Awards, Pentawards, Marking Awards in Shanghai among others - while their work has been published in leading Design publications & platforms worldwide.

Name: Rajeev Graphics & Photography
Description:
Once upon a time in a bustling city, there was a visionary named Rajeev. With a passion for creativity and an eye for detail, Rajeev embarked on a journey to bring imagination to life through captivating visuals. And thus, Rajeev Graphics & Photography was born.

Rajeev Graphics & Photography is a small startup that offers a wide range of services, catering to the diverse needs of businesses and individuals alike. With expertise in graphic designing, photo editing, and photography, we strive to create stunning visuals that leave a lasting impression.

Our team of talented professionals combines technical skills with artistic flair to deliver exceptional results. Whether it's designing a website that stands out from the crowd, crafting a unique logo that reflects your brand identity, or creating visually appealing business cards and web banners, we have you covered.

At Rajeev Graphics & Photography, we understand the importance of a strong brand image. That's why we work closely with our clients to understand their vision, values, and target audience, ensuring that every design element aligns perfectly with their brand identity.

We believe that every project is unique, and we approach each one with dedication and creativity. Our commitment to excellence and attention to detail sets us apart, allowing us to consistently exceed our clients' expectations.

In a world driven by visuals, we embrace the power of storytelling through our art. We believe that every design, photograph, or carefully crafted website has the potential to convey a powerful message and evoke emotions.

So whether you're a start-up looking to establish your brand presence or an established business seeking to revamp your visual identity, Rajeev Graphics & Photography is here to bring your ideas to life. Let us collaborate, innovate, and create something truly extraordinary together.

Welcome to Rajeev Graphics & Photography, where creativity knows no bounds and imagination becomes reality.

Name: Flocon de plume
Description:
Flocon de plume est spécialisée dans la conception d’émotions graphiques. En perpétuelle quête de beauté et de poésie pour accompagner les moments les plus précieux de votre vie ou vos projets de communication. 

Son aspiration ? 
Collectionner les instants fugaces, les épingler comme des petits trésors, les transformer en souvenirs éternels.
Son inspiration ? 
La magie du quotidien comme source inépuisable de joie.

Que vous soyez professionnel ou particulier, Flocon de plume voyage dans votre univers, s’imprègne de votre histoire et s'investit pour vous aider à délivrer votre message.

Design graphique, photographie, décoration, dans chaque projet il y a… du rêve au bout des doigts, des palpitations, une sensibilité exacerbée et de la délicatesse en filigrane.

Sollicitez-moi, parlons de votre projet. 
→ bonjour@flocondeplume.fr 

╳ Instagram : flocon_de_plume
╳ Pinterest : @Flocon_de_Plume

Name: Colourwave Studio
Description: Colourwave Studio was set-up to promote not only print, but graphic and website design. We believe this empowers businesses by keeping all services under one roof to benefit from consistency in printing and marketing.

Name: K2 Design
Description:
We believe that great brands deserve the world stage.

Since 1988, we’ve been dedicated to crafting brands with global reach. With a team of eclectic talents, we deliver a full range of services bringing together strategy, creative insight, design and storytelling to deliver seamless experiences in the digital and the real world.

From branding and packaging to websites and integrated campaigns, our strategy-driven approach has earned us lasting partnerships and achievements that reach far beyond Greece.

Shaping ideas, connecting with collaborators and exploring art and culture is what keeps our work restless and impactful.

Name: Prêt à Report
Description:
Prêt à Report es una boutique de publicaciones personalizadas a medida, cuidada especialmente en su maquetación y diseño. Editamos productos digitales e imprimimos con la máxima calidad catálogos, folletos, dípticos, roll up, etc., para todo tipo de empresas.

También trabajamos para el particular realizando reportajes de aniversarios, bodas, viajes, los primeros años de tus hijos o familiares, proporcionando un recuerdo inolvidable.

Name: artifices_paris
Description:
Based in Paris, artifices is a film and photography post-production house specializing in fashion and beauty advertising.

Services include :

DIGITAL CAPTURE
capture workflow / digital operators / equipment configurations

RETOUCHING
creative retouching / editorial / commercial / social & brand content / e-commerce

ARTIFICES LAB
film-processing / film & print scanning / ink-jet printing / pre-press & proofing

Name: Darkav
Description:
Estudio especializado en el diseño de estrategias integrales de comunicación visual, orientadas a construir y consolidar identidades de marca sólidas, auténticas y competitivas.

A través de un enfoque estratégico y creativo, desarrollamos sistemas visuales coherentes, cuidando cada elemento que compone la identidad: desde el concepto rector de la marca, paleta cromática y tipografías distintivas, hasta imágenes, ilustraciones, iconografía, formas, texturas y patrones.

Estos recursos se articulan para representar fielmente la esencia y personalidad de la marca, garantizando su correcta aplicación en todos los puntos de contacto: redes sociales, sitios web, material corporativo, publicidad y productos promocionales.

Nuestro objetivo es crear marcas visualmente consistentes que comuniquen con claridad, generen confianza y se posicionen con fuerza en su industria.

Name: The Artworks Unlimited LLC
Description:
The Artworks was founded in 1986 and has always specialized in vehicle based graphics. We have a full staff of installers as well as graphic designers. We have won many awards for our Law Enforcement designs as well as been recognized by the business community for our design and skills. In addition to vehicle based graphics (wraps, decals, stripes), we produce banners, commercial outdoor signage, as well as yard signs. So, we can take care of most anyone's needs.
In late 2013, we moved to our new facility in Denver. We are in a 27,000 sq. ft. building just off I-70 and Peoria (3771 Revere St). This new facility allows room for us to grow as well as being closer to "Central Denver". 
Feel free to give us a call to see if there's anything that we can do to help. Also, if you are out of state, or out of the Denver Metro area, not to worry... We can produce and ship decals. We work with a nationwide group of installers, or could send our staff out just as easily.

Name: Principi
Description:
Som un estudi de disseny gràfic situat a Barcelona. Estem especialitzats en el disseny d’identitats visuals úniques i coherents amb la naturalesa de cada projecte i evitem repetir fórmules. Aconseguim que cada projecte comuniqui la seva essència de manera senzilla, honesta i directa.

Som l’Albert Porta i en Carlos Bermúdez. Treballem plegats des de 2016. L’any 2018 vam cofundar l’estudi Pràctica, dissolt a l’inici de 2024, i ara hem creat Principi. Que no és altra cosa que un nou inici per continuar fent tot allò en què creiem.

Name: UH Printers
Description:
UH Printers is a premier digital design and printing company, proudly incorporated with SECP and FBR. Since our inception in August 2017, we have been dedicated to transforming the aspirations of businesses, startups, and entrepreneurs into stunning, eye-catching digital art.

With over 17 years of industry experience, our CEO leads a talented team committed to delivering high-quality, innovative design solutions. Our portfolio includes collaborations with esteemed local and multinational companies such as Interloop Ltd, Sitara Group, Crescent Textile, and MTM Textile.

At UH Printers, we specialize in providing bespoke digital design and printing services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Our comprehensive range of services ensures that every project is handled with the utmost care and precision, from concept to completion.

Join us on our journey to redefine digital design and printing. Let UH Printers bring your vision to life with creativity, professionalism, and excellence.

Name: EPIC DESIGN & PRINT
Description:
For all your design and printing needs.

Design is the silent ambassador of a great brand.

Entendemos que para criar experiências positivas para as pessoas é preciso fazer um design humano - realista, pé no chão.

Elevate Your Business with Cutting-Edge 3D Services. From intricate 3D modeling and photorealistic rendering to captivating animations 
and immersive storytelling, we offer a comprehensive suite of solutions. Our team of skilled professionals brings your ideas to life, 
whether it's through a short story film in stunning 3D animation or creating immersive industrial training experiences. Showcase your

Let our 3D product visualization services give your business the competitive edge it deserves. Step into the future of visualization and 
unlock endless possibilities with our exceptional 3D services.

Name: Growth Octa
Description:
GrowthOcta | Creative and Business Support Services
GrowthOcta delivers affordable and professional solutions in:

2. Article and Content Writing
3. Hiring and HR Support

Our mission is to provide quality services at competitive prices, helping students, startups, and businesses focus on growth while we handle the creative and operational tasks.

Name: The Beacon Design Collective Inc.
Description:
The Beacon Design Collective Inc. is an award winning, carbon-negative creative studio that works with nonprofits that have an operating budget of $1M-$5M to increase their website’s donation rate by at least 25%. We guarantee these results by carrying out an in depth brand strategy, revamping their website, and providing resources to generate more web traffic. 

In addition to our results, what sets us apart is our craftsmanship and care. We are passionate about using our skills to make a positive impact in the world. 

Some clients we’ve worked with include: Doctors Without Borders Canada, Oxfam Canada, Working Families Party and Métis Nation Alberta, amongst others. We are currently welcoming one new nonprofit client every three weeks, with a special interest in clients from the USA.

Name: Dzignly
Description:
Dzignly is the #1 Creative-as-a-Service (CaaS) partner for startups-supporting over 30 dynamic brands in achieving award-winning design and creative solutions at scale.

Through our flexible design subscription service, marketing, and creative teams can break free from design bottlenecks, accelerate workflows, and enhance creative performance. We're proud to offer advertising creative, brand design, web development, and more services. By liberating our clients from the constraints of overtaxed in-house creative teams, inflexible agencies, and unreliable freelancers, we help them cut costs and empower them to move nimbly and scale effortlessly in response to market dynamics.

Name: tk design studio
Description:
Welcome to TK Design Studio
Unlock your creative potential with our tutorials and quick tricks for Adobe InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator, and After Effects. Whether you're a beginner or a pro, our page offers something for everyone.
Let’s create something amazing together!

Name: Bandurria Deco
Description:
Somos una gráfica de impresiones en gran formato (lonas, vinilos y distintos sustratos) para marcas, agencias de marketing y otras gráficas más pequeñas. 

Contamos con equipos de impresión en gran formato para materiales flexibles (todo tipo de lonas y vinilos, lienzo, cuerina, papeles). Imprimimos hasta en 320cm sin uniones, o lonas de mayor tamaño para vía pública soldadas.  Utilizamos tanto equipos con tinta ecosolvente como UV. 

Para todo lo que es vinilos y lonas contamos con equipos de colocadores. Ofrecemos servicio integral (diseño, impresión y colocación) para vidrieras, cartelería, punto de venta, marquesinas, etc.

También ofrecemos impresión directa sobre materiales rígidos, con tinta color y blanco. Imprimimos sobre PVC, PAI, plástico corrugado, foamboard y muchos más; para diversos usos como señalética, POP, exhibidores, movies y colgantes. 

También imprimimos en materiales semi-rígidos y rígidos para señalética, exhibidores, y formatos similares. Tenemos un equipo de trabajo muy consolidado y maquinaria de última generación, que nos permiten responder a producciones medianas o grandes en tiempos de producción muy cortos y sin perjudicar la calidad del producto.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma De Buenos Aires

Name: Aliens Design
Description:
A Aliens Design é uma empresa que atua na área de design gráfico, comunicação e no desenvolvimento de projetos de mídia digital e internet.

Criatividade é o que nos move todos os dias. E essa busca é incessante! Somos preto e branco. Somos todas as cores. Fazemos manualmente. Acreditamos na personalização. Nascemos com a internet, e isso nos tornou especialistas em "pixels". Amamos ser e estar "offline". Não somos focados em um único tipo de mídia ou projeto. Não temos um design autoral ou uma linha pré-definida. Temos a capacidade de nos adaptar ao meio, fazendo da comunicação de nossos clientes, a nossa comunicação. Imaginamos soluções criativas de maneira lógica para sua empresa. Equilibramos perfeitamente visão estratégica e coordenação operacional. Nossa relação comercial é baseada em princípios éticos e total transparência. Resumindo: estamos prontos, pode confiar!

Name: Oscar Design
Description:
We live in a world where visual communicaton is increasingly important as a device to create genuine understanding. At Oscar, we believe the right design can have a profound effect on an audience and create a meaningful response. 

Oscar helps brands, startup’s and individuals build smart visual tools that captivate, educate and inform. We create visuals that people want to share across multiple platforms. Our clients benefit from a hands on approach and dedicated creative partners who are ready to respond to the shortest of deadlines at affordable rates.

The Oscar UX design team collaborates with some of the region’s biggest and best digital brands. Our knowledge runs deep, with strong understanding of end-to-end customer experiences in ‘digital payments’, launching new features and optimising digital journeys. For Investor Pitches, and Product launches, we can help.

Name: C42D
Description: C42D is a top New York branding agency for early-stage companies. We build brands and websites to perform and drive results: connecting with audiences, inspiring investors, and eliminating the competition.

Name: Radiola Design & Publicidade
Description:
Criada em 2001, por uma audaciosa inciativa de três formandos em Comunicação na UnB, a Radiola foi concebida para trabalhar comunicação de forma inovadora, misturando elementos do design gráfico com uma linguagem publicitária direta e moderna.

Em pouco tempo, a Radiola passou a atender grandes clientes como APCEFs, CasaCor, Mitsubishi/NARA, Revista Vogue, SENAI, CNA, WWF-Brasil, Correios, Embratur, Caixa Seguros, entre outros.

Com criatividade e foco nos resultados, desafiando fórmulas prontas e tendências efêmeras do mercado, a Radiola propõe a integração dos vários setores da agência na condução do trabalho, procurando ser mais empírica, eficiente e dedicada à sua selecionada cartela de clientes.

Trabalhar com a equipe da Radiola é entrar em contato com uma publicidade de outra dimensão, onde o cliente é o centro do universo e a sintonia com seu público-alvo, nosso maior objetivo.

Name: Dewhaus
Description: Dewhaus is a brand transformation consultancy serving businesses both big and small in moments of change.

Name: Regular Practice
Description:
We help creatively ambitious people, through our unruly yet carefully considered approach to the construction of visual identities and brands, to re-orient into new forward thinking and progressive market positions.

By interrogating the creative and technical potential of every project, we turn limitations into benefits. Our aim is to discover a design rather than wrestle it into existence.

Regular Practice is led by Tom Finn and Kristoffer Soelling. The office and its way of working was initially approximated when the two met during their studies at the Royal College of Art in London.

Name: Agence Drôlement Nécessaire
Description:
L’Agence Drôlement Nécessaire – Agence conseil en conception et création spécialisée dans l’univers du luxe et de la beauté – accompagne les marques dans la réalisation de leurs outils de communication Print & Web. Notre appartenance au groupe d’impression PPA-ESPRINT fort de 30 ans d’expérience dans le secteur du luxe, nous permet d’être force de proposition de la création à la fabrication des supports publicitaires.

(Ré)Créativité, bonne humeur et réactivité sont nos mots clés !

Des créations audacieuses, en un temps record, et qui répondent à chacune de vos problématiques… c’est possible ! Parce que même si nous aimons avoir la tête dans les nuages, nous avons aussi les pieds sur terre et on a bien compris que votre deadline était hier !

Name: Les Artisans Cartographes
Description:
Les Artisans Cartographes est un groupement de cartographes-géomaticiens indépendants.
Passionnés par la cartographie, nous souhaitons que la représentation géographique puisse être à la portée de tous. Si nous sommes convaincus que la carte papier a toujours sa fonction, elle évolue cependant au gré des technologies et interagit de plus en plus avec les objets numériques. Nous travaillons donc aussi bien sur des supports traditionnels que des systèmes numériques. Nous concevons la carte comme un objet artisanal travaillé avec précision et savoir-faire pour répondre à un besoin unique.

Name: artgeist
Description:
Artgeist to polska firma o globalnym zasięgu, która powstała w 2004 roku z pasji do upiększania wnętrz. Dziś działa na całym świecie poprzez sklepy online prowadzone w kilkunastu wersjach językowych.

Artgeist oferuje kilkanaście tysięcy unikalnych wzorów. Nasze dekoracje trafiły do tej pory do ponad czterdziestu krajów świata, a liczba wysłanych zamówień do naszych Klientów przekroczyła ponad 1 milion sztuk! W naszej ofercie znajdują się obrazy, tapety, fototapety, plakaty, parawany, tekstylia oraz inne elementy wyposażenia wnętrz. Nieustannie kreujemy kolejne produkty, które poszerzają nasze portfolio. Dysponujemy nowoczesnym parkiem technologicznym, który zapewnia najwyższą jakość oferowanych produktów.

Nasze marki:
bimago https://www.bimago.pl/o-nas/o-bimago

About Artgeist
Artgeist is a Polish company with global scope of operation, founded in 2004 out of passion for decoration. Nowadays the company is present in 17 countries by means of on-line shops in 10 linguistic versions.

Products
Artgeist offers over a dozen thousand of unique patterns. Our decorations were sent to over fourty countries and the number of orders shipped to our customers has exceeded 1 million units! In our offer, one can find pictures, wallpapers, wall murals, room dividers, textiles and other elements of interior decoration. We keep on designing news products which broaden our portfolio. We have a modern machinery which guarantee the highest quality of our products.

BESTIMAGE  is building up its success day by day by offering professional solutions in communication activities to the valuable brands which are in need, by giving importance to corporate visual integrity and by being innovative and focusing on customer satisfaction service.

Bestimage Advertising, Bestimage Event and Bestimage Music Production brands that take place within the structure of BESTIMAGE, are shaping the new development with its future vision that will add new approach to the sector while creating new projects in order to provide today’s communication needs.

We're a dedicated team of creative design and development warriors, and we'd like to be your one-stop marketing resource. Give us a call. We'll take your projects on like they're our own, so you can focus on doing what you love.

Name: Motivational Quote
Description: It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English. Many desktop publishing packages and web page editors now use Lorem Ipsum as their default model text, and a search for 'lorem ipsum' will uncover many web sites still in their infancy. Various versions have evolved over the years, sometimes by accident, sometimes on purpose (injected humour and the like).

Name: CUCKOO IMAGES
Description: At Cuckoo Images, we combine creativity with professional expertise to bring your books, brands, and websites to life. Our services include book interior design, book cover design, logo creation, corporate identity systems, and custom website development. We work closely with publishers, authors, and corporate clients to ensure every project reflects their brand’s vision and meets professional standards. Located in Chennai, we provide print-ready and digital-ready solutions that are visually striking, functional, and tailored for long-term brand value.

Name: Socio Design
Description:
Socio Design are an experienced design and strategy agency based in South London. We help transform brands and businesses through carefully crafted design, and rigorous strategic thinking.

We create contemporary; brand identities, packaging solutions and digital experiences for a diverse range of premium brands, ranging from boutique start-ups to global businesses. Our minimal, reductive style of design allows clients to create clarity and transform their brands into powerful cross-cultural assets. This global appeal has lead us to work with discerning clients across a wide range of sectors and geographic locations. We currently work with organisations in London, Los Angeles, San Francisco, New York, Paris, Beijing, Melbourne and Dubai who continue to collaborate with us to deliver their creative and strategic ambitions. 

We approach every project with passion and dedication, applying meticulous detail, skill and craftsmanship to every stage of our design and strategic process. This tailored approach is driven by our clients aspirations and business objectives, allowing us to reduce the superfluous and deliver functional, enduring and effective design solutions. Our approach is informed by a combination of explorative and instinctive techniques coupled with sound strategic thinking. This contrasting perspective enables us to create consistent and measurable results whilst ensuring our work is well balanced and fit for purpose.

Name: Agence IMPAKT Scientifik
Description:
We are a science communication agency, and we transform intricate scientific concepts into engaging visual narratives.

By combining our expertise in design, digital world, and science, we help our clients to effectively convey their groundbreaking research and ideas to the world. We are here to accompany and advice you on your projects.

We also engage in providing you the tools to become confident in your science communication skills  explore our online courses here: https://formationimpaktsci.thinkific.com/

You need some examples of our work?
Have a look to our portfolio: http://www.behance.net/impaktscientifik

Let’s work together to make your Science IMPAKTful!

Name: SUBDESIGN
Description:
SUB est une agence de stratégie et de design de marque.

En anglais, le préfixe Sub renvoie à un aspect souterrain, ou "underground". Comme les cultures alternatives, il désigne ce qui remet en question la normalisation, la standardisation.

Chez SUB, nous pensons que la création doit aller au-delà d’un brief et d’une présentation formelle pour réunir le client et l’agence dans une expérience de travail collaborative.

Pour ce faire, nous avons développé depuis quelques années une méthodologie de création participative, the SUB_Way, qui a déjà séduit plusieurs de nos clients.

Elle est le pilier central de notre état d’esprit et de notre travail.

Venez découvrir notre méthodologie participative et vivre une expérience re_creative unique !

Suivez-nous sur les réseaux sociaux !
_ Facebook : Subdesign
_ Instagram : @subdesignagency
_ YouTube : SUBDESIGN Agency

Name: Zoomin Criativo
Description:
A Zoomin trabalha em cima de suas ideias, sejam elas embrionárias ou não. Nosso time está focado em dar vida e transmitir emoção através do vídeo, identidade visual e apresentações de impacto. 

Prender a atenção é um indicador-chave que está implantado em nosso DNA, pois só assim atingimos o resultado: A ACEITAÇÃO DO PÚBLICO-ALVO.

Name: Notan Studio
Description:
Founded in 2010, Notan is a high-end production studio focused in creating images and animations using the most advanced tecniques avaliable in the market. Our goal is not only to create beautiful and appealing images, but to contribute to the creative process helping our clients take their concepts to the next level.

CGI, Animation, Post-Production, Illustration and Creative Retouching are among our products. 
Over the past years our images have been awarded in some of the most important festivals in the world such as Cannes Lions, London International Awards, D&Ad, Clio Awards, One Show among others.

Name: 1977 Design
Description:
As a small, independent studio we work as closely as possible with the businesses we offer advice and expertise to. We help businesses better understand and communicate their brand to people.

Name: VirtualBuilding
Description:
Chez VirtualBuilding, nous croyons qu’un projet immobilier ne se résume pas à des plans : il se vit, se ressent et se partage bien avant sa construction. Notre mission est simple : transformer vos projets en expériences visuelles qui séduisent, rassurent et accélèrent la décision d’achat.

Depuis plus de 10 ans, nous accompagnons promoteurs, architectes et acteurs de l’immobilier dans la mise en valeur de leurs programmes résidentiels, tertiaires et retail. Grâce à la puissance de la 3D, nous créons des univers immersifs capables de déclencher la projection et d’augmenter vos ventes VEFA.

 Nos expertises clés

Perspectives 3D photoréalistes : des images précises et esthétiques, pensées pour séduire vos clients.

Films et animations 3D : raconter une histoire, créer une émotion, donner du rythme à vos lancements.

Visites virtuelles immersives : permettre aux acquéreurs de se projeter dans leur futur logement.

Maquettes interactives et solutions digitales : outils connectés et ludiques pour vos espaces de vente et événements.

Identité visuelle VEFA : supports print & digitaux pour une communication cohérente et impactante.

 Notre différence : nous ne faisons pas de la 3D “pour la 3D”. Chaque image, chaque film, chaque support est conçu comme un outil de communication stratégique, pensé pour vos objectifs commerciaux. Nous combinons créativité, réalisme et efficacité marketing pour vous offrir plus qu’un visuel : une expérience qui fait la différence.

Avec une équipe passionnée, réactive et à l’écoute, nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos clients afin de respecter délais, budgets et ambitions. Notre accompagnement ne se limite pas à la production : nous vous conseillons pour que chaque contenu serve au mieux vos ventes et valorise votre image de marque.

Name: Atelier d'art Métamorphoze. Fresque, signalétique, vitrophanie, mobilier et aménagement 360°
Description:
+ de 320 succès en France et à l'international : Groupe Volvo, Chu Dunkerque, Banque Palatines, Compagnie des Alpes, Arkane, Mutuelle des motards, Stade de foot du Racing club de Strasbourg...

L’atelier d’art mural Métamorphoze est l’un des plus célèbres pionniers français du muralisme contemporain monumental. Il crée des concepts de décoration artistique à 360° en intégrant art mural, signalétique, vitrophanie et conseils en aménagement d'espace.

Il met l’art au service du design, de la décoration et des émotions. Fresques géantes XXL, toiles peintes démesurées, oeuvres poétiques, poèmes intimes, signalétiques artistiques-contemporaines-originales, vitrophanies sur mesure… elles investissent tous les lieux, tous les espaces et créent une identité graphique poétique, humaine, unique, architecturale.

Sous la direction artistique de Franck Blériot, street-artiste et peintre de renom avec + de 300 oeuvres installées à travers le monde, l’atelier d’art mural Métamorphoze installe un dialogue entre monumentalité, émotivité et intimité.

Name: Jolby
Description:
Jolby is a creative studio that makes for the better. We do this through design, illustration, and thoughtful creative solutions.

We look for the potential in every idea, every project, and every person. We don’t believe that there’s a “right” or “cool” way of doing things – but there is a Jolby way. We look at the world with wide eyes; soaking up not just what is, but what could be. We sift through the mundane, the average, the lackluster and we find the gold. We nurture, incubate, and feed our ideas until something magical happens. We see restrictions as challenges and roadblocks as jumping-off points. We say “yes and...” and we always Ride the Weird.

Our studio is selective in the projects we take on and are thoughtful about the ways we work. We love to partner with those who share this optimism. Where we work is fun, playful, and inviting. We share our bright outlook on the world through community events and well thought-out creative solutions. At Jolby, there is no expectation of perfection and ego doesn’t get a seat at the table. Name: R2 design
Description:
R2 is an award-winning studio specialised in graphic identity, editorial and environmental design, with a strong focus on theatre, contemporary art and architecture. Created by Lizá Defossez Ramalho (Troyes, France) and Artur Rebelo (Porto, Portugal), the Porto-based studio has secured international recognition for its exhibition-based pieces and installation work, and produces visual identities, poster design, way-finding systems, web design and motion projects for cultural institutions, museums and other commercial clients.

Founded in 1995, the studio uses its profound knowledge across different media, formats and applications. Be it a museum signage system or the façade of a 19th century church, the studio works according to a singular yet multi-dimensional vision. Beyond these forms, their work also extends to teaching, research, publishing, and public interventions.

R2’s institutional collaborators include the Lisbon Architecture Triennale, Serralves Museum, Museum of Art, Architecture and Technology, Berardo Museum and Gulbenkian Foundation. It has also worked with Phaidon and other design-focused editorial projects. R2 has received awards from the Brno Biennale, Chaumont Festival, International Society of Typographic Designers (UK), the Society for Environmental Graphic Design (US) and the International Poster Triennial (Tayoma, Japan. It won European Design Agency of the Year in 2014 (European Design Awards).

The first Portuguese designers to join the Alliance Graphique International in 2007, R2 organised the AGI Open and AGI Congress in Porto, 2010. Some of the studio’s pieces are held in international collections such as the Musée des Arts Decoratifs, Paris, Heritage Museum, Hong Kong and Museum für Gestaltung, Zürich.

Approach: Experimentation, research, and constant dialogue are crucial to R2’s design approach, with solutions found through a rigorous critical thinking and a sense of plurality. Its process is based on a content and concept-driven methodology unrestrained by space, material, means or dimension. Ramalho and Rebelo take advantage of the characteristics of each medium, with in-depth knowledge and self-initiation key to their methodology – be it on paper, screen or even concrete. Form is bound to concept without the neglect of either.

Though it is informed deeply by the fields of contemporary art and architecture, the studio’s thinking reveals a consciousness of design history and the vernacular. Typography is prized for its structural nature, transversal forms are celebrated with a rigorous concern for balance, simplicity and restraint. Each project is engaged with for its uniqueness.

➋ Quality Control – Meeting all specs is the priority. An Agency must present posters, presentations or web portals to their clients with confidence. Your design firm has to have a real quality control process to ensure your reputation stays intact.

By partnering with Creative MediaWorks, you gain a team with extensive Life Science experience who use the latest technologies and best practices. We are ever mindful of your needs, your goals, and your end-users. Our team takes a user-centric approach, delivering to spec and on time.

Name: HOOPP / donne vie à la maquette physique
Description:
Chez HOOPP, nous réinventons la maquette physique.
Fini l’objet lourd, figé et coûteux : nos maquettes sont légères, connectées et interactives, conçues pour donner vie à vos projets tout en s’adaptant à vos usages.

Notre vision : faire de la maquette un outil moderne, agile et accessible, qui va bien au-delà de la simple représentation architecturale. Grâce à la réalité augmentée et aux contenus digitaux associés, chaque maquette devient une expérience immersive et pédagogique pour vos clients, partenaires et usagers.

 Nos services

Maquettes physiques légères et durables : réalisées en matériaux biosourcés, transportables facilement.

Solutions interactives : QR codes, réalité augmentée et accès mobile aux contenus 3D (perspectives, films, visites virtuelles).

Outil de vente et de médiation : idéal pour espaces de vente, salons, expositions et concertations citoyennes.

Expérience nomade : une maquette qui voyage avec vous, de vos bureaux à vos événements.

Prix maîtrisés : un investissement optimisé, sans compromis sur la qualité ni l’effet “waouh”.

 Notre différence
Chez HOOPP, la maquette n’est pas figée : elle est évolutive et connectée. Nous combinons savoir-faire artisanal et innovation digitale pour offrir un outil à la fois concret et immersif, qui répond aux attentes des promoteurs, architectes et collectivités.

Avec une approche durable et créative, nous redonnons à la maquette sa place centrale dans la communication et la commercialisation des projets immobiliers. Loin d’être un simple objet décoratif, elle devient une plateforme d’expérience, capable de séduire, d’expliquer et de convaincre.

Name: Jørgen Windelev A/S
Description:
Jørgen Windelev A/S, founded in 1960, is the world leading company in Laser Engraved Plates for the dry-offset industry. We are proud to supply customers at all continents, in 55 countries world-wide. Our customers are producing and printing cups, containers, tubes and pails in plastic and aluminium cans for beverage and beers. 

Did you know that when you are using our printing plates it saves you up to 25% ink?
The colour separations and DLE Laser Engraved Plates we produce, ensures our customers photorealistic images on their products - and save 10-20% ink at the same time. Follow us on Facebook and get great information about what we do, how we do, and the benefits our customers get.

Our Prepress Technicians
Our highly specialized graphic experts produce a remarkable, photo-realistic picture quality throughout the production process. 
The employees’ ability to colourseparate both text areas and detailed images makes all the difference between the decent result and our results – which are clearly brighter and strikingly rich in details. 
Colour separation, colour management and graphic art work, provides in short an outstanding result that our customers benefit from.

Digital Contract Proof
With our Contract Proof system you get a color consistent proof of the end result, so you can easily balance the expectations of the proof to the finished job. The proofs are printed re-productions, performed with our finely calibrated large-format printers.
We offer print on both transparent-, ALU- and White-background.

Ink Saver
The idea originally sprung from the need to solve the problem of contamination at the decorator and ink station for 2 piece can printing and at the printing machine for tubes, cups and buckets. That became a succes immediately. With our technologie you can save up to 25% ink when printing up to 2000 cans per minute.

- modern flat graphics... and many more!

Welcome to infoDiagram.com

OUR STORY
Do you remember those awful presentations you had to sit through? 
Do you remember a training or workshop without key visualizations to help you understand the topic? We do! 
And that motivated us to simplify the content. 
While creating custom presentations for various business clients, we noticed how communication improves when a picture is shown instead of long descriptions. And that’s how infoDiagram was created, the idea of three friends, Peter Zvirinsky, Marcin Trofimiuk and Izabela Zvirinska, all passionate about visual communication, came true.

EXPERIENCE
Hundreds of clients trusted us already. Among them, you can find companies like Allianz, Volkswagen, Heineken group, institutions like the Embassy of Czech Republic, TEDx Warsaw and many professionals from around the world.

Name: 100 Archive
Description:
The 100 Archive is a platform for design in Ireland, founded in 2012 by the communication design community. At the core of our activity is the publication of 100 notable projects selected through an annual open call. These yearly archives contain work from the ever broadening area of communication design (graphic, editorial, type, brand, digital, motion…) across a range of applications: from flyers for a club night to international corporate rebrands and from identities for small businesses to campaigns for major social movements.

As well as capturing contemporary communication design, we publish articles, produce events and deliver projects that interrogate design’s impact on the world and look at where design in Ireland is now in order to establish where it’s going in the future. We partner with designers, professional bodies, government agencies and national institutions to reinforce the importance of design in life, society, commerce and culture and to build engaged audiences for design in Ireland.

Contact
Whether you’d like to learn more about the 100 Archive, want us to publish your article or want to host an event together, please get in touch. We are always open to new ideas, new opportunities and new collaborators.

onehundredarchive@gmail.com
