Name: Bug Agency
Description:
Le laboratoire de l’agence BUG dédié à l’innovation de rupture et à l’identité numérique des marques.

À l'ère du numérique, succession d'innovations de rupture, la marque se réinvente. Conçue à l'origine pour être vue par des humains, appliquée à des produits palpables, elle est désormais interprétée par des machines qui la décodent pêle-mêle pour d’innombrables acteurs, de très près à très loin, dans toutes les langues, tous les contextes, en mode synchrone ou asynchrone. La remise en question est totale: design, packaging, transmission des valeurs…c’est l’identité numérique dans sa totalité qu’il faut concevoir.

Pour anticiper et mesurer l'impact de ces ruptures sur les marques, BUG propose ses premières rencontres BUG Lab, en collaboration avec l'observatoire Tebaldo sur des sujets brûlants tels que : le papier électronique, la réalité augmentée, le très haut débit, assistants personnels, autant d'innovations qui vont changer la stratégie des marques à jamais. 

Le BUG Lab est un rendez-vous destiné à anticiper les innovations de rupture pour mieux les maîtriser et insuffler une culture et une dynamique d’innovation aux équipes dans une démarche collaborative et mutualisée.

Name: Marchés Publics Équitables
Description:
L’appel d'offres ou l’Avis d’appel public à la concurrence (AAPC) est une mise en concurrence par l'acheteur public pour répondre à une dépense publique. L'esprit premier d'un appel d'offres est le souhait, louable, de dépenser correctement l'argent public, c'est-à-dire nos impôts.

L'un et l'autre doivent proposer des règlements équitables et respectueux du travail, de l’expertise et la propriété intellectuelle des auteurs. Ils sont souvent lourds et plus coûteux à organiser que la recherche puis la sélection de designers après l’examen de leurs sites Internet, leurs qualifications, leurs références et leurs portfolios.

La plupart des appels d’offres ne se justifient pas. Le commanditaire public peut choisir librement un designer dans bon nombre de cas et, il n'est pas tenu d’exiger une étude d’esquisse ou d’avant-projet pour ce faire.

Quand la fourniture de ces éléments est nécessaire, elle doit indemniser correctement les jours de travail pour être traitée sérieusement par le professionnel. Quelle loi exigerait un travail gratuit ?

Habituée à gérer la communication de vos évènements et de vos salons, contactez-moi pour des kakémonos, stands parapluie, drapeaux, publicité 4x3m, etc.

• UNE STRATÉGIE DIGITALE •
Avec mes partenaires experts, nous définissons une stratégie digitale, des funnels d'acquisitions, des leads magnets, etc. Parce qu'un livre blanc sur LinkedIn peut être aussi efficace que du Google Adwords vers une landing page !

• UN SITE INTERNET •
Je crée votre site web, vitrine ou e-commerce, entièrement personnalisé, lié à votre image (UI design) et responsive, en partant d'une page blanche (ou plutôt d'un PSD vierge). Ici, il n'y a pas d'achat de template/modèle (sauf sur demande) !

• QUI A DU TRAFIC •
Puis avec mes partenaires nous définissons les leviers d'acquisition les plus adaptés : référencement naturel (SEO), payant Adwords (SEA), les réseaux sociaux, etc. et mettons en place les canaux jugés prioritaires.

• ET QUI CONVERTISSE •
Avoir un site c'est bien, un site visible c'est mieux, un site qui convertisse c'est ESSENTIEL ! En 2021, il n'est plus envisageable d'avoir un site qui ne vous apporte pas de leads qualifiés grâce à l'union d'un bon trafic et de l'UX design.

Name: Outsource Experts Ltd
Description:
Have you ever experienced the power of digital native photo editing?

Pictures can be powerful no doubt. But there are only few companies that can make a good picture look great. Consider Outsource Experts BD, which came as a silent revolution in the competitive business of photo editing services. Our company works from Dhaka, Bangladesh with a registered office in United Kingdom. 

Our background

Outsourcing Experts is an online in house graphic design company, which offers IT based solutions to its customers 24 by 7. It is an in house graphic studio, which works day and night to give its customers the best and affordable design solutions. The company offers an array of services, which can be categorized under Image Editing, Graphic Design and Data Entry. 

When we entered the arena our niche areas were well defined. The vision of the company focused on the grey areas which many other online photo-editing firms did not value much. Name: Freelance Graphic Designer & Singer/Songwriter/Musician
Description:
Graphic Designer for print, web, logo, murals & signs

Connie Fisher trained as a graphic artist/designer while working for Playboy & Oui Magazines and Vogue-Wright Studios in Chicago. After moving from Chicago, she freelanced her art and design skills in the San Francisco, Tacoma/Seattle, and Phoenix areas.

Connie has designed and produced a wide range of printed materials; including books, catalogs, brochures, newsletters, logos, letterheads, posters and ads. Her illustrations have been featured in numerous books and magazines.

Connie paints murals, stage-sets and wall graphics. She also designs and fabricates sand-blasted and painted wood signs for interior and exterior use and designs lettering for windows and displays in vinyl and paint.

Connie creates her graphics in Photoshop, InDesign, Dreamweaver, and with pen, ink, paint and brush.



Original & World music

Connie Lee Marie Fisher sings many genres of world music, featuring the traditional Celtic music and a collection of the traditional music of the World: India, Bulgaria, Hungary, Romania, Greece, England, Spain, Africa, Tibet, the Middle-East, Native America and the cedar flute.

Connie’s ethereal vocals alternate between love songs, sea songs, bawdy ballads, traditional ballads, the haunting melodies of her cedar flutes, and her original songs inspired by her study of world music.

The magical blend of Connie’s voice & guitar captivates the audience with a lush soundscape, while transporting them to a time of long ago...

Estrada Design is a Graphic Design Company. Created twenty years ago by the recent National Design Award Manuel Estrada, it has worked for Spanish main companies such as Repsol,  Gas Natural, Metrovacesa, Alianza Editorial, Casa de Alba, ICEX, Carmencita, Persán or Patrimonio Nacional. It also recently won the contest called by Cortes Generales of Spain for the design of the 40th anniversary of the Spanish Constitution. 

With offices in Madrid and Miami, it has a team of 17 professionals that fully guarantees the quality of the creative proposals. It is specialized in corporate identity in every way, from the analysis of the company situation to the creation of logos, company names, branding, development of visual identity programs and all the requirements for a firm to accomplish its identity. 

Manuel Estrada’s work has been awarded in 2017 with the National Design Award granted by the Spanish Ministry of Economy and Industry. This National Award was recognizing his intense professional labor, and the “extraordinary, resolute and rigorous capacity” to accomplish different designing projects. He has also been awarded with an Art Directors Club of Europe Diploma, a LAUS Award, three different Spanish Association of Design Professionals Awards and an “a! Diseño” magazine Excellence Award.

Manuel Estrada has exhibited his work across the globe: Helsinki, Berlin, Tokyo, Lisbon, Miami, New York, Chicago and different Spanish cities. He has given courses on Design at the Universität der Künste in Berlin, the New World School of the Arts in Miami and Aalto University in Finland. He is currently Chairman of DIMAD, Madrid Design Foundation, and Executive Chairman of the Ibero-American Design Biennial.

Name: ARCHIGRAFO Digital images
Description:
ARCHIGRAFO è un'agenzia di esperti nella visualizzazione, che si occupa di grafica e progettazione editoriale nell’ambito dell’architettura, dall’ideazione alla stampa.
Con oltre 10 anni di esperienza, ARCHIGRAFO ha maturato competenze e know-how tali da garantire un servizio di alto livello nella comunicazione del progetto, con professionisti specializzati in modellazione tridimensionale, rendering e formazione.


ARCHIGRAFO is a Venice-based multidisciplinary creative agency with a team of architects specialized in computer graphics and editorial projects.
With more than 10 years experience, ARCHIGRAFO developed expertise and knowledge to provide a full high-quality service in the communication of the project, with experts in 3D modeling and rendering, CG education and editorial projects from concept to final print.

Name: Les Muses
Description: Les Muses is a French startup specialized in high quality and eco-friendly mural designs (wallpaper, window stickers, signage) for public and private organizations. All our designs are produced inhouse, either for custom projects or for product lines we develop ourselves. layouts… we do it all, and it’s all made in France. We are convinced that art and technology go hand in hand, and combine traditional and digital techniques to create 100% tailor-made and personalized designs. We make sure to fully understand the spaces we work with : their histories, their uses and their users.. That is how we can create functional and unique designs with positive impacts. From design to installation, we take care of translating all these elements in an artistic yet practical way. We are particularly selective regarding the suppliers we work with; we collaborate with local companies and only use materials which produce no impact on the environment while also meeting the highest standards of quality. You can find all the information about who we are and what we do on our website: https://maisonlesmuses.com

Name: Artfab India
Description:
Our association with global signage experts allows us to infuse cutting-edge technology, design trends, and best practices from around the world into our projects. This synergy empowers us to create signage solutions that go beyond conventional boundaries, leaving a lasting impact on audiences and stakeholders alike.

Innovation and Technology:

Innovation is the cornerstone of our approach at Artfab India. Embracing the latest advancements in signage technology, we continuously push the boundaries of creativity and aesthetics. We blend artistry with technical expertise to craft signage that not only captures attention but also conveys brand messaging with striking clarity.

Customer-Centric Approach:

Our clients are at the heart of everything we do. We place great emphasis on understanding their unique visions and objectives, ensuring that our solutions align perfectly with their brand identities and goals. Our commitment to transparency, open communication, and delivering projects on time and within budget has earned us unwavering trust from our clients.

Sustainability:

With a deep sense of responsibility towards the environment, we strive to incorporate sustainable practices into our projects whenever possible. From using eco-friendly materials to optimizing energy-efficient lighting solutions, we are dedicated to minimizing our ecological footprint.

At Artfab India, we are not just in the signage business; we are in the business of creating memorable brand experiences. Our passion for excellence, penchant for innovation, and dedication to client satisfaction drive us to raise the bar in the signage industry continually.

Let us partner together to transform your brand's visual identity and make a lasting impression across the vast landscape of India.

Name: Groupe Gedone

Name: Reframme Studio
Description:
Estúdio e produtora de filmes e imagens 3D para o mercado imobiliário de alto padrão.

Nosso olhar traduz o que ainda não foi dito — transformando informações técnicas em experiências visuais que emocionam, provocam e permanecem.

Através de imagens, filmes e experiências interativas, revelamos o sentir de cada lançamento. Trabalhamos em parceria com incorporadoras e escritórios de arquitetura, sempre com respeito à essência do projeto e sensibilidade ao que ele deseja comunicar.

Mais do que realismo, buscamos sentir.
Mais do que representar, buscamos despertar.

Cada entrega carrega direção, curadoria e afeto — composições que respiram no tempo certo, com a luz certa, no silêncio necessário para que a emoção aconteça.

Nosso processo é conduzido com escuta, clareza e presença. Acreditamos que humanizar não é suavizar — é olhar com profundidade, compreender contextos e respeitar intenções.

Atendemos de forma personalizada porque cada parceria é única, e cada projeto carrega um universo que merece ser revelado com verdade.

Porque para nós, não é apenas sobre realismo.
É sobre sentimento.

Name: Villae - Creative Studio
Description:
Founded in 2010, Villae is an independent and creative studio focused in graphic design. We are located in a small town at the edge of Douro River, Portugal, that’s booming with potential. Our multidisciplinary team is composed by visionaries and makers, committed to discovering practical and innovative solutions that fit your needs. In our practice we believe that the key to success resides in coloring outside physical and imaginary lines.

As printing enthusiasts we are prepared to advise our clients about the best choice of materials and printing techniques that create first-rate solutions. We are process experts, from creation to production.

As a team we are committed to an environmentally friendly design practice with the use of sustainable materials and techniques. From start to finish, every part of the process ensures that both our clients but also mother earth is happy.

Our clients aims and desires combined with our innovative approach might materialize in different forms during the creative process. With the use of  ink or vectors, paper or pixels, typography and images, textures and space, we solve communication and design problems. Always maintaining a close connection with each of our clients, we will handle each deliverable with extreme care.

We like to work with a wide range of clients and in partnership with others, wherever they are. The key factors that ensure the quality of our products are our desire to face new challenges and our willingness to step out of our comfort zone. Villae, design without borders.

 Located in Madina, Accra, we proudly serve clients in Adenta, East Legon, Spintex, Tema, and across Ghana.

Name: Kaligraf Packaging Production
Description:
Studio Kaligraf – Your Trusted Partner in Packaging Excellence!
Founded in 1994 by Miho and Tamara Karolyi, Kaligraf stands as a beacon of expertise in the ever-evolving realm of prepress services, specializing in the art and science of packaging production. Our journey has been intertwined with the dynamic advancements in prepress technology, propelling us to become the go-to authority for clients in the food, chemical, pharmaceutical, tobacco, and related industries.
At Kaligraf, we excel in the intricacies of crafting packaging solutions, meticulously overseeing every stage of the process. Our adept management of complete projects is characterized by a profound commitment to sustainability, environmental considerations, and the optimization of project costs.

OUR SERVICES & PRODUCTS

Consultation: We guide our clients through the early development phase, offering insights that navigate potential obstacles, ultimately saving valuable time and resources.

Prepress: With an acute understanding of printing technology, substrates, individual print characteristics, and machine profiles, we craft flawless prepress files, seamlessly transitioning to the printing stage.

Webcenter: Our powerful web-based platform empowers clients to actively participate in ALL stages of packaging production, overseeing preproduction specifications, approvals, and the entire project life cycle.

3D Models (virtual mockup): Each piece of packaging comes to life with a 3D model, available in 3D PDF format for compatibility with Acrobat Reader.

Real 3D Models (tangible mockup): We produce realistic tangible models for all types of packaging, allowing for a precise representation of materials and colors well in advance of production.

Shrink Sleeves: Proactive compensation for artwork considerations during the forming process ensures a seamless design transition.

Photorealistic Illustrations: Merging photography and digital post-production, we create high-quality images t

Name: Sovereign State
Description:
Sovereign State is an idea consultancy specializing in brand strategy, design & development. We build LIVING BRANDS that are relevant, resilient and connected to their stakeholders. By continuously engaging with cultural, consumer and competitive inputs, we enable brands to be adaptable in an ever evolving landscape.

We believe the strongest organizations understand that their brand is part of a living ecosystem. And that the health of their brand is defined by the health of the larger system of which they are a part. What is in the system? Well your customers to start, but also competitors, trends and employees. These are all parts of the larger system and work together to support or hinder your brand.

At Sovereign State, we build LIVING brands that don’t need to be redesigned constantly. They are uniquely designed to grow and provide increasing economic and customer value over time.

To remain RELEVANT, your brand needs to be ACTIVE, generating ideas and opportunities for your business and community.

RESILIENCY is key. To be resilient your brand needs to be an ADAPTIVE and VITAL part of a larger ecosystem. It should be flexible, with brand parameters that evolve with changes in the system.

The brand must also be CONNECTED to its customers and its category. By thinking HOLISTICALLY about your brand presence across all customer and lifestyle touchpoints, our solution will engage and reward stakeholders across their journey with your brand.

Name: Appartement 303
Description:
C’est en 2012 que Julien Jobard lance son studio de création graphique et de communication située à Metz, qu’il nomme Appartement 303 en référence à son domicile personnel (3ème étage, appartement n°3) !

Si le studio s’est particulièrement impliqué dans de nombreux projets d’entreprises régionales (Inspire Metz, Docapost Applicam, Xtramile…), il a également fidélisé une clientèle extra-locale (Chaussea, Cora, Bouygues Immobilier…). C’est sa créativité et ses conseils avisés qui ont contribué au développement constant de sa clientèle.

*Ses valeurs : ouverture d’esprit, convivialité et disponibilité envers les clients et partenaires afin de créer des relations de confiance solides et durables.

*Sa force : un réseau de complicités tissées au fil des années et au gré d’expériences nouvelles et enrichissantes dans des univers pluriels, notamment grâce à ses compétences en design graphique.

*Son ambition : créer, conforter et accroître la notoriété de ses clients.

Aujourd'hui, Appartement 303 est un studio de design graphique fort des compétences de son équipe, de ses partenaires et de la diversité de ses clients et réalisations.

Dans son évolution, il a su se remettre en question mais également rester fidèle à son credo qui l’anime depuis sa création : la véritable source de valeur ajoutée c’est la créativité, le concept, l’idée… qu’il faut sans cesse traduire en image et en mots. Et il n'oublie pas que le design doit être sur mesure, performant, créatif, original…

Appartement 303 répond aujourd’hui à l’ensemble des besoins en communication des entreprises, institutions… : 

* identité visuelle (logo, flyers, brochures…)
* visibilité (sites internet - design & création -,  e-commerce, applications mobiles...)
* notoriété (visibilité print & digitale…)
* réputation internet (veille stratégique, réseaux sociaux...).

Name: SocialDesignZine
Description:
Sdz is a daily updated information blog published by the Italian graphic design association (Aiap). It is online since 2003 and edited by Gianni Sinni and Andrea Rauch. Sdz's main aim is to offer an open discussion platform on the social responsability of designers, combined with ideas and opinions related to everyday life and facts.

The designer's ability to intervene on the values of our society is not confined to his/her works that may have an impact on the social environment; it must be part of his/her daily activities. Therefore, the themes which are discussed on our blog include a wide range of issues from visual communication to cartoons, to advertisement, to television and typography.

Every project, even a graphic project, implies a choice - a political choice according to the actual meaning of this word, related to the "polis", the society. To be a good professional designer one must indeed be able to analyse the context and background one lives in.

This approach may raise some critics within the designer community, too often worried about its proper world and references. For us, in Sdz, this is the natural continuation of the civic and political heritage of Albe Steiner, a founding father of Italy's modern design, who has taught us that "the graphic designer is not a  snake oil salesman"

Our backgrounds – Anne Marie previously worked in television production over several years and has directed, edited and scripted a documentary that was broadcast on Discovery Channel, and edited many other programmes for terrestrial and satellite channels; she also worked as a Graphic Artist for Sky One’s sci-fi series, Space Island One. 

Pedro is also a contemporary artist, exhibiting in various Art Fairs (Art Lisbon 2008, Art Santander 2008, Art Birmingham 2007). He has also exhibited at many venues collectively (Walker Museum Liverpool Biennial 2004, London Royal Academy Summer Show 2006, Doncaster Museum 2004), and has had solo exhibitions in Santander, Madrid, Liverpool, London, and the Isle of Man. He was also artist-in-residence at the Courtyard Gallery Isle of Man and the Bluecoat Liverpool. 

Anne Marie has a BA (hons) degree in Film and English Literature plus a Masters degree in Film and Television Production. Pedro has both a BA and Masters degree in Fine Art.

Anne Marie recently published her debut novel, Where Acorns Landed. This was shortlisted for the international OZMA Book Awards for Fantasy Fiction and is a Wishing Shelf Book Awards Finalist.

Name: S Creations
Description:
Great brands are not made; they are architected. I partner with organizations to translate their foundational vision into a decisive visual architecture: a presence that is demonstrably distinct, intellectually rigorous, and inherently aligned with their long-term objectives.

My methodology is rooted in strategic clarity, brand psychology, and behavioral insight. The resulting identity systems are not merely aesthetic; they are robust frameworks that serve as an authentic extension of the brand's core character and drive tangible organizational goals.

I combine refined design sensibilities with an acute focus on structural integrity, developing sophisticated systems that communicate effortlessly and accrue recognition over time. This is a process of deliberate reduction: every choice is purposeful, every detail is mission-critical.

In close collaboration, the core objective remains constant: to engineer an identity that elevates the brand, solidifies stakeholder trust, and delivers enduring market impact.

Name: Børge Møller Grafisk
Description:
Børge Møller Grafisk drives i dag af Bogtrykkerne Børge Møller og hans søn Heini Møller. Hos Børge Møller Grafisk mødes du altid med en personlig og venlig tone. Der er for det meste også tid til en kop kaffe eller en spadseretur i gårdhaven.

Hos Børge Møller Grafisk finder du alt samlet ét sted. Vi varetager alle former for tryksager i stort set alle formater og har alt inden for DTP, scannere og andet udstyr, hvilket betyder, at vi kan varetage alle stadier af en opgave – fra idé til færdig tryksag.

Igennem hele processen har vi fokus på kvalitet og effektivisering, hvilket resulterer i gode resultater til fordelagtige priser. Samtidigt følges alle vore opgaver fuldstændigt til døren; vi skærer, falser og hæfter på eget kvalitets udstyr, så vi sikrer, at det kun er kvalitets produkter, vi videregiver – og så benytter vi os også udelukkende af faglært personale, så du hele vejen igennem er sikret topkvalitet.

La technologie 3D offre des avantages considérables dans le secteur de l’immobilier et de la construction, tant aujourd’hui qu’à l’avenir. 

Actuellement, elle permet de créer des visualisations réalistes et détaillées des projets, facilitant ainsi la communication entre les architectes, les constructeurs et les clients. 

Les maquettes 3D et les visites virtuelles offrent une meilleure compréhension des espaces et des volumes, réduisant les erreurs et les modifications coûteuses en cours de chantier. 

À l’avenir, l’impression 3D promet de révolutionner la construction en permettant la fabrication rapide et précise de composants complexes, optimisant les délais et les coûts. 

De plus, la modélisation des informations du bâtiment (BIM) intégrant la 3D améliore la gestion des projets en centralisant toutes les données, favorisant une coordination efficace et une durabilité accrue des constructions.

Nous vous accompagnons dans tous ces défis.

Description:
Nous sommes un studio de création ayant une approche intégrée du design et de la sérigraphie, axée sur le développement de projets distinctifs, stratégiques et accessibles aux bons vivants de notre belle planète.
-
Fondé en 2012 par le designer Simon Laliberté, BangBang est né du rêve un peu fou d’unir le design graphique et la sérigraphie dans une même structure entrepreneuriale. Parallèlement à ses années de travail dans de grandes agences montréalaises, il fonde son propre studio/atelier mettant ses deux disciplines de prédilections au service l’une de l’autre, dans une approche intégrée.

Depuis, BangBang carbure aux défis et s’attaque à des projets de design et de sérigraphie de toutes envergures pour tous types d’entreprises. Spécialisée en identité visuelle, en emballage et en imprimé, l’entreprise mise sur une approche collaborative personnalisée qui s’adapte aux besoins de chacun de ses clients. L’idée est de les impliquer tout au long du processus, afin de les plonger dans l’univers du studio tout en s’imprégnant de leur passion.

Force est de constater qu’il s’agissait d’un pari gagnant puisque 12 ans plus tard, BangBang est devenu une référence dans ces deux domaines et fut récompensé à maintes reprises, autant ici qu’à l’international.

En 2016, l’atelier a même lancé un tout nouveau service événementiel renforçant ainsi son positionnement au niveau de la sérigraphie. C’est en alliant tradition et modernité que cette offre est devenue unique au Québec, voire au Canada. Depuis, l’atelier mobile parcourt les événements de la région de Montréal, à bord d’un petit et rutilant Gumman 1980, afin de faire découvrir cette merveilleuse méthode d’impression.

Simple, beautiful, and memorable, our work goes beyond a single touch point or campaign to continuously delight and inspire action. We work across mediums, including print, digital, and environmental. Approachable, nimble, dynamic, and scrappy, we’re serious about what we do, but we laugh a lot along the way.

Description:
Ben Kiel and Jesse Ragan make useful, quietly offbeat fonts at their independent digital foundry, XYZ Type, which operates in the interwebs between St. Louis and New York. After hiring each other back and forth and realizing they worked well together, the pair launched XYZ Type in 2017 to merge their respective strengths and extensive experience crafting typefaces and lettering for major brands, cultural institutions, and publications.

Their custom and retail projects mutually reinforce one another—some begin life as client commissions, while others are speculative designs that Ben and Jesse believe fill a commercial niche. XYZ Type draws original typefaces and logotypes from scratch, customizes versions of their retail typefaces to tailor them to a client’s specific needs, and fine-tunes client logotype sketches. They thrive on collaboration with people who are as fired up about type as they are.

Energized by history, vernacular lettering, and unorthodox graphic design practice, Ben and Jesse chase new ideas for typefaces that are as clever as they are technologically robust. Their meticulous development process often takes surprising twists and turns, arriving at small but significant moments of discovery that mark XYZ Type’s designs as uniquely theirs.

Name: IMAGEHAUS
Description:
“We are not all in the same boat, but rather the same storm. Now is the time to focus on your boat.” - Jay Miller, Cheif Creative Officer, IMAGEHAUS

Who We Are
For 20 years, IMAGEHAUS, a brand design firm specializing in brand creation and development, has helped companies develop their brand strategy - a plan for long-term and short-term success.

What We Believe 
Branding and design are about increasing revenues over the long term, whereas advertising is more short term. If a company is struggling, rarely does an investor come in and want to buy an ad campaign. The value is in the brand.

What We Do
IMAGEHAUS is a close-knit group of designers, writers and strategic partners that design and produce everything from brand names, identity systems, point of sale promotions, catalogs, packaging, and advertising.

In addition, IMAGEHAUS awards quarterly grants for creative services to non-profit organizations in our community that help people in need. These grants are based on our core values— compassion, creativity, candor, and courage—the 4Cs. They enable our vision of the future.

How We Do It
IMAGEHAUS performs a brand audit, employing a unique process to identify the company’s brand essence and establish the tone - the one thing that defines its distinctive style, which is then incorporated into the messaging, voice, and visuals.

IMAGEHAUS — with its staff of “visual zealots” — takes keywords that define the company and make them visual. This is where a lot of our strategy occurs. We involve our clients along the way visually before we create an identity.

What We’ve Done
Our work has been published in over 50 publications and over 30 hardcover books written on design and our team has received 100+ design excellence

Recognized as a Top 25 LGBT owned business in the Twin Cities - IMAGEHAUS is a certified LGBT Business Enterprise

Veugeler Creative is an award-winning digital marketing and design agency focused on delivering print and digital solutions that win customers, grow revenue and help build your brand. We have the talent and resources of a large agency, while offering the care and personalized attention you deserve.

Your success is contingent on great graphic design. A bold statement? Yes. But, one that we stand behind. 

With a mile long "To Do" List and the daily operations of running a business it is easy to dismiss the need for professional graphic design. You're busy. We get it.  But, what you may not realize is that it has the power to propel your company even farther.

Whether you are an eager entrepreneur right out of college or a seasoned C-level exec, the importance of quality, consistent, professional, contemporary and user-friendly design is the same. But, we understand that your needs, your desires, and your marketing budgets are not. So, we will meet you where you are. 

We pride ourselves on taking the time to fully understand our clients'  objectives, their expectations, short-term and long-term goals, target audiences, competition in the industry, and what's important to them. Then, together, we shape, maintain and drive your company's brand. 

Everything, from print to web, whether internal or public, must represent your mission. Having a consistent, trustworthy brand is critical to first impressions and to retaining customer loyalty and recognition. Internally, it also establishes stability and alignment in the workplace. 

We are here to help you win; to make you stand out in a noisy, competitive marketplace; to ensure that your message is delivered and that it's clear.

Their achievements, both locally and internationally, are regularly exhibited and rewarded. In 2018, the studio received the prestigious Tokyo Type Directors Club Annual Awards. In addition, Priscilla Balmer and Yvo Hählen are often asked to share their approach during conferences, jury and workshops. Their experience has led them to travel to countries such as South Korea (2023), Mexico (2022), Japan (2018) and China (2018).

Our Brand of Art.

RealGoat19 LLC, born amidst military service, family life, and academics, stands as a beacon of resilience and creativity. In our inaugural year, we've proudly achieved $300,000 in sales, specializing in bespoke 3D coins and emblematic art. Each piece we create showcases individuality and master craftsmanship, resonating with our clients' unique narratives.

Our mission is deeply rooted in crafting pieces that tell compelling stories, whether it's commemorating pivotal events, capturing personal journeys, or embodying the ethos of organizations. Every project is approached with meticulous attention and deep empathy, ensuring perfect alignment with our clients' visions.

Juggling military duties, including two significant deployments, we have successfully steered RealGoat19 into a thriving business that parallels our commitment to national service and personal growth. This success owes much to the unwavering support of our clients, who have not only embraced our artistic vision but have also become an integral part of the RealGoat19 family.

Each creation at RealGoat19 is more than a mere product; it's a vibrant manifestation of our motto, "Our Brand of Art." It stands as a testament to our unwavering dedication to excellence and our continual pursuit of innovation in craftsmanship.

We cordially invite you to join us in celebrating the unique artistry, the unwavering spirit of dedication, and the joy of creating lasting memories. Our aim is to capture and honor the diverse and rich stories of our clients. As we remain committed to artistic exploration and delivering superior creations, we encourage you to be part of our journey, where each coin is not just a product but a profound artistic expression, embodying the essence and spirit of RealGoat19's creativity, craftsmanship, and commitment to telling your story.

Arte final: desenvolvimento e ajustes de arte para embalagens.

Mockups físicos: produção de embalagens simuladas para avaliações, campanhas, eventos e influenciadores.

Prova de cores: testes para garantir a fidelidade das cores na impressão final.

Pré-impressão (Dry Offset, Flexo, Offset e Silk Screen): preparação de arquivos para produção industrial.

Transformamos ideias em realidade, permitindo que sua embalagem seja visualizada e testada antes da produção em massa.

Name: I am my own company now
Description:
Tomasz Bienkowski - artist by education, freelancer by job, designer, drawer and painter by nature. Grown up with a pc as a pet and since early years they are in the best relationship, although from time to time Tomasz has affairs with traditional form of art. The dark sides of music cause unstoppable flood of frightening and twisted visions. He is faithful to one rule - everything has its time and place - this rule is used by him on a daily basis. In other words this rule means “don’t make me work on this subject now!”.
Each section covers different creative thinking, starting from corporate design through web design and printing projects and ending on attempts to capture some wild impression by lines or spots. Probably he wouldn’t be able to precisely describe the states of mind transmitted to paper, canvas or working space.
Most of the times he can be found somewhere between “Layer copy 57”, some unidentified vector object and his pillow. Like every professional designer he doesn’t get up before the sunset. 

Remember - in our professional world one person is never enough! ... sometimes is very important to know experts in other areas. You know that Others can help you and they know, they can count on your help also.

Name: Musketon
Description:
I'm a 27-year-old visual artist from Belgium going by the name Musketon. I've been working as a self-employed artist over the past 5 years and I've been able to work on some exciting projects.

I've worked with big international clients such as Adobe, Starwood Hotels, Coca-Cola, Mazda, Nike, The Chainsmokers, Steve Aoki, Ciroc, Esso, MTV and many more.

● A selection of work can be found on www.musketon.com

Some facts about me: I'm an absolute workaholic, +/- 100.000 followers on social media, I have a very accessible style and I love chocolate.

Next to design, I also try to share my knowledge via talks. Over the past couple of years, I've done talks in Belgium, The Netherlands, Spain, France, Germany, United States, Romania and more... I even did a talk/workshop tour in the States. I talked to students and creatives in New York, Los Angeles, Seattle, San Diego and Miami. 

I also work on personal projects when I have time in between projects. My latest project is my first ever Kickstarter campaign. I created a fictional city of 100 houses. These houses were sent to me from people from all over the world. This Kickstarter was 300% funded making it a great success.

● www.musketon.com/kickstarter for all the info on this project.

This Kickstarter project also evolved into my first ever published book. A limited edition coffee table/art book containing all the illustrations I created for the Kickstarter project. Printed on 250 copies, signed and numbered. 

● All info on the book can be found over here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AvrXpRG0qyU

Musketon is also a clothing brand. Over the past years, Since the beginning of my webshop I've sold over 15.000 items worldwide.

Contact me via bert@musketon.com

Name: Agence Lemon Design
Description:
NOTRE MISSION : 

 Nous aidons les professionnels à développer leur visibilité/image/notoriété en créant des supports de communication web (site internet/ visuels pour les réseaux sociaux) et print adaptés.

COMMENT NOUS PROCEDONS  :
 1er Rendez-vous : Echanges et conseils (offert)
Chaque projet commence par un échange pour cibler vos besoins et attentes. Le but est de faire un point global sur votre entreprise, analyser les supports existants et voir pourquoi vous n’atteigniez pas vos objectifs actuellement. Puis nous déterminerons ensemble les supports à créer en fonction des services/produits que vous proposez, votre cible, vos valeurs et les valeurs de votre entreprise.
Présentation des pistes créatives
Optimisation d’un axe, finalisation et exécution
Livraison du/des supports de communication pour impression ou pour le web

A QUI S'ADRESSE NOS SERVICES :

 Dirigeants d'entreprise
 Equipes marketing
 Agences de communication

NOUS POUVONS VOUS AIDER SI :

 Vous dépendez de votre réseau et du bouche à oreille pour obtenir de nouveaux clients
 Votre chiffre d’affaires stagne ou baisse et vous souhaitez de nouveaux outils pour relancer votre croissance
 Vous sentez que votre entreprise manque de visibilité
 Vous venez de créer votre entreprise et vous avez besoin d’établir une identité visuelle pour “exister”, montrer votre crédibilité et vous faire connaitre.
 Vous n’avez pas le temps ou/et la méthodologie, les outils pour créer vous-même vos supports
 Vous ne disposez pas encore de site internet et votre présence en ligne est inexistante

Name: Beekom Studio

QUI SOMMES NOUS ?
Une ruche en ébullition !
Au coeur de La Rochelle, l’agence de communication Beekom vous écoute, vous oriente et fait éclore vos projets grâce à ses services créatifs et stratégiques.
Nous planifions, concevons et exécutons des outils de communication adaptés à vos besoins, du web design à l’univers de marque, en passant par la création vidéo et l’édition.

Beekom, c’est une agence de communication pleine d’idées portée par des professionnels du design graphique, passionnés par leur métier.Vous venez de lancer votre activité ? Vous souhaitez renouveler ou renforcer votre image de marque auprès de vos clients ? Vous avez besoin d’une communication impactante à l’occasion d’une nouvelle campagne ou d’un événement ?Votre visibilité est notre ambition !

Demandez-nous l’impossible ! Aucune inquiétude : Beekom saura jongler entre ses compétences et vos exigences, en s’appuyant sur son expérience dans le marketing et la communication print et web.

En attendant de nous rencontrer, n’hésitez pas à butiner sur notre site.

Les portes de la ruche Beekom vous sont grandes ouvertes !

Name: Mijn Gehandicapte Broer & Ik
Description:
Jordy en Camiel hebben volgens vele een bijzondere band, maar eigenlijk is 'ie heel gewoon. Jordy woont en werkt op een zorgboerderij. Camiel is de jongste van hun tweeën en haalt heel veel inspiratie uit zijn broer. Elke avond bellen ze met elkaar om te praten over wat ze hebben gedaan, wat ze hebben gegeten en over andere koetjes en kalfjes.

De komische gesprekken brachten Camiel in 2015 op het idee om van zijn afstudeerproject op St. Joost een stripboek te maken en in eigen beheer uit te brengen. Vervolgens kregen de strips veel aandacht van mantelzorgers, brussen en zorgmedewerkers.

De strip is inmiddels uitgegroeid tot een groter project. Er zijn video's exposities, ansichtkaarten, mokken en emblemen. Op sociale media heeft Mijn Gehandicapte Broer & Ik miljoenen weergaven.

Name: Tributary Design Studio
Description:
ABOUT | TRIBUTARY is a Portland-based boutique branding and design agency specializing in purpose-driven design. We work with underrepresented entrepreneurs to create meaningful branding, thoughtful packaging and impactful websites that connect with their audiences. 

IT’S ALL IN OUR NAME | A tributary is a river that flows into a larger body of water. A small stream traveling, collaborating, and connecting with larger streams and vessels felt like the perfect analogy for Founder Marielle Balogh’s branding process and relationship to her valued clients.

IN ALIGNMENT | We are dedicated practitioners to our client-centric approach. Our team is passionate about partnering with problem solvers, disrupters and tastemakers who are leading businesses that fill a gap in an underserved market. 

VALUES FIRST | We’re motivated by our forward-thinking clients to create work that engages their target audiences with intentionality. Impactful, memorable design is more than just trends and aesthetics; it's about nurturing lasting relationships with consumers that withstand the test of time. That's why we work closely with our clients to develop creative strategies that feel like approachable, collaborative pathways to a bigger picture — just like a tributary.

OUR SERVICES | As a busy entrepreneur with a budding empire, you need a team that can take on all of your creative needs with transparency throughout the process. Work with us in four ways:
-Design Days: Book our studio for the day and tackle your long list of design to-dos
-Branding & Website Intensives for small businesses & solopreneurs 
-Custom Brands, Websites & Packaging for growing businesses 
-NEW: Power Hour for the design savvy client needing an expert set of eyes for feedback, direction and inspiration. 

Head to our website for a full look at our case studies and services and to schedule a 20-minute consultation. We look forward to elevating your business and supporting your brand identity journey.

Name: Barlow & Co.
Description:
Barlow & Co. is an award-winning design studio with an international reputation. From concept to delivery, we create and develop brands to commercial success.

Founded in 1998 by Abigail Barlow, we have over twenty-five years of experience ‘beyond the label’ delivering award-winning branding and packaging design for a diverse range of wine and drinks clients, from artisan producers to market-leading international brands.

Co. is for ‘Collaboration’ – it’s at the heart of what we do. Championing our clients from start to finish, ensuring your brand is brought to life with the help of our industry experts.

A marketing-led agency with a WSET-accredited team, we understand our clients’ needs in the complex world of wine and drinks. From brand creation, design and print, to sell-in and sell-through – discover how we can help:

STRATEGY
Right from the first meeting, we are looking at how we can help your brand develop and grow.
— Brand audits
— Customer profiles
— Industry analysis
— Stakeholder engagement

CREATIVE
We collaborate with you to create rich and engaging brand stories, backed by industry expertise. 
— Brand positioning
— Name generation
— Range planning and strategy
— Visual territories

DELIVERY
From the big idea to the intricate details, we believe good design is a great idea beautifully realised.   
— Label and packaging design
— Visual identity and guidelines
— Brand assets and applications
— Artwork and production

Name: Tada Visuals
Description:
Welcome to TaDa Visuals! We’re the team behind the “wow” moment when people pick up your product and do a double-take. We don’t just design packaging; we create little visual spells that get your product noticed and remembered.

We specialize in food and consumer goods packaging, which basically means we turn everyday products into visual magnets that practically jump off the shelf (okay, not literally). Our work is all about connecting with your audience and making them feel like your product is the only thing they need in their cart. Whether it’s fresh branding for a new line or a full packaging makeover, we’ve got you covered.

We know packaging isn’t just about looking pretty. It’s about storytelling, building trust, and creating a “TaDa” moment that leaves a lasting impression. So if you’re looking for designs that look great and get results, let’s chat! We’re ready to help make your brand unforgettable.

Name: Copper Reed
Description:
Copper Reed are Ireland’s leading commercially-minded branding, graphic design, web design and office branding companies. The team at Copper Reed love to work with all companies from small, local start-ups to household names and big international brands. We love what we do.

We develop on, and offline branding that defines inspires and transforms organisations, while they focus on being productive and brilliant. As a multi-disciplined creative agency, we have teams of creative consultants who work across programming, videography and illustration to craft a solution that meets your goals.

Our niche is working closely with our clients, truly understanding their business, project or campaign to inspire the most creative of results. We have long-standing and valued relationships with our clients, and they rely on our strategic insights, idea generation and our drop-tools to assist approach.

We are a talented and imaginative graphic design studio delivering high quality, creative solutions. We challenge ourselves to deliver distinctive and compelling design because we know that good is never good enough.

    we assist with naming
    we design brands
    we create
    we implement
    we write

    we glow!

Our story is one of hard work, determination and a strong desire to create the best and exceed expectations. Founded in 1993 we provide a rare blend of creative talent, design experience and commercial and marketing awareness, coupled with excellent project and cost management.

Name: Brantz.
Description:
Brantz. es un estudio de diseño especializado en el diseño de marca y packaging. Perseguimos conseguir el crecimiento de las empresas a través de la diferenciación y exclusividad de su identidad visual. Nuestra ambición no conoce de fronteras; trabajamos cualquier sector, siempre comprometidos con lo que hacemos y dotando de personalidad todos nuestros trabajos.

Buscamos clientes de calidad, comprometidos con su empresa y que tengan conciencia de la importancia de tener una identidad bien definida. Somos productores de nuevos conceptos y apasionados con nuestro trabajo.


QUÉ OFRECEMOS

La implicación que desarrollamos en cada trabajo que realizamos es plena; por ello analizamos a cada cliente a través de su historia y su recorrido, para así poder crear la identidad visual que lo identifique y realmente lo defina.

Trabajamos cada proyecto como si fuera único porque entendemos de la importancia que juega la imagen en una empresa, producto o persona.
Somos un equipo ambicioso, exigente, vivo y en constante búsqueda creativa.

Description:
MusaWorkLab is a multi-disciplinary design and communication consultancy studio founded in 2003 by Raquel Viana, Paulo Lima and Ricardo Alexandre, located in Lisbon, Portugal.

Every project is treated uniquely based on the special needs of our client – one solution does not fit all. Past work includes projects for:
Fundação de Serralves, Fundação EDP, Estoril Fashion Art Festival, Associação Moda Lisboa, Bombay Sapphire, Fashion Clinic, Moet&Chandon, Don Pérignon, Móveis Olaio, Kasutera, Ordem dos Arquitectos, Experimenta Design, Mexto property investment, Ori Asian Food, Mercado chef Miguel Castro e Silva, Hangar, Babel cultural projects, Vinhos Herdade Grande, Bacardi-Martini Portugal, Elite Model Look, Miss Sixty, IWC, Fundação Luis Figo, GreyGoose Vodka, Eric Kayser, Plataform—a, Pão de Ló Ti Piedade, João Tiago Aguiar — arquitectos, Industria Club, C.M. Lisboa, Stockmarket, ZDB Galeria Zé dos Bois, RTP, XN Brand Dynamics, O Epicurista / Loja do Banho, Bar BedRoom, Sapatarias Calcantes, Logadega, Editora Objectiva, Centrocar, Entreposto Auto…

L’agence 36 15 est née de la rencontre entre le studio de design graphique Les Zinc et la maison de production d’art urbain Quai 36.

Amies depuis des années, nos deux structures ont décidé d’allier leurs forces pour créer la meilleure version d’une agence de design graphique spécialisée, associant l’expertise des secteurs urbain et immobilier de Quai 36 et la puissance créative des Zinc.

Aujourd’hui, nous sommes réunis par une même ambition : mettre le meilleur du branding au service des acteurs de la ville.

Name: Papier Merveille
Description:
Au départ, il y a l’amour du papier. Et une envie irrésistible de s’exprimer. La marque Papier Merveille est née comme ça il y a une dizaine d’années à Lyon. Dirigée par Christine Dufaut, designer graphique de formation, elle est aujourd'hui la marque incontournable pour les amoureux de belle papeterie.

Avec ses cahiers, carnets, blocs-notes, cartes postales mais aussi sa sélection de petits objets de décoration et de mode, Papier Merveille propage la bonne humeur. Pas de grise mine, pas d’idées noires mais de l’esprit, du peps et des motifs hauts en couleurs. 

Côté fabrication, pas de secret. Les designs sont imaginés par Christine Dufaut ou en collaboration avec des artistes. Les cahiers sont fabriqués dans la région lyonnaise avec du papier recyclé et/ou PEFC. 

« Certains ont l’angoisse de la page blanche. Nous, on en a la passion ! Papier Merveille s’efforce de créer des collections de papeterie qui ressemblent à la vie : vibrantes, belles, pétillantes. Et pour le reste, c’est à vous de jouer ! Pour écrire, griffonner, dessiner, noter, répertorier, planifier… il y en a pour tous les goûts, tous les usages et tous les profils » Christine Dufaut

Name: 3DPLUSY
Description:
At 3dplusy.com, we transform imagination into visual reality.

We specialize in high-quality 3D modeling, animation, and motion graphics, helping businesses, brands, and creators bring their ideas to life through stunning visuals and storytelling. Whether it's a sleek product showcase, a detailed architectural model, or an animated promotional teaser, our team blends creativity with technical precision to deliver exceptional results.

Our services include:

    3D Modeling & Rendering – From realistic product designs to complex industrial machinery and character models.

    3D Animation – Captivating animations that breathe life into your concepts, perfect for ads, explainers, and brand stories.

    2D Motion Graphics – Eye-catching promotional videos and explainers that simplify messages and engage viewers.

    Product Visualization – Visual content that highlights your product’s features in the most appealing and accurate way possible.

    Architectural Visualization – Interior and exterior renders that make spaces feel real before they’re built.

    Clothing Simulation & Visualization – Using tools like Clo3D and Marvelous Designer to craft and animate garments for fashion and medical industries.

    Logo Animations & Intros – Memorable logo reveals for your brand’s video content.

    Packaging & Label Design – Aesthetic and practical designs that stand out on shelves and screens.

With a passion for detail and a commitment to quality, we work closely with clients to ensure every project is on point — visually and strategically. Whether you're launching a new product, explaining a service, or building your brand image, 3dplusy is your creative partner in every dimension.

Description:

You can rely on Format Graphics for fast, effective and competitive solutions for all your print and POS material.

From one-offs to volume production, our passion is large format print production. We can direct print and finish onto a diverse range of media including vinyl, posters, banner stands, foamex panelling, display board, e-flute, acrylic and wood – output length is usually only limited to the material. Our large-format, cool cure LED digital printer is capable of handling flexible or rigid media up to 3.2 metres wide and 5cm thick.

We draw on many years of experience in large format printing, but this hasn’t stopped us looking into the future and investing in the latest technology to bring you the best quality print – and of course, value for money.

Description:
The District are a design practice. We work in all aspects of brand strategy and visualisation. We work with interesting people who have an ambition to do interesting things. Our work is thoughtful, beautiful, and has guts; it changes minds.

The culture of our practice is active. As individuals we run blogs, attend and speak at events, and practise art. As a team we work closely, challenging the brief, each other, and ourselves. We foster openness and exploration, and forge lasting relationships with our clients and partners.

We get to know our clients and our clients’ clients. We ask the difficult questions and think beyond the now. We develop authentic, sustainable, and effective brand strategies and we are obsessive about execution. It can be the smallest decision that makes the biggest difference.

Strategies do not exist until they are visualised. Design is intrinsically strategic. Our view is that the distinction is semantic; they are one.

Look Good:

Sign Clients:

Get Funded:

Name: Les Quétons
Description:
Les Quétons, c'est une marque créée par une cavalière pour les cavaliers ! 

Un quéton, c'est un âne dans le Cotentin, c'est un terme qui appartient au patois normand. Les cavaliers ont détourné le mot pour parler de leurs chevaux. Quand, nous cherchions un mot normand pour le nom de la marque, "les Quétons" se sont imposés assez vite !le terme interpelle, se retient bien et surtout, surtout il est rempli d'humour et d'amour pour les chevaux et c'est bien là, notre raison d'être !

Derrière les quétons se cache SOF, cavalière et dessinatrice qui a conçu tout un univers illustré et coloré qu'elle décline sur de nombreux supports et qui font le bonheur des cavaliers.

Name: Graphic House Zim
Description:
Graphic House Zim is a graphic design, printing, and branding company based in Bulawayo, Zimbabwe, that has grown its brand in the Exhibition and Events Industry and has been recognized by the Ministry of Women Affairs, Community, Small and Medium Enterprises for growth as an Enterprise. 

We have won multiple awards in industry, both at national level and at international level, such as the most innovative graphic design and branding company by the African Excellence awards, MSME of the year in 2023 by the Zimbabwe National Chamber of Commerce, Branding Company of the Year 2024 and Mark of Excellence -Record Breaker Award 2024 by Youth Connect Network and the Tony Elumelu Foundation Grant award in 2021. 

In 2024 we built the best exhibition stands at the World Tobacco Africa Expo in Zimbabwe and were responsible for the branding of Maker Space Innovation Hub, the space piloted by UN Women Zimbabwe and the Ministry of Women Affairs Community, Small and Medium Enterprises Development, that gives women entrepreneurs access to specialized equipment, renewable energy, and relevant skills in a convenient and affordable manner. We have been operating in the Exhibition & Events industry for over 5years.

Graphic House Zim has been the first organization to extend itself to bridge the gap between industry and the learning environment by empowering graphic designers within Zimbabwe with an opportunity to receive hands-on Print Media training through our on-the-job training program. We also offer industry and entrepreneurship mentorship in partnership with various organizations, including the US Department of State.

We’re a strategy-led integrated agency based in London backed by over 19 years of experience connecting businesses, brands and consumers.

Agile, nimble and flexible by definition, our creative approach is rooted in cutting edge strategy. That means getting our talented creative minds involved early in the strategic process and vice versa. We believe this more cohesive approach allows us to deliver more effective creative campaigns and communications.

We have a strong track record of helping our clients to increase their brand equity through culturally relevant creative which drives deeper engagement with their target audience and conversion to sales.

As an independent agency, we’ve learned to be agile and flexible. That allows us to move quickly and efficiently, as well as being proactive between projects, and that allows our clients to be comfortable in the knowledge that they’re being well looked after, even if the proverbial does hit the fan.

Building enduring relationships with our clients has been critical to our success and those relationships are based on trust, transparency and a genuine desire to make every campaign a success – after all, our client’s success is our success.

We want to encourage people, both those in and outside the design community, to make posters to stimulate debate in the local and international communities on issues that affect us all.

***

4 Tomorrow entreprend des évènements culturels à l’échelle internationale au cours desquels des artistes reconnus font découvrir leurs activités à des étudiants et lycéens issus de pays défavorisés, ou des zones du territoire français défavorisées. Le but de ces actions est d’apprendre à ces jeunes à transformer une activité artistique en un support à la sensibilisation de l’opinion publique aux Droits de l’Homme et aux libertés fondamentales.

Toutes les actions de 4 Tomorrow notamment à travers son projet principal « poster for tomorrow », visent à mobiliser l’opinion publique sur les notions de libertés fondamentales et de Droits de l’Homme.

Relationships with our clients are close, friendly and in fact we become a wider extension of your team.  This insight makes our marketing all the more informed. Marketing services for SME's can be provided for a one-off campaign, or as an extension of the team to undertake ongoing marketing strategies.

Name: Mindblow Creative Squad
Description:
Mindblow combina diseño gráfico y una amplia experiencia estratégica en gestión de marca, para responder a los retos de mercados dominados por el diseño, la comunicación digital y evolución constantes.   

Como empresarios, entendemos muy bien las necesidades de posicionamiento y crecimiento de una marca o negocio, así como lo emocionante que es empezar nuevos proyectos.

Como consumidores, somos fans de los productos con diseño único y que se adaptan a nuestro estilo de vida, sabemos cómo evolucionan las tendencias constantemente y también tenemos nuestras preferencias en todo lo que consumimos y lo que usamos.

Como expertos en comunicación gráfica, sabemos cómo mejorar la experiencia de tus usuarios con tu marca a través de una imagen que se conecte con tus consumidores y una comunicación persuasiva y con innovación.

Así que cada proyecto que tomamos lo desarrollamos desde estas 3 perspectivas, además nos involucramos profundamente para entender los objetivos de nuestros clientes y juntos lograr resultados sorprendentes.

En síntesis somos una boutique creativa que nació bajo los principios del nuevo siglo, en la era digital, en un mundo gobernado por el diseño y evolución constantes, donde la DIFERENCIACIÓN es el reto más importante.

Se parte de esta re-evolución…

Genom noggrann analys och strategi, via designprocess, workshops och förankring, skapar vi visuell kommunikation som gör skillnad och ger resultat. Som ger företag och organisationer en egen ton i bruset.

Hör gärna av dig!

Vi värdesätter det goda samarbetet. Här kan du läsa vad våra kunder tycker om oss.

”Tegel & Hatt är vår huvudleverantör av grafisk design. De levererar designkoncept, marknadsföringsmaterial/kampanjer och monterdesign/projekterering. Alltid stilsäkert och med grafiskt genomslag. Och med ett lyhört och vänligt bemötande. Jag kan varmt rekommendera Tegel & Hatt gällande dessa tjänster.” 
//Ann Förberg, marknadschef Natur & Kultur

”Vi anlitar Tegel & Hatt för kampanjer och material i syfte att värva medlemmar till vår organisation och vårda relationen till dem som redan är medlemmar. Tegel & Hatt levererar grafisk form för print och digitala media och de har även hjälpt oss med rörligt material i form av filmer och banners. Framför allt uppskattar vi deras kreativa och innehållsrika monterkoncept som de har levererat under åren för våra stora mässor såsom interna event. Vi är glada över vårt samarbete med Tegel & Hatt och kan varmt rekommendera dem som leverantör av såväl strategi/koncept som produktioner av snabbare karaktär.”

//Beatrice Ståhle, marknadschef Svensk Handel

Welcome to my LinkedIn page! I'm Syed Asgar Ali, the Creative Head at AUA-Design Studio, where we inspire innovation through captivating design experiences. With a passion for creativity and a drive to push boundaries, I crafting compelling visual narratives that resonate with audiences.

As the Creative Head, I believe in harnessing the transformative power of design to inspire change and drive results. My approach blends artistic vision with strategic insight, allowing me to create designs that not only look stunning but also deliver tangible impact for our clients.

From conceptualizing brand identities to executing dynamic marketing campaigns, I specialize in translating ideas into memorable designs that leave a lasting impression. I'm committed to continuous learning and staying abreast of the latest trends and technologies, ensuring that our work at AUA-Design Studio remains fresh and innovative.

Join me on a journey of creative exploration as we inspire innovation together. Let's connect and explore how we can collaborate to elevate your brand through the power of design.

Name: elsarute.mendes
Description: I started my career in 1992 as a newspaper and editorial designer. Shortly after, I spent two years at a graphical design atelier. Name: SID-Design
Description:
SID-Design in Coevorden (Drenthe) is een fullservice reclamebureau voor de ‘branding’ van bedrijven. Je kunt bij ons terecht voor het ontwerpen en produceren van onder andere reclame, logo, huisstijl, drukwerk en webdesign.

 ‘Wij luisteren graag naar een verhaal en maken de vertaling van een idee naar een fantastisch ontwerp. Wij geven bedrijven en producten een gezicht met precies dát WAUW-effect – of het nu gaat om het ontwerp van een logo, stickers, flyers of websites.’

De kracht van SID-Design in Coevorden is het koppelen van reclame met andere media-uitingen zoals advies, drukwerk, webdesign en socialmediakanalen!

De lijnen zijn altijd kort; bij SID-Design heb je als klant altijd te maken met slechts één aanspreekpunt, één sparringpartner en één factuur. 

‘Sparren en adviseren vinden wij essentieel. Wij voeren niet zomaar opdrachten uit. Nee, wij gaan uit van het doel van een ontwerp, welke mensen je wilt bereiken en hoe je je het best kunt onderscheiden. Daarbij zorgen wij ervoor dat onze klanten niet meer zelf aan de slag hoeven, maar spreekwoordelijk alles over de schutting kunnen gooien. Wel zo makkelijk!’

Kortom: SID-Design kan als een fullservice reclamebureau veel voor je bedrijf betekenen, vanaf het ontstaan van een idee tot de realisatie van een product. 
Wil je met SID-Design je wensen en ideeën bespreken? Neem dan contact met ons op!

Name: Studio Ogham
Description:
Chez Ogham, l'humain est au cœur de notre identité.

"On ressent vraiment la bienveillance et l'entraide entre vos équipes", cette remarque résonne souvent dans nos locaux lorsque nos clients découvrent notre studio de création. Chez Ogham, nous valorisons le partage des compétences et l'écoute des collaborateurs. Notre équipe, composée de talents diversifiés et influencés par divers horizons, nous permet de maîtriser toutes les compétences requises pour la conception graphique. 

Depuis plus de 30 ans, nous avons su évoluer en harmonie avec les tendances du marché et les exigences de nos clients. Cette dynamique constante nous a permis d'enrichir notre éventail de services, d'approfondir nos compétences numériques et graphiques et de recruter des experts clés pour assurer le succès de nos missions.

Nos prestations : 

• Conseil et accompagnement stratégiques : suivi de projets 
• Réflexion graphique : création d’identité visuelle, logotype, charte graphique 
• Conception et mise en page : affiche, magazine, brochure, catalogue, infographies ...
• Outils de communication corporate & événementiel : conception et mise en page, carte de visite, plaquette, chemise, invitation, roll up, panneaux, supports grand formats …
• Web : création, design et développement de site internet vitrine et marchand
• Motion design : création de story board et animation vidéo 

Le groupe : Delort, IPC Numérique, LDR Diffusion, Reflet Solaire
Retrouvez-nous sur Instagram : @ogham_delort_ipc_ldr

Name: Vitamin
Description:
Vitamin is a dynamic, hard-working and highly creative agency based in Waterford City, Ireland. Our clients have included some big names and lots of smaller names. We pride ourselves on our reputation and long-standing client base. We believe that by working in partnership with our clients, we increase our understanding of their business to an intimate level, allowing us to “hit the nail on the head” time and again! Consisting of two experienced highly graphic designers, three full-time, dedicated web developers and two digital marketing specialist, Vitamin has the capacity and experience to handle any size web or print project. 

We specialise in rich, database-driven websites using the latest in open source technology to drive user-friendly content management systems. We offer fully responsive web design to automatically optimise design and content for iPhone, Android, Windows and Blackberry mobile platforms. We have extensive experience in developing custom functionality such as paid membership sites, custom directories (ideal for job listings etc.). All of our custom development starts with usability first, followed by expert UI design before being expertly coded leveraging the latest standards such as CSS3, HTML5, , JQuery, JSON, node.js, LESS, SASS, Python and Ruby on Rails.

When it comes to design for printed material, our unrivalled experience in the printing industry allows us to utilise advanced techniques to really give your publications the 'Wow' factor while ensuring the very best prices and quality. If required, we're happy to provide a complete print management service from design to delivery all with a single point of contract.

We provide high-end commercial photography either on location or in our fully-equipped studio. Your images will be captured by the designer working on your job creating a perfectly consistent workflow and eliminating time-consuming and expensive 3rd party headaches.

Name: BALERİNKA
Description:
Yaratıcılığın ve Stratejinin Buluşma Noktası : BALERİNKA
Modern iş dünyasında başarının anahtarı, etkili iletişim ve dikkat çekici tasarımı bir araya getirmekte yatıyor. balerinka, sosyal medya yönetimi, promosyon ürün tasarımı ve fuar stand tasarımı alanlarında sunduğu yenilikçi çözümlerle markanızı bir adım öteye taşıyor.

Sosyal Medya Yönetimi: Dijital Dünyada Parlayın
Sosyal medya, markanızın dijital yüzüdür ve doğru yönetildiğinde büyük bir etki yaratabilir. balerinka olarak, sosyal medya stratejinizi oluşturmaktan içerik üretimine, etkileşim yönetiminden analiz raporlarına kadar her aşamada yanınızdayız. Hedef kitlenizle etkili bir iletişim kurarak marka bilinirliğinizi artırıyor, takipçi kitlenizi büyütüyoruz. Sizin için en uygun sosyal medya kanallarında güçlü bir varlık oluşturuyoruz.

Promosyon Ürün Tasarımı: Marka Mesajınızı Görsel Olarak Taşıyın
Etkili promosyon ürünleri, markanızın akılda kalıcılığını artırmanın en yaratıcı yollarından biridir. balerinka, markanızın kimliğini en iyi yansıtacak, dikkat çekici ve işlevsel promosyon ürünleri tasarlıyor. İster etkinliklerde, ister günlük kullanımda olsun, özgün tasarımlarımızla müşterilerinizin gönlünü fethetmekte size yardımcı oluyoruz.

Fuar Stand Tasarımı: Etkinliklerde Söz Sahibi Olun
Fuarlar, markanızı doğrudan hedef kitlenizle buluşturmanın harika bir yoludur. balerinka, fuar stand tasarımlarında estetik ve işlevselliği bir araya getirerek markanız için etkileyici ve fonksiyonel alanlar yaratır. Stand tasarımımız, ziyaretçilerin ilgisini çekecek ve marka mesajınızı etkili bir şekilde iletecek şekilde özelleştirilir.

Name: Aspekt Visuel Kommunikation A/S
Description:
God visuel kommunikation kommer af hjerteblod, indsigt, kreativitet og godt håndværk
Hos Aspekt Visuel Kommunikation kombinerer vi vores passion for markant kreativitet med strategisk tænkning og solidt håndværk, når vi skaber visuel kommunikation.

Vi kan guide folk intuitivt og sikkert rundt i en bygning med wayfinding. Folde jeres visuelle identitet ud på flader og vægge med flot grafik. Skabe synlighed via skilte, gøre verden smukkere med en farverig foliedekoration, forvandle en væg med fantasifuld udsmykning og sikre åndelig føde for sjælen via grafik og skilte på museer og udstillinger. 

Vi har alle kompetencer i huset, så dialogen mellem dig og os er uden omveje. Det er vigtigt, når vi skal omsætte dine visioner til visuelle løsninger, der ikke bare opfylder dine ønsker, men allerhelst overgår dine vildeste drømme. Det kan vi, fordi vi er et lille, sammentømret team af professionelle rådgivere, kreative grafikere og rutinerede specialister inden for produktion, færdiggørelse og montering. Vi har været i branchen i mere end 30 år, og vi kan sikre, at alle aspekter er med, når vi med hjerte, hjerne og solidt håndværk skaber visuel kommunikation, som virker.

Velkommen i krydsfeltet mellem løsningsorienteret nysgerrighed, solid erfaring, sprudlende idérigdom, faglig stolthed og et tårnhøjt ambitionsniveau. 

Velkommen hos Aspekt.

Description:

Name: Atelier Schnegg
Description:
Fondé par Michel Schnegg en 1993, l’Atelier Schnegg existe sous sa forme actuelle depuis 2007. Dirigé par Michel Schnegg, l’équipe est composée de cinq graphistes/typographes, un web designer ainsi qu’une architecte d’intérieur.
Spécialisés dans le graphisme institutionnel, la typographie, le branding, le design événementiel et le web design, l’Atelier Schnegg gère des projets d’envergure pour des clients comme le CICR, des prestigieuses sociétés horlogères genevoises, l’ONU, ISSA, l’Etat et la Ville de Genève, Bulthaup.
L’entreprise est formatrice d’apprentis CFC graphiste et polygraphes. L’équipe compte 3 formateurs EduPro.

Notre raison de se lever le matin
Nous pensons que notre travail permet de mettre en valeur celui des autres.

Ce qui nous occupe toute la journée (et parfois le soir ;-) )
En dialogue avec nos clients, nous avons à cœur de conseiller, concevoir, réaliser et assurer le suivi de production de supports de communication multilingues. 
Nous envisageons les publications digitales et imprimées comme un tout, avec rigueur et créativité, flexibilité et disponibilité.

Ce qui se passe dans autour de la machine à café (et ailleurs)
Un esprit collaboratif, le dialogue et le respect sont des valeurs qui nous animent autant au sein de notre équipe qu’avec nos clients avec qui nous interagissons constamment afin de répondre au mieux à leurs attentes.
La transmission du savoir et la formation font partie intégrante de nos valeurs.

En résumé, l’Atelier Schnegg :

Name: Bubu AG
Description:
Seit 1941 bindet Bubu Bücher und vieles mehr. Anfangs in Zürich, heute in Mönchaltorf. Erfahren Sie mehr über uns!

Wir binden – und machen aus Informationen ein Erlebnis für alle Sinne. Mit unserer Kompetenz im Digitaldruck und in allen Bereichen der Buchbindetechnik führen wir Ihr Kommunikationsprojekt zum Erfolg.

Digitaldruck, handwerkliche Produktion und industrielle Fertigung: bei uns finden Sie alles unter einem Dach. Das schafft Synergien und vereinfacht die Kommunikation. Auch bei anspruchsvollen Projekten haben Sie als Kunde nur einen Ansprechpartner für alle Produktionsschritte.

Mit unseren HP-Indigo-Druckmaschinen der neusten Generation sind wir für viele Druckaufgaben gerüstet. Für spezielle Aufträge im Offset- und Siebdruck arbeiten wir mit Druckpartnern in der ganzen Schweiz zusammen.

Vom Binden kommen wir her, und noch heute ist die Buchbinderei der Kern unseres Unternehmens. Mehr als 30 gelernte Buchbinderinnen und Buchbinder beherrschen alle Tricks und Kniffs der industriellen und handwerklichen Bindetechniken, von Auflage 1 bis fast beliebig.

Im handwerklichen Atelier pflegen wir das traditionelle Handwerk und bilden jährlich mehrere Handbuchbinder aus.

Wir binden Faksimile-Bände nach allen Regeln der Kunst in edles Leder- oder Pergament, und auch Sondereinbände in kleinen Auflagen, Speisekarten, Buchkassetten oder Präsentationsmappen gehören zu unseren Spezialitäten.

Name: Tandem branding & packaging
Description:
Notre passion est de créer et faire vivre les marques, leur donner une identité unique et homogène, développer leur potentiel au-delà des objectifs commerciaux et marquer durablement le marché de leur présence.

Notre but est d'accompagner les marques dans toutes les étapes de leur évolution. Notre obsession, l’amour du travail bien fait. Notre souci, combattre la médiocrité.

Vocation
Vous apporter des réponses graphiques pertinentes, créer et accompagner vos marques en adoptant les solutions en adéquation avec votre positionnement, solutions déployées du branding à l’identité visuelle, packaging, jusqu'au retail. 

Nous œuvrons à rendre votre communication remarquable et efficace, de la stratégie à la production.

Identité Visuelle
Nous explorons les marques qui nous font confiance afin d’extraire l’essentiel, répondre au plus juste et aller au-delà de l’image attendue. En apportant notre contribution créative à l’élaboration d’une identité visuelle propre à la construction et à la personnalité d’une marque, d’un produit ou d’une entreprise.

Packaging Design
nous savons qu’un design performant résulte de l’analyse et de l’intégration de toutes les composantes d’un produit : compréhension du produit, besoin des consommateurs, objectif de création mais aussi des procédés de production ; c’est pourquoi notre équipe vous accompagne tout au long de notre collaboration afin de vous proposer les solutions les plus adaptées et les plus profitables. 

Nous n’oublions jamais que nous sommes nous-mêmes des consommateurs, en ce sens nous privilégions toujours une approche responsable. Le design ergonomique qui est aujourd’hui une tendance, a toujours été pour nous une évidence.

Une belle création ne suffit pas sans une bonne réalisation
Notre expérience nous permet de ne plus subir les contraintes de production mais plutôt de les anticiper en travaillant en collaboration avec les industriels, nous mettons notre expertise technique au service de la création.

Name: UX/UI Designer & Graphic Designer
Description:
UX/UI Designer:

As a UX/UI Designer, I specialize in creating user-centered design solutions that enhance user experience and drive business results. With a deep understanding of user needs and behaviors, I design intuitive and visually appealing interfaces that optimize usability and engagement. I collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including product managers, developers, and stakeholders, to create designs that align with business goals and user expectations. From wireframes and prototypes to high-fidelity designs and user testing, I use a range of design tools and techniques to create seamless, user-friendly experiences that meet the needs of today's digital consumers.

Graphic Designer:

As a Graphic Designer, I am an expert in creating visual solutions that communicate ideas, concepts, and messages effectively. I specialize in designing graphics for print and digital media, including logos, brochures, websites, social media, and more. Using a range of design software and techniques, I create visually appealing designs that capture the attention of target audiences and promote brand recognition. I am skilled in typography, color theory, layout, and composition, and I have a deep understanding of the latest design trends and technologies. Whether working independently or collaboratively with cross-functional teams, I am committed to delivering high-quality designs that meet business goals and exceed expectations.

Name: Ritm Creative Group
Description:
1990’dan beri…
Türkiye’de herhangi bir firmanın kurumsallaştığına dair en sembolik ve belki de jenerik tek ifadedir.
…. yıldan beri
Ritm, yaşanan bir yılın, yüzyıllık deneyimler kazandırdığı bir dönemde, yani “….yıldan beri” ibarelerinin tabelalarda yavaş yavaş indirildiği günlerde faaliyetlerine başladı.
27 yıl önce reklamcılık adına çok önemli bir keşifle yola çıktık. O da, reklamın artık reklam olmadığıydı…
Pazarlama iletişimi
Artık, “P” (product, price, place, promotion) sayısı giderek artan bir terminolojinin (packing, people, politics, public opinion, ets…) havada uçuştuğu, reklam ajansı kavramının sadece telefon rehberinde kaldığı 1990’lı yıllar, pazarlama iletişimi gerçeğini ortaya koyan bir döneme işaret ediyordu.
Pazarlama iletişim, önceleri bizim açımızdan iddialı bir hedef olsa da, kurumsal ilerleyişimizin rotasını bu hedef üzerinde çizmek en temel önceliğimiz olmuştur.
Çünkü artık herkesin hedef kitle olduğu bir dönem geride kalmıştır.
Temel satış vaatleri duygusal fayda karşısındaki mağlubiyetini ilan etmiş, elle tutulanın değil, gözle görülemeyenin cazibesi çok daha fazla satın alınır hale gelmiştir.
Uzmanlaşma…
Üründen markaya geçişin anlamı olan pazarlama iletişimi, her işten anlayanların yerine belli işleri çok iyi bilen kadroları gündeme getirmiştir.
Ritm, hizmet verdiği firmaların pazarlama hedeflerini başarıya ulaştırmak için gelişen teknoloji ve tecrübeli kadrosunun uyumlu birlikteliği ile çalışmalarına devam etmektedir…
