Name: ahoy studios
Description:
AHOY is an internationally operating, women-owned branding and communication design agency, hatched in New York City in 2000. Today, ahoy operates between the USA, Germany and Switzerland under the creative direction of Connie Koch, Aline Ozkan and Denise Sommer: friends, founders and partners with a mutually rewarding passion for design in any form.

Our goal is to deliver exceptional design with just that extra amount of playfulness, color and irritation that makes the result more striking, contemporary and memorable. 

We see communication as a power to shake up, inspire and engage minds, hearts, and lives. We specialize in visual and verbal communication with a pleasant wake up call for everyone and everything seeking to make our world a more caring, creative and progressive place, leaving no one behind. A popular mission these days... ahoy's been at it for over twenty years.

Art and design; cultural exchange; education; environmental protection; social justice; peace and security; global health; women’s rights; equity and sustainability are some of the issues we support with our work.

Ahoy’s work includes the design of brand identities, websites, campaigns and publications online and in print, illustration, animation, video and data visualization to inform, engage and spark action. We offer strategy guidance, too.

Over twenty years in practice, ahoy has reached adulthood. With it comes an international reputation for developing award-winning design concepts for clients with an exceptionally high standard of design sophistication.

They include conferences, award shows, festivals, publishers, universities, theaters and galleries, cultural organizations as well as foundations, local and global government institutions and international NGOs, such as Bloomberg Philanthropies, The Global Fund, several agencies of the United Nations, the Vilcek Foundation, the Rockefeller Foundation, the AICP Show and Next Awards, New York University and NY Public Radio.

We are based in Milan but we are international: you can find us also in London, Dubai, Madrid, Dublin, Lugano and New York. 
Why Axielab? 
Meet our mascotte, Axie the axolotl :)
Axolotls are aquatic-dwelling amphibians, therefore they can live in different environmental conditions - water but also land.
With a name coming from Aztec mythology, they have been studied for a long time by biologists thanks to their astonishing ability to regenerate their body. 

They are versatile, unique and...pretty cool. 
Just like us ;)

Name: Archeovision
Description:
La rigueur d’une structure de recherche, la réactivité d’une entreprise, l’innovation au service de la connaissance.
Archeovision est un groupement unique qui associe un laboratoire, Archeovision (CNRS/universités) et une entité privée, Archeovision Production, œuvrant dans le domaine des technologies 3D pour le patrimoine et l’archéologie.

Cette association de structures permet de répondre aux besoins de tous les professionnels de ce domaine en leur offrant des prestations et des services de grande qualité tout en assurant réactivité, souplesse et déontologie scientifique.

Archeovision : un laboratoire précurseur dans le domaine des technologies 3D appliquées au patrimoine
Créé en 1993, Archeovision (UMS 3657 CNRS / Université Bordeaux Montaigne / Université de de Bordeaux)effectue des expertises, émet des recommandations,  accompagne les porteurs de projets 3D en Sciences Humaines et Sociales (SHS) et offre des solutions de conservation des données 3D.

Archeovision Production : Offrir des prestations 3D de qualité aux acteurs du patrimoine
Leader dans les activités de numérisation 3D, de SIG3D, BIM patrimonial ou de restitution de sites disparus depuis 2005, Archeovision Production (structure privée associée à Archeovision, anciennement Archeotransfert) réalise également des films, des interfaces interactives, ainsi que des expériences en Réalité Virtuelle ou Augmentée pour la valorisation et la médiation scientifique.

• Marketplace Operations: Optimized listings, visuals, and customer experience tailored to Amazon and Etsy.

Where we operate
• United States: Core operations and fulfillment focused on U.S. customers.
• Turkey & Poland: Expert teams supporting design, sales assistance, and scalable production capacity.

How we work

Hola! Me llamo Lucía Jiménez y creé las Guías Ilustradas en el año 2016 con el objetivo de ayudar a las empresas a comunicarse de una manera más sencilla a través de las ilustraciones y el humor con su principal cliente: sus emplead@s.

Todo lo que necesites se puede convertir en una guía aunque lo más demandado suele ser:
*Manuales y carteles de prevención laboral y de relaciones laborales.
*Wellcome pack.
*Guías y carteles informativos.
*Manual de usuario.
*Diccionario de competencias.
*Convocatorias divertidas.

¿Cómo se elaboran las guías? Será muy sencillo y te prometo que te divertirás en el proceso. Tú me dices simplemente qué necesitas decir y yo me encargo de todo lo demás: guion, textos e ilustraciones o viñetas necesarias. Te diseñaré una guía personalizada que les encantará a tus equipos.

¿Quién ha confiado en las Guías Ilustradas desde que empezaron? Mira:
ALSA, ALLIANZ, LACTALIS, DHL, IPSEN PHARMA, ISCELL, MAKRO, LIBERTY SEGUROS, MAPFRE, SANITAS, CORUS DENTAL, FUNDACIÓN BALIA, TELEFÓNICA, PARFOIS, ALPLA, SKRETTING ESPAÑA, GCR GROUP Y ANALÍTICA ALIMENTARIA entre otros.

¿Tienes algo que contar y quieres hacerlo de otra manera?
Mándame un correo sin compromiso a luciajimenezbarca@gmail.com
o llámame al teléfono 650687435.

Apuesta por lo sencillamente ilustrado!

Interfaces, logiciels, installations interactives et vidéo, sites web, objets connectés... www.inook.com

Name: Design Bees (Monthly Design Packages)
Description:
Design Bees is revolutionising Australian graphic design.   

We understand the attraction of self designing.  But, acting as your own designer or having your team do so consumes valuable time, costing you and your team's productivity. 

Our solution?  Simple: one flat monthly fee covers all your design needs. 
Starting from $499 AUD pick a package, pay your monthly fee, and drop your briefs into your own unlimited queue.  There is no contract, and you can cancel at any time.

One of our experienced designers will be assigned to your design jobs and will work through your queue.  They will be there "on demand" to pick up all your future design work jobs, so they learn and grow what you like. 

And you can make as many amendments as you want until you get the design just as you want.

We handle the design grind so your teams can ace their real work.

Name: Sandifort id | full service ontwerpbureau
Description:
Wij zijn Sandifort id. Een full service ontwerpbureau bestaande uit nuchtere creatieve doeners. Van creatie tot aan de implementatie. 

Het begint allemaal met een goed idee. Vooral als je start met een bedrijf is een duidelijke herkenning zeer belangrijk. Een sterke corporate identity, met een goed logo en consistent uitgedragen huisstijl zijn dan onmisbaar. 

Wij gaan op zoek naar de identiteit van jouw bedrijf of merk. Welke waarden horen bij het bedrijf en wat wil je uitstralen? Hoe ga je je positioneren? Wij vertalen het naar jouw unieke brand identity. We geven het een passend jasje. Gaande het proces kleden we het poppetje verder aan. We kijken welke kleuren en topografieën het beste bij jouw onderneming passen. Als we dat in kaart hebben gebracht kunnen we het omzetten tot een dynamisch concept dat altijd goed toepasbaar is. Op drukwerk, op een website maar ook in signing van bijvoorbeeld een bedrijfswagen.

Met meer dan 20 jaar ervaring, passie en veel creativiteit gaan we graag aan de slag. Wij ontwerpen altijd persoonlijk en op maat. Een stuk grafisch ontwerp dat altijd uniek is. We geven vorm aan je bedrijfs- of merkidentiteit. Van creatie tot implementatie!

Ben je enthousiast geworden? Neem dan contact op met daniel@sandifortid.nl!

Name: After studio (ex Coba&associates)
Description:
After all these years…

After 25 years of operating under the name Coba & Associates, the time has come to take a step that naturally grew out of everything we have built together.

For a quarter of a century, we have been shaping identities, stories, and purpose for leading domestic brands, as well as many international ones. We have worked with small businesses that grew into corporations, on projects that crossed borders, and with teams that evolved alongside their visions. Through every new challenge, the name Coba & Associates has stood for our dedication and our distinctive approach.

Today, as we look back on what we have achieved, it is clear that the moment has arrived to look ahead to what comes next.

That is why we became After Studio.

After represents everything that follows 25 years of experience, growth, and change. It is a space where we continue to do what we do best: building brands that leave a lasting impact—now driven by new energy, renewed ambition, and broader horizons.

“After” is our new beginning, grounded in everything you helped us create.

Thank you for being part of the Coba & Associates story.

We look forward to continuing to shape what lies ahead—everything that comes after.

Vous connaissez tous la petite pomme  ? Celle que l’ont voit partout ? Vous savez… cette inventivité, ce dynamisme débordant, une magie qu’on ne trouve nulle part ailleurs ? Non, nous ne parlons pas de New York, mais bien évidemment de l’agence de communication Com d’Happy.

Situé au cœur historique de la ville de Vannes, Com d’Happy accompagne les professionnels dans la confection de votre communication. 
Une légende dit (...), qu'une entreprise sans logo, ni site internet, c’est un peu comme un château sans la Loire ou un Kouign Amann sans beurre (oui oui nous avons osé écrire ça )… c’est  aujourd’hui impensable !!!

Que vous soyez en lancement d’activité ou que vous ayez besoin d’un petit coup de jeun's, votre identité visuelle est la base de votre communication. Elle est votre sourire et doit communiquer le bon message quand vous n’êtes pas là pour le faire.

Venant des 4 coins de la Bretagne mais aussi de Paris, des îles Houat ou La Réunion, nous essayons - dans la mesure du possible - de rencontrer nos clients. Une feuille blanche, un café et hop c’est parti ! Parlez-nous de vous, de notre expérience, de votre métier… Votre manière de vous exprimer, les mots que vous allez utiliser, votre caractère, le nombre de café que vous allez boire  ou encore les couleurs que vous allez porter, nous permettrons de créer un univers graphique qui vous collera parfaitement à la peau.

Sensible à la santé de notre belle Planète, la Happy Team fait attention - au bureau comme à la maison - à ses gestes au quotidien. C’est pourquoi, nous vous proposerons toujours des solutions écologiques adaptées à vos besoins, vos envies et votre budget, en cohérence avec cet état d’esprit et nos valeurs.

Maintenant que vous connaissez nos valeurs, nos motivations et que nous vous avons contaminé avec notre bonne humeur  profitez de cet élan de folie pour passer nous voir  Notre porte est toujours ouverte pour échanger, conseiller, rigoler, faire le point sur votre com'.

Crystal has been better and better recognized ever since its birth in 1995, producing a series of high-quality works, including: 
300 episodes 'Olympic ABC' (with China Central TV);
100 episodes 'Fuwa animation' (with Beijing TV); 
as well as other documentaries, including 'Imperial Palace', 'New Silk Road', 'Rise of Nations' etc. 

Recently, Crystal has contributed CG scenes for the famous Chinese movie ‘Red Cliff’ directed by Mr. John Woo.

Mr. Lu, President of Crystal, states that, it is the Company’s great honor to make its due contribution to the country by serving as the official CG provider for 2008 Beijing Olympic Games. This shows BOCOG ’ s recognition of Crystal’s big influence in China as well as its advanced and high-quality production. Bearing in mind a strong belief of constantly pursuing excellence, Crystal will continue to strive for its leading position in the CG industry, by improving both the technology and service, and following higher standards.

Name: Les Alfredines
Description:
Studio de design graphique parisien et lyonnais
-------
Chez Les Alfredines, nous avons une passion : créer des images. On fait ça toute la journée, et même un peu la nuit. On dit parfois que c'est notre cœur de métier. Mais en vérité, c'est notre métier de cœur.

Parce que de belles images, ça fait battre le cœur. Le nôtre, mais surtout le vôtre. Et celui de vos clients. Vous savez, ce supplément d'âme qui vous rend identifiable au premier coup d'œil. Ce petit battement qui crée plus qu'un besoin : une émotion.

Peut-être vous demandez-vous, pourquoi les Alfredines ? 
Nous avons été inspirées par un héros de notre pop-culture : Alfred Pennyworth, le majordome-agent-secret du grand Batman. D’une rigueur inaltérable et d’un soutien permanent au héros, il l’aide dans l’ombre pour veiller à sa réussite.
Nos clients incarnent Batman, et comme Alfred, nous les accompagnons en créant des supports graphiques pour valoriser et faire connaître leur projet tout en transmettant leurs valeurs.

Notre méthode se base sur un dialogue constant, du lancement du projet jusqu'à la finalisation des supports.

L’atelier esope s’est rapidement installé à Chamonix dans un environnement propice aux grandes idées, dans de beaux espaces. 

Au fil des années, il a su faire face aux révolutions numériques de la photogravure, de l’impression, du travail dématérialisé et en réseaux.

Aujourd’hui, l’atelier esope intègre tous les postes de l’édition professionnelle de la conception à l’impression avec tous les équipements nécessaires à une production de grande qualité. 

La structure s’est développée, a essaimé et ouvert une antenne à Montpellier.

Name: SJD World
Description:
SJD World Ltd (Stephan Johnstone’s Design World) was founded on February 1, 2004. Starting off as a website to provide a creative outlet and escape for Graphic Designer Stephan Johnstone, once a month it was updated to feature the work of a Bermudian or International artist, including poets and photographers, giving them an opportunity to showcase their work and talents. 

In 2006, SJD World was nominated in the 10th Annual Webby Awards as an Official Student Nominee. The New York Times has described the Webby Awards as the “highest honour” any website can receive. And while SJD World didn’t win top prize, the nomination in itself opened many doors for this rising creative entity.

In 2008, SJD World made the transition from a hobby to a full-fledged business. Instead of profiling artists, they focused more on professional creative services and developing their own products.

Located today in the heart of Hamilton in the Somers Building at 15 Front Street, SJD World’s team has grown significantly. Currently consisting of two graphic designers; Stephan Johnstone and Anna Dill, the team also includes Programmer/Developer Prasanth Govindankutty.  At any given moment, SJD world can have between 2 and 5 additional freelancers working with them, depending on the project.

With over 25 years of combined experience in design, printing and programing, their work ethic is second to none. Striving to keep every design fresh, clean and creative, their product is always delivered on time. Having won many local awards for their work, SJD World has also garnered 6 Product & Service Awards (2014, 2015, 2017, 2018 , 2020 and 2021) from the Bermudian Magazine.

Since their inception, SJDW has built a solid reputation with clients for expertly meeting their creative needs and producing one of a kind Bermudian products. Today, they show no signs of slowing down. Their goal is to become their generation’s most  influential creative company.

Name: Mooijontwerp
Description:
Wij zijn een ontwerpbureau met heldere vormgeving en oog voor detail. We verdiepen ons in onze klanten, om zo de ware identiteit visueel naar voren te brengen. Naast het ontwerpen van logo’s en huisstijlen zijn wij gespecialiseerd in alle huisstijldragers, zowel in print als online. Kijk eens rond op onze website of neem contact op voor een vrijblijvende afspraak om te zien wat wij voor uw bedrijf kunnen betekenen!

• Visuele identiteit
Mooijontwerp ontwikkelt logo’s en huisstijlen. De ware kern van de organisatie vertalen in een visueel ontwerp is onze kracht. Daarnaast zijn wij gespecialiseerd in het restylen van bestaande logo’s. We maken een huidig logo modern en eigentijds, zodat deze zijn herkenbaarheid behoudt, maar weer voldoet aan de huidige tijdsgeest. 

• Print
Wij ontwikkelen alle soorten drukwerk. Denk hierbij aan het ontwerp van brochures, jaarverslagen, folders, flyers, posters, advertenties, briefpapier, enveloppen en visitekaartjes. Alles met de huisstijl als basis.

• Magazines
We hebben een liefde voor magazines. Of het nu personeelsbladen zijn die periodiek uitkomen of bijzondere exemplaren voor een jubileum of relatie. Elk magazine geven wij een eigen karakter. 

• Online
Uw visuele identeit doorvertalen op het web is noodzakelijk. Niet alleen op uw website, maar ook op uw social media kanalen zoals Linkedin, Twitter, Facebook en Instagram. 

• Infographics
Mooijontwerp is gespecialiseerd in het maken van infographics. Een informatieve illustratie waarin we diverse tekstuele onderdelen in één duidelijk geheel weergeven. Door mooie visuals en iconen brengen we uw tekst tot leven. 

• Indoor & Outdoor design
Mooijontwerp gaat verder dan het ontwerp van uw visitekaartje of brochure. Wij ontwerpen de totale uitstraling van een bedrijfspand. Niet alleen aan de buitenzijde, maar ook aan de binnenzijde. Belettering, bestickering, vlaggen, banieren, bedrijfsauto’s, bedrijfskleding en beursmateriaal.

Our Vision	
We always look forward to the evolution and advancement of media and advertising business in Qatar, because we believe that we must be committed ,as individuals and companies, to be part of “Qatar Vision 2030”, and on the other hand to maintain an ancient traditions that was always the source of our pride and inspiration.

Beside our head quarter in Qatar, Media Gate locates in China and Turkey through our offices in order to offer support and development to graphic design and advertising business.

* Yiwu City
Because China is one of the largest countries in the world in terms of production and export, we decided to establish our branch there since 2004, since then, we offered many printing services and advertising gifts through creative ideas and special designs for our clients wherever they are. With the highest standards of quality monitoring, with our qualified and well trained team that is familiar with the Chinese market; we could achieve any idea or product that the client may wish with the best prices and lowest coasts.

* Istanbul
Our presence in Turkey was a result of a deep and objective study, because we understand that Turkey is gateway of the middle east to Europe and one of the fastest growing countries with its distinctive GDP growth rates during the last decade, and that is what made us decide to exist in one of the most ancient capitals in the world, that’s in addition to the support to our offices in Qatar and China.

At Illustra Scilab, we help researchers in cell and molecular biology publish in high-impact journals with professional scientific illustrations tailored to editorial standards.

Through the Elite SciFigure Method, we transform complex scientific data into clear, accurate visuals — ready for submission, peer review, and post-publication visibility.

We specialize in:
– Scientific figures for articles, reviews, and cover submissions
– Graphical abstracts with strategic visual design
– Editorial-ready files (TIFF, EPS, AI, PDF, SVG)
– Social media and outreach adaptations for wider dissemination

We work with PIs, postdocs, and research teams across Latin America, the U.S., and Europe.

Name: Spritz
Description:
Dal 2006 accompagniamo aziende, enti pubblici, artisti e privati nella costruzione della loro identità, offrendo servizi completi di comunicazione, brand identity e produzione di materiali personalizzati.
Con oltre 20 anni di esperienza, siamo un punto di riferimento a livello locale e nazionale per chi cerca un partner affidabile e creativo nella progettazione e realizzazione di campagne di comunicazione – sia online che offline – e nella stampa di qualità.
Abbiamo un’anima produttiva: stampiamo internamente su tessuti, gadget, carta, materiali plastici e molto altro, grazie a un reparto specializzato dotato di tecnologie avanzate (UV, DTF, Fine Art, serigrafia, incisione laser…). Offriamo anche servizi esclusivi come la stampa on demand e la stampa dal vivo, con corner attivabili in eventi e contesti speciali per una comunicazione originale e d’impatto.
Al nostro è attivo anche un reparto digital, dedicato alla comunicazione online e alla costruzione dell’identità visiva sui social media, capace di trasformare i valori e gli obiettivi dei nostri clienti in una presenza digitale coerente e coinvolgente.
Il nostro approccio è agile e sostenibile: produciamo solo ciò che serve, quando serve. Stampiamo quasi esclusivamente su cotone organico certificato, carte riciclate e certificate e puntando su una filiera responsabile e attenta all’ambiente.
Crediamo fortemente nella valorizzazione del territorio: collaboriamo attivamente con istituti scolastici locali, contribuendo allo sviluppo di progetti che coinvolgono studenti del settore grafico, promuovendo la crescita attiva delle nuove generazioni e la diffusione della cultura visiva e progettuale.
Lavoriamo con privati, PMI e grandi gruppi, sviluppando progetti su misura che uniscono strategia, creatività e capacità produttiva. Che si tratti di biglietti da visita, gadget fieristici, manifesti o e-commerce dedicati, siamo il partner ideale per chi vuole comunicare in modo efficace, contemporaneo e consapevole.

Name: LOGOTIPO / Cuéntanos tu idea!
Description:
En nuestro país existen muchas agencias de diseño gráfico que pueden ofrecer diseño de logotipos de igual o mayor calidad, pero la gran diferencia es que nosotros cobramos mucho menos sin renunciar a la calidad. 

Las grandes agencias realizan estudios muy detallados del mercado, un trabajo de investigación conceptual y estético que puede durar meses. Como profesionales estamos de acuerdo con este trabajo, y no ponemos en duda la legitimidad de los precios que puede significar (sobre $700.000).

Sin embargo, en Logotipo.cl queremos abarcar a pequeñas empresas, independientes, negocios personales, que no tienen gran presupuesto, pero tenemos la convicción que tienen derecho al diseño de una buena imagen de empresa, que satisfaga perfectamente sus necesidades de comunicacionales y que sea un elemento clave en el éxito de su negocio.

Las claves Logotipo.cl para poder ofrecer diseños de logotipos de primera calidad a un menor precio y en un breve periodo de tiempo, son:
- Nuestra experiencia en diseño, nos especializamos en diseño de logotipos e imagen corporativa.
- Proceso de diseño online, hemos desarrollado una metodología de diseño que se realiza totalmente a través de Internet, esto elimina el proceso tradicional (variadas presentaciones, reuniones y sesiones de briefing a domicilio).

WePlayDesign est un studio de design Suisse.
Nous développons autant des identités visuelles, des sites web, des affiches, que des polices de caractères, de la signalétique, des livres, des catalogues et même des objets.

Name: Graphics That Convert
Description:
Co-Founder and Head of Client Engagement (Mathew Warboys) + Co-Founder and Illustrator (Jamie Ashton)

At “𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐡𝐢𝐜𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐭”, we work with high-end clients and businesses — in order to produce bespoke hand-drawn artwork for logos and banners (as well as all other promotional material). 

— — — — — 

𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐨𝐬𝐨𝐩𝐡𝐲 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭: 

 Embrace for modern digital platforms for logos and banners (but whilst maintaining the heritage of bespoke hand-drawn artwork)! 

 Customer-centred relationship — with Zoom meetings in order to be able to tap into the psychology of what your particular business “WHY” is all about!  

 We 𝑑𝑜 𝑛𝑜𝑡 believe in charging a huge fee for a day of computer-generated graphic design work (but, rather, we have the ultimate bespoke approach — and put in the time needed to make sure that the bespoke nature of the artwork is felt hereafter and into the future)! 

 We 𝑑𝑜 𝑛𝑜𝑡 wish for this to represent a COST for your business enterprise - but, rather, an INVESTMENT in the potential increase in conversions (from such a pragmatic step in your promotional effort)! 

— — — — — 

The perfect and sustainable brand starts with “𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐡𝐢𝐜𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐭” — and Mathew and Jamie, as the so-called #authenticartchaps, are well placed to be able to make this a reality for you! 

𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐂𝐋𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐒 𝐒𝐀𝐘:
“Mathew is a true pro. I approach him and his colleague Jamie to design a new banner for my YouTube channel. He is such a gentleman and an absolute pleasure to work with. From start to finish as a team they are excellent. The end result was amazing!” 
— Clare Keogh (Owner, Editing Services)

“Within the first weeks of having this bespoke banner, I am already seeing how much it is making a difference on LinkedIn, and so I would definitely recommend Jamie as a graphic designer!”
— Charlotte Hakes (PPC Manager - Copywriter - Proofreader)

Name: LE MENTO DESIGN
Description:
"Un design réussi ne se contente pas d’être beau… il marque les esprits, il raconte une histoire, il crée un lien."

Chez LE MENTO DESIGN, tout commence par une idée. Une vision. Une émotion.
Nous croyons que chaque marque a une identité unique qui mérite d’être révélée au monde.

Notre rôle ? La transformer en une expérience visuelle mémorable.

Il y a quelques années, nous avons décidé de sortir des sentiers battus. Créer un studio de design qui ne se contente pas de produire des visuels, mais qui met l’humain, le message et l’impact au centre. Aujourd’hui, nous accompagnons entrepreneurs, startups et entreprises dans la construction d’une image de marque forte, cohérente et captivante.

 Notre mission : aider chaque client à se démarquer, à attirer l’attention et à laisser une empreinte durable dans l’esprit de son audience.

 Ce que nous faisons :
•	Branding & Identité visuelle : Création de logos, chartes graphiques et univers visuels uniques.
•	Design marketing : Flyers, affiches, brochures, catalogues et supports publicitaires percutants.
•	Édition & mise en page : Livres, magazines, plaquettes et contenus éditoriaux professionnels.
•	Création digitale : Visuels pour réseaux sociaux, bannières web, présentations et templates.

Mais notre vrai métier, ce n’est pas juste de “faire du design”.
Notre vrai métier, c’est de transformer vos idées en émotions, vos concepts en images, et vos projets en histoires qui se partagent.

 Pourquoi choisir LE MENTO DESIGN ?
- Parce que nous ne créons pas des visuels, nous créons des connexions.
- Parce que chaque projet est pensé pour parler à votre audience, renforcer votre image et accroître votre impact.
- Parce que votre marque mérite plus qu’un simple logo : elle mérite une identité qui inspire.

 Vous avez un projet, une idée ou un rêve à concrétiser ?

Chez LE MENTO DESIGN, nous sommes prêts à le transformer en réalité graphique.

Name: Goossens & Kopatz  //  Visuelle Kommunikation, Trier
Description:
Goossens & Kopatz ist ein Designer-Team aus Grafik-Designern, Kommunikations-Designern, Webdesignern und Fotodesignern mit eigener Web- und Printproduktion. Und genau das macht die Agentur so besonders! 

In Zeiten zunehmender Digitalisierung und wachsender Online-Konkurrenz, benötigen Unternehmen ein klares Profil, müssen zur "Marke" werden, mit der sich der Kunde identifizieren kann. Und diese gezielte Unternehmenskommunikation braucht ein ebenso eindeutiges, aussagekräftiges, durchdachtes Design. Ziel des Corporate Designs ist es, den individuellen Charakter und die strategischen Ziele der Unternehmen unterschiedlichster Branchen in eine verständliche visuelle Sprache zu übersetzen.
Design kann das. Goossens & Kopatz kann das.

Zum gestalterischen Portfolio gehören Logogestaltungen, Grafik Design, Corporate Design, Editorial Design, visuelle Wirtschafts- und Unternehmenskommunikation, visuelle Kulturkommunikation, Ausstellungs- und Messedesign, Screen- und Webdesign, Verpackungsdesign, Corporate Publishing, die Gestaltung von Design Manuals, sowie Infografiken und Illustrationen als wesentliche Bestandteile einer intelligenten Corporate-Identity-Strategie. 

Darüberhinaus konzipieren und gestalten wir aussagekräftige und prägnante Social-Media-Kampagnen mit strategisch ausgerichtetem Content.

Unsere Königsdisziplin ist die Konzeption, Gestaltung und Umsetzung unternehmensspezifischer Keyvisuals, als Basis einer stringenten Unternehmenskommunikation.

Aufmerksamkeitsstarke redaktionelle Texte und durchdachte Bild- und Farbkonzepte vervollständigen das Portfolio von Goossens & Kopatz.

Name: awmedia.marketing LTD
Description:
Based in Sheffield, South Yorkshire, I’ve been working professionally as a web designer for over 9 years. Having launched my first client’s site back in 2016.

With a Foundation degree in Graphic Design, this lead me to begin my career as a multimedia designer for one of Sheffield’s best web design agency, Hydra Creative Ltd. I then worked for both Digital and Advertising agencies for 4 years. Before then setting up my own business as a freelance web designer in 2016.

I specialise in creating professional and user-friendly websites that put my clients above their competition. And ensure that they not only look nice – but also provide a seamless user experience across all devices to help generate those all-important leads.

At AW Media Marketing, we don’t offer a ‘one size fits all’ type process. All of our clients are different and so it’s important that they are treated that way.  However, I do ensure the web design process is always straight-forward and as simple as possible. And I pride myself on approaching every project with the same attention to detail and a determination to exceed my clients’ expectations. 

I like to involve my clients closely in every stage of the project. Listening and fully understanding your requirements so that I deliver an online solution that meets your business’ goals. 

Are you looking for a web designer near you? I’m happy to work on projects both locally within Sheffield and the surrounding areas. Or nationwide. I work with various clients up and down the country in various counties. So whether you’re local to South Yorkshire or not, please don’t hesitate to get in touch.

Name: Studio Makgill
Description:
Following a lot of consideration, I've decided to close Studio Makgill.

During the past 15 years, we have worked with so many wonderfully talented and creative individuals and designed for some incredible brands. Hand on heart, I couldn't be more proud of what we've achieved together on this journey.

This decision is deeply connected to the state of the world right now. Whilst our industry is seemingly coming around to its role in aggravating and sustaining the social, environmental and economic crises we face, it's acting too slowly. Currently, to thrive as an agency without causing harm (let alone do good) is too difficult.

I want to be involved in the challenges we face as we urgently find ways towards mutuality, equity and ecological flourishing. However, I no longer feel that an agency is the right vehicle for this.

This isn't the moment to discuss where this decision is taking me (though, feel free to reach out if you want to ask me or share your views on what I'm doing). This is the moment to say thank you. Thank you for choosing to work with us – either as part of the team or as a client. Thank you for being interested in us and hopefully taking some inspiration from the work we created. Just a beautiful and simple… thank you.

LoveHamish

My deepest gratitude goes out to these incredibly talented souls who joined me on this journey: Ollie, Alvaro, Myles, Gary, Charlie, Roxy, Gus, Alexis, Laura, Charlotte, Dixie, Rebecca, Nathan, Oli, David, Wai, Miles, Alberto, Stephen, Alison, Gareth, Ryan, Charlie, Harry, Guy, Peter, James, James, Dave, Josh, Gareth, Paul, Roy, Lutz, Tudinh, Anthony & Edd, Martin, Lawrence, Luke, Arran, Rich, Will & Alex, Paul & Russ, Tom, Ed, Carrina, Oscar, Isla and everyone else who I have failed to mention.

Name: De Designpolitie
Description:
De Designpolitie is a graphic design agency based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands. We produce communication and identity design for clients in the non-profit and commercial sectors with an emphasis on cultural and social organizations.

We have worked for clients such as Theatre Frascati, Rabobank, NAi, Stadsschouwburg Amsterdam, Interpolis, PROUD, Roots Festival, De Volkskrant and of course the infamous jeweler Ted Noten. For these clients we make websites, books, infographics, folders, brochures, toolkits, apps, animations, posters, campaigns, business cards, invitations, films, logos, typefaces, illustrations and exhibitions. 

And although the range of clients and media is quite wide our method is always simple and straightforward. We combine simplicity, boldness and wit with some critical analysis and fresh thinking. And the final result is always a striking piece with a clear communicative message.

Next to our commissioned work we are the initiators of Gorilla, a visual column on current affairs, which is published in De Groene Amsterdammer and online. Also we are the initiators, curators and organizers of What Design Can Do, an international event and movement about the impact of design on society.

Name: QUADRICROMA
Description:
Dal 2006 siamo specializzati nella stampa digitale di piccolo, medio, grande formato e nella stampa a sublimazione su tessuti. La nostra attività prevede anche lavorazioni di una vasta gamma di materiali; alluminio, ferro, legno, plexiglass, plastica ecc.
All'interno della nostra struttura utilizziamo macchine di stampa di ultima generazione, gestiamo ogni commessa in tutte le sue fasi partendo dallo studio/fattibilità, progettazione, preventivazione, realizzazione, finitura e consegna del prodotto finito ed infine il montaggio.
Si tratta di una gestione  globale delle commesse che ci permette di garantire qualità e precisione. La nostra esperienza e conoscenza del mondo della  stampa digitale e sublimatica ci ha consentito di conoscere e fruire dell’evoluzione tecnologica del settore utilizzando macchinari sempre di ultima generazione, affiancando ad esse anche tecnologie parallele come quella della lavorazione del legno, della plastica e di altri materiali. Nella sede di Bologna produciamo tutto quello che ci occorre per realizzare i progetti dei nostri clienti. I reparti di grafica, falegnameria, carpenteria e sartoria operano in sinergia grazie alla meticolosa direzione di Michele e Francesco. 
La nostra passione ci ha permesso di ottenere grande qualità, precisione e tempestività nel servizio; dall’allestimento fieristico, dalle diverse tipologie di affissioni grafiche, dall’allestimento museale ai negozi, dai displays agli espositori, al packaging fino ai complementi d’arredo.
Siamo in continua evoluzione, cerchiamo sempre nuove soluzioni creative, nuove idee, nuovi materiali che possano permetterci di concretizzare  ogni tipo di esigenza o richiesta che ci sottopongono i clienti.
Adesivi, tessuti, materiali rigidi, legno, cartone, materiali plastici, plexiglass, vetro, e altro ancora sono elementi che utilizziamo per realizzare cartelli, espositori, roll up, eco arredo, cartotecnica, quadri, insegne, carta da parati, decorazione automezzi, car wrapping.

Name: Graphasel Design Studio Ltd.
Description:
Our mission is to provide our clients with visual concepts.

Conceived with the highest artistic quality. We always want to create more than mere design,
and strive to find the best possible means of implementation.
Our goal is to build well-functioning visual communications projects that have as much creative appeal as purpose.
We are open to new challenges that require unique graphic design solutions on online and offline platforms alike.

OUR SERVICES

CREATIVE CONCEPT
Creative concepts serve as a bridge between our customers and their target groups. To be able to emphasise the best side of their products and services, we first need to understand the strengths of our customers, which should be communicated in the most attractive way to the target group – we need to explore together the way that leads there.

PRINT DESIGN
A print is a manifestation of an idea, but the quality of the print itself can in turn influence the content of the thought. Print design also comprises the exploitation of materials to be used; this in itself can fill with content an attractively folded or cut object as graphic design turns into spatial experience. Printed design is also able to act on other senses such as touch, which is more than a thought – it is a sensation.

ONLINE DESIGN
Design complements functionality as it transforms use into experience. The communication of changing information on a variable-sized interface requires flexible thinking and technology that can follow these dynamic conditions. The user experience is based on logic, and the beauty of the user interface is based on admiration; these two must be in a balance.

The brand of your business also plays a major part in building success – it’s your public face and your inner strength. A great brand tells your story to the world in the best possible way. R-Co. Great design thinking is our business, our story, our brand.


Brand is all around us, influencing our lives everyday.

Name: ADEGRAF-DF
Description:
A Associação dos Designers Gráficos do DF // Adegraf // é uma sociedade civil sem fins lucrativos cuja finalidade é congregar profissionais e estudantes de Design Gráfico e contribuir na elevação do padrão de excelência do Design por meio da promoção de empresas e profissionais competentes, dos padrões éticos da profissão, da regulamentação das relações entre os profissionais e o mercado e, principalmente, auxiliando na capacitação dos associados e oferecendo-lhes orientação e apoio.

Por meio do trabalho voluntário de seus membros, a Adegraf trabalha para conscientizar o público sobre a importância do Design como promotor de um nível elevado de qualidade e credibilidade de empresas e produtos.

Acreditamos que somente com a participação de todos conseguiremos construir uma associação cada vez mais forte. Para isso, a Adegraf tem buscado fazer seu papel movimentando o mercado do Distrito Federal. Mesmo com poucos recursos, realizamos eventos e parcerias para que nossos associados tenham benefícios diversos. Mas o principal objetivo não é gerar esses benefícios, e sim trabalhar de forma coletiva para melhorar nossa profissão.

Contribua se associando e divulgando nosso trabalho. Só teremos representação forte se estivermos juntos. Mas se você não é do DF, procure a associação de sua região ou a ADG Brasil. O importante é fortalecer as entidades que lutam para que o designer seja reconhecido e respeitado. Afinal, se temos os mesmos objetivos, temos que ter unidade, e quanto mais unidos, mais forte será nossa representatividade!

Name: Bienvenue Studios
Description:
Bienvenue Studios ist ein Grafikdesign-Büro aus Zürich. Wir schaffen aus Natur visuelle Kultur. Eine Umgebung mit naturnahen Elementen hat einen positiven Einfluss auf die Gesundheit und das Wohlbefinden der Menschen. Durch Biophilic Design bringen wir ein Stück Natur in den Alltag. Ausserdem bilden wir durch unsere Herkunft eine Brücke von den Schweizer Bergen zur chinesischen Kultur.

Unsere Tätigkeit ist in zwei Bereiche gegliedert: Selbstinitiierte Designprodukte und Kundenaufträge für Grafikdesign.

Oliver Hischier wuchs in Brig inmitten der Walliser Alpen auf. Xiaoqun Wu hingegen stammt aus Shanghai, eine der grössten Metropolen der Welt. Während Oliver in seiner Kindheit von der Natur umgeben war, wurde Wu zwischen Hochhäusern und engen Platzverhältnissen gross. Als sie im Alter von 12 Jahren in die Schweiz zog, entdeckte sie erstmals die Schönheit naturbelassener Landschaften für sich.

An der F+F Schule für Kunst und Design in Zürich kreuzten sich schliesslich ihre Wege. Seitdem arbeiten sie zusammen und schlossen 2019 ihren Master in Design an der Hochschule der Künste in Bern ab. Im Austausch mit Wu lernte Oliver, dass die Natur nicht für alle gleichermassen zugänglich ist – bedingt durch die geografische Lage oder einen hektischen Alltag, der kaum Verschnaufpausen zulässt. Diese Erkenntnis wurde zu ihrem Leitmotiv: Die Schönheit der Natur in das Leben der Menschen zu bringen, sie dafür zu begeistern und zu sensibilisieren.

Name: Gimeno Gràfic
Description:
We are a graphic design studio whose origins go back 1986 when Pepe Gimeno opened his own studio. Some of the work produced in that initial period went on to become icons in the fields for which they were created. This is the case with the Tourism Symbol of the Valencian Community, (the famous Palm Tree), or the logo for the EMT, the Municipal Transport Company of Valencia.
As part of a logical progression, the initial project has continued its development, adopting different names such as Gimeno y Lavernia in 1990 and Pepe Gimeno-Proyecto Gráfico in 1995, as the professionals making up the team have changed. This has not been the case with designer Suso Pérez, whose working relationship with the studio goes back to 1987. More recent incorporations include the designers Mauro Gimeno and Ricardo Cañizares, in 2006 and 2008 respectively, and the economist María Cister, who joined the group in 2012 to take charge of administrative management.
At the start of 2016, with this consolidated structure, the decision was taken to create a new company to bring in the five team members as partners. We have called this new project Gimeno Gràfic. The new venture preserves the same spirit and values that guided its foundation in 1986: the search for excellence and a firm commitment to the objectives, strategies and aspirations of our clients.

Name: Forcade
Description:
There is a profound difference between signage and wayfinding. Sign companies build signs, we help clients truly differentiate themselves through the power of great design. Our in-depth experience simplifying complex communication problems through wayfinding is invaluable in helping complex organizational structures and cultures bring clarity to their customer experience. Redefining design, brand and culture in the built environment.

Forcade Associates is a design firm providing professional consulting services, both domestically and internationally, in the area of design systems with a special emphasis on the design of signage and environmental graphics/branding for the built environment. We provide comprehensive brand integration, mapping, wayfinding and signage design solutions for hospitals and medical centers, corporate offices, retail hubs, college campuses and residential sites.

Most spaces leave people feeling confused and frustrated. We’re pretty sure you don’t want to do that. That’s why we approach signage and wayfinding design differently, obsessing over the people at the center of the experience. By proactively anticipating their needs, we make the journey through your space feel effortless and intuitive. It’s transformational for your business. You become more approachable. More helpful. And form a more meaningful bond with the people who are most important to your organization. Now that’s something we’re pretty sure you want to do.

Safety. Wellbeing. Security. When people feel more connected to their surroundings, these three things dramatically improve. It’s no wonder why wayfinding design is so critical in business segments like healthcare. But even corporate wayfinding can make an immense difference to people. By helping you boost people’s confidence within your space – whatever industry you happen to be in – we create more memorable and favorable experiences that keep customers coming back and employees empowered and connected. #forcade

Name: LOGOMÍDIA Publicidade, Design e Internet
Description:
Uma agência de publicidade com tudo que as pequenas e médias empresas precisam: preço baixo, entrega rápida, atendimento prático e muita criatividade.
Nossa agência de publicidade é baseada na criatividade, respeito e busca de resultados para nós e nossos clientes. Todos tem que sair ganhando.
Temos 13 anos no mercado publicitário e profissionais com de mais de 20 anos de experiência, onde atendemos desde multinacionais até pequenas empresas.
Com a ajuda de Deus, podemos dizer que já criamos mais de 350 sites, mais de 2.000 logotipos e milhares de outras peças publicitárias.
Nos últimos anos, adequamos nossa estrutura para atender as pequenas e médias empresas em suas necessidades. Para isto, enxugamos os extras e aplicamos a tecnologia para a redução de custos.
Assim, conseguimos atender dezenas de clientes por mês, provendo soluções eficientes e um preço acessível.
Todo o mérito vêm de Deus e de uma equipe que não mede esforços para deixar o cliente ‘feliz’. Hoje, somos cerca de 10 profissionais: publicitários, designers, desenhistas, web designers, programadores e atendente.
Nos orgulhamos em dizer que nosso serviço só termina quando o cliente estiver 100% satisfeito. Ou seja, em nossas criações publicitárias, não temos limites de amostras. O trabalho só termina quando você disser que sim.
Nós temos certeza que seu negócio pode ter uma imagem de sucesso. Estamos acostumados a criar para nossos clientes, identidades visuais que geram comentários.
Temos investido bastante em nosso setor de web design, buscando estar sempre atualizados com as principais tecnologias que surgem. Exemplo disso é o serviço de marketing digital que passamos a oferecer a nossos clientes nos últimos anos.
Com a estratégia certa, sempre dentro de sua capacidade financeira, podemos alcançar ótimos resultados e colocar sua empresa no topo da Internet.

“Amamos o que fazemos. E fazemos como se fosse para nós mesmos e para o nosso Deus”

Name: Team Manila Graphic Design Studio
Description:

Team Manila Graphic Design Studio currently works with a number of projects ranging from branding, graphic design, packaging, space and web design in collaboration with established clients.

Continuing to promote graphic design in the Philippines, this led to the establishment of a retail brand TeamManila Lifestyle in 2005, opening multiple stores all over the country. Inspired by the Filipino visual culture, the retail brand produces merchandise collection with a contemporary approach.

 As advocates of design, Team Manila Graphic Design Studio is the proponent of Republic Act No. 10557 (Philippine Design Competitiveness Act), a bill proposed in 2011 that was passed in May 2013 mandating the state to promote and strengthen the Philippine design industry.

Also, Team Manila is the founding member of CECP (Creative Industries Council of the Philippines) that serves as the authoritative channel for information regarding the creative industry in the country as well as the founder of CDAP (Communication Design Association of the Philippines) that pushes the promotion of creative industries in ASEAN.

Name: Cété Studio
Description:
Cété Studio vous accompagne de la création jusqu’au développement de votre communication imprimée et digitale. Nous sommes spécialisés dans la création d'identités visuelles, le webdesign et le développement de sites internet Webflow sur mesure.

  Qu'est-ce que la création d'une identité visuelle ?

Nous mettons un point d'honneur à créer, en étroite collaboration avec le·la client·e, une identité visuelle moderne et adaptée au goûts et aux besoins. L'identité visuelle est l'ensemble des éléments graphiques qui représentent l'image de votre entreprise tel que le logotype, les couleurs et les typographies utilisées.

Voici comment nous travaillons :
- Recherche graphique, et colorimétrique
- Proposition de trois pistes créatives différentes
- Finalisation du logo définitif et création des éléments graphiques annexes
- Rédaction de la charte graphique et exports des fichiers, y compris les fichiers natifs !

  Qu'est-ce que la création d'un site internet ?

Chez Cété Studio nous pensons et imaginons la meilleure façon d’organiser et de présenter le contenu de votre site internet. Nous validons un par un les différents gabarits de page de votre futur site au format mobile et bureau grâce à FIGMA. Une fois validés, nous développons les gabarits web via le CMS Webflow. 

Voici comment nous travaillons :
- Création des maquettes graphiques sur FIGMA en version Desktop et Smartphone
- Création des composants et des éléments interactifs
- Développement des gabarits validés sur Webflow
- Création des animations et interactions
- Optimisation SEO
- Création d'un environnement de pré-production
- Accompagnement sur l'achat de nom·s de domaine
- Interconnexion Analytics et Search Console
- Mise en ligne finale

  Cété Studio vous accompagne aussi sur la création de votre Google My Business, ainsi que sur les différentes plateformes de réseaux sociaux comme Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram & TikTok.

Venez nous rendre visite sur : www.cete.studio

Name: Degen & Leideritz - Trotse ontwerpers
Description:
Degen & Leideritz is opgericht in 1999 door Ruben Degen en Bastiaan Leideritz. Tot 2010 ging er voor ons niets boven Groningen, maar sindsdien kunt u het beste even Apeldoorn bellen. Wij zijn een ervaren partner op het gebied van grafisch ontwerp, webdesign en art direction. Van huisstijlen tot magazines, van websites tot verpakkingen.Ons werk laat zich het beste omschrijven als helder in kleurgebruik, krachtig in beeldtaal en eigenwijs waar nodig. Wij willen graag verrassen maar nooit ten koste van de boodschap en de opdrachtgever.

Ons kleine team zorgt ervoor dat lijnen kort blijven en er snel gehandeld kan worden. Wij vinden het heel belangrijk om zelf te kunnen luisteren naar onze opdrachtgevers. Op deze manier zorgen wij ervoor dat ons enthousiasme en creativiteit niet wegvloeien, maar snel omgezet worden in daadwerkelijke voorstellen!

Het komt soms voor dat wij bepaalde expertise niet in huis hebben. Daarom werken wij samen met ervaren marketeers, copywriters en webbouwers. Hierdoor kunnen wij elke opdracht aan en blijft de kwaliteit gewaarborgd. Of het nu gaat om een huis-aan-huis mailing of een complexe website met CMS, wij willen graag samen met u werken aan creatieve oplossingen die u onderscheiden van uw concurrentie en laten opvallen bij uw doelgroep!

Name: Studio Magical Art
Description:
About us :
The company specializes in color separation and file preparation for companies that make aluminum cans and sprays and other products by printing on metal. What sets the company apart from other competitors is the separation of colors so that the final product is significantly closer to the designer's final design. And what you have in mind, we make it a reality. 

The company guarantees the ability to perform the most difficult type of graphic work on the can and there are no restrictions for the designer because we separate the files in the most professional way and prepare them for printing. And we will send a 3D sample of it before finalizing it, so that before it becomes a product, you can actually see your final work sample so that you can make the necessary changes if necessary. 
In the output of the file, it has been tried that items such as 

1. Reduce ink consumption by choosing the right colors and increasing the contrast of attractive colors to prevent the valve from opening too much

 2. Accelerate the work of the register on the device (by selecting the shortest distance in similar colors) 

3. Careful selection of colors by Pantone number 

should be considered to reduce the time of changing the label to the minimum possible time. 

Examples of works can be seen in the posts section. 

If necessary and create a sense of cooperation between the two parties, we will prepare the first file for free and send it to you to see our work sample and decide on cooperation with us. We are waiting for you.

Name: Elseifwayes India Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to Elseifwayes, where we turn your book’s first impression into an unforgettable obsession. People often say, “Don’t judge a book by its cover,” but let’s be honest—everyone does it. And when they’re not judging the cover, they’re judging that first glimpse of your book online. That’s where we come in, making sure your book doesn’t just pass the test—it aces it with style.

Our not-so-secret weapon? Motion Book Titles—bite-sized, animated teasers that make your book look like it’s the next big thing. Whether you’re drowning in deadlines, wrestling with your latest plot twist, or trying to figure out how to make your book stand out in a sea of bestsellers, we’re here to add some serious sparkle to your promotion game.

We get it. Being a writer or publisher means living in a whirlwind of coffee-fueled creativity, last-minute edits, and a to-do list that seems to grow faster than your word count. But while you’re busy battling typos and perfecting prose, we’re here to make sure your book looks as amazing as it reads.

Our mission is simple: to get more people reading and to help improve their imaginations. Because let’s face it, a world where people read more is a world where imagination thrives. That’s why our vision is to "manifest the epitome of human imagination," one spectacular book teaser at a time.

Our team of creative night owls and idea tinkerers work tirelessly—well, maybe not all night, but we do put in the hours—to ensure your book doesn’t just get noticed, it gets remembered. We turn your titles into eye-catching mini-movies that are practically begging to be clicked, shared, and, most importantly, devoured by readers.

So, while you’re out there creating literary magic, let us handle the visual flair. After all, first impressions count, and we’re here to make sure your book is unforgettable.

Ragionamenti, considerazioni e riflessioni su linguaggio visivo, design e contaminazioni.

--

Name: Apple Designs
Description:
Apple Designs develops wayfinding programs and designs information systems for large public facilities and heavily trafficked points of interest. We work with clients, architects and engineers to plan, design and implement static, dynamic and electronic signage and information programs that compliment architectural and environmental elements. The goal of every Apple Designs project is to improve how relevant information is communicated to the public.

Originally established in 1985 by Joseph and Susan Erhart to meet the signage, wayfinding and graphic needs of several architectural firms in the DC Metro area, Apple Designs now provides comprehensive wayfinding, signage and graphic design services to a variety of clients throughout the world. 
 
Apple Designs is a recognized industry leader in wayfinding and environmental design, comprised of individuals with expertise in all areas of information system development, including a wide variety of static and dynamic systems. We create wayfinding and graphic systems designed to address the immediate needs of our clients while establishing standards and providing flexibility for the future. We are a green-conscious firm who strives for sustainability in our designs, minimizing ecological impact while using the latest display technology, materials and fabrication methods to ensure the right information is presented in a timely, efficient and easily understood manner.

Spécialisé en 3D et animation 3D orienté architecture et architecture d'intérieur nous intervenons tout de même dans tous les domaines d'un studio de créa traditionnel (Identité visuel - Site web - Montage vidéo)

Le studio a intégré toutes les étapes, de la création à la réalisation, avec une seule ambition : donner des formes à vos envies, et de faire de vos désirs une réalité.

Un brief et votre projet, voire une simple idée, deviennent volumes, matières, textures, couleurs, sons et mouvements. Au final, nul ne doit savoir que, derrière la perfection d’une image de synthèse et son ultra-réalisme, se cachent des milliers de séquences, des milliards de calculs, des logiciels et des caméras.

Name: raznd
Description:
raznd is een beeldgedreven ontwerpstudio voor merken die durven af te wijken van de rest. We zijn een klein, hecht team van creatieve verhalenvertellers die graag omdenken. Gedreven door nieuwsgierigheid en enthousiasme onderzoeken we nieuwe manieren om merken tot leven te brengen: visueel én inhoudelijk.

Onze kracht ligt in het combineren van verschillende disciplines: van branding, conceptcreatie en grafisch ontwerp tot art direction, fotografie en video.

Elk merkverhaal begint met een goed plan en eindigt pas als alles klopt.

Zo pakken we het aan:

→ Strategie
Bij raznd geloven we dat een sterke strategie de basis is voor elk succesvol project. Voordat we beginnen met ontwerpen, analyseren we grondig de context en doelstellingen om weloverwogen keuzes te maken. Zo zorgen we ervoor dat elke creatie effectief en doelgericht is.

→ Creatie
Dit is het creatieve deel waarin we jouw merkverhaal tot leven brengen. We vertalen strategische inzichten naar visuele concepten die niet alleen indruk maken, maar ook jouw merk naar een hoger niveau tillen.

→ Implementatie
Na de creatieve fase zorgen wij voor een naadloze implementatie van jouw merkuitingen. We produceren materialen in de juiste formaten en bestanden, zodat alles gebruiksklaar is en consistent blijft. Ons werk stopt niet na oplevering; we blijven optimaliseren om jouw merk actueel en effectief te houden.

Klaar om af te wijken? Laat van je horen, we denken graag mee.

La signalétique doit être avant tout rationnelle et efficace ! Mais au-delà de sa mission fonctionnelle, la signalétique doit également être esthétique et conçue comme un véritable outil de communication dans le prolongement du projet architectural et de l'identification visuelle de l'institution ou de l'entreprise.
Forts de notre expérience dans les missions de conseils, de réalisation et d'installation de systèmes de signalétique, ce savoir faire est pour vous la garantie d'un projet de qualité, adapté a votre environnement et aux besoins de vos utilisateurs.

Description:
Papercut brings your vision to life with inspired, sustainable design

“As a graphic design business, we have the potential to create a lot of waste. By being greener in our design studio we are helping to reduce our carbon footprint, and that of our clients. We offer better design solutions that are both environmentally responsible and more effective, and the only way to do this is to look at the big picture first."

We pride ourselves on being a boutique studio that greets clients with a friendly and personal approach while offering innovative design. Name: Atelier Siioux
Description:
Défendons le beau !

Parce que chez Siioux on pense que le beau, n’est pas réservé uniquement aux marques de luxe ou aux objets désirables.

Parce qu’on croit que OUI, les marques BtoB, les métiers techniques, l’industrie, l’éducation méritent d’être mieux valorisés.

Parce qu’il y a des entreprises qui fabriquent des pièces complexes avec des exigences invisibles mais fondamentales. 

Parce qu’il y a des équipes qui travaillent avec rigueur, discrétion et fierté. 

Parce qu’il y a des dirigeants qui, loin du bruit, construisent des environnements exigeants et vertueux : où le management élève sans écraser, où les relations commerciales restent intègres, où l’on a encore l’amour du travail bien fait.

Ce que font tous ces gens n’est peut-être pas « beau » au sens classique. Mais la manière dont ils le font, elle, dit quelque chose d’essentiel et juste, qui mérite d’être vu.

C’est cette beauté-là que nous défendons. Pas une beauté décorative mais une beauté qui rend visible ce qui mérite de l’être. Une beauté qui redonne de la tenue au fond.

Chez Siioux, on accompagne des structures très différentes, mais un même trait commun : l’exigence dans la manière de faire. C’est avec elles que nous aimons travailler.

Alors, prêts à rejoindre le mouvement ?

Name: Emper. Werkt voor je merk.
Description:
Wij zijn identiteitsmakers. We maken zichtbaar wie je bent én wie je wilt zijn.

Jouw merk is ons werk. We adviseren, sparren, vragen (en vragen door). Zo brengen we je verhaal boven tafel en vertalen dat naar creatieve concepten en designs die bijdragen aan het succes van jouw bedrijf. Want een merk is meer dan een mooi plaatje of fris logo. Het is wie je bent, waar je voor staat en waarom klanten voor jóu kiezen.

Daarom werken we altijd vanuit de kern. Vanuit strategie en positionering. Als die staat, voegen we ons designtalent, communicatiekracht en jarenlange ervaring toe. Even goed schudden… en daar zijn ze: krachtige concepten, creatieve campagnes en onderscheidende ontwerpen.

Klaar om jouw merk op scherp te zetten?

Name: Urban Graphics
Description:
Urban Graphics is an award winning 360° graphics and mapping consultancy specialising in town planning, urban design and the built environment.

At Urban Graphics, we specialise in articulating the intricate dynamics of neighborhoods, towns, and cities, pinpointing areas for improvement or investment. Whether it's crafting masterplans, designing desktop publishing reports, or producing captivating promotional videos, our creative team excels at effectively communicating your narrative.

Our work plays a pivotal role in elevating urban quality, nurturing visionary ideas, and fostering community involvement. We have a proven track record showcasing the paramount importance of graphics in planning, where our influence often makes the difference between project success or failure.

In today's world of tight budgets and limited resources, Urban Graphics stands ready to be your ideal partner for all your graphic needs. Our collaborations with clients from both the public and private sectors, even amidst the most challenging economic climates.

In some instances, we've spearheaded major inward investment initiatives. In others, we've navigated the complexities of securing challenging planning consents. And let's not forget our role in attracting the attention of developers, funders, and stakeholders, ultimately transforming visions into reality.

Ce savoir-faire permet de valoriser celui des associations, artistes, institutions, marques ou entreprises qui font appel à SabDesigner.

designwest is a full service graphic and web design company offering the very best integrated design solutions to businesses of all sizes. In 2008, designwest relocated to its home to Mayo from Dublin.

Since then, the company has become one of the leading design agencies in the West of Ireland, providing distinctive design solutions for marketing and advertising. 

designwest does design and everything that goes with it!

Some projects we might tackle: logo design, brand design, web design, packaging, label design, business cards, stickers, patches, flyers, apparel, and really anything that needs a creative touch.

Description: Agence de communication généraliste et créative, Nouvelle Cour propose à ses  ses clients une combinaison unique : le regard neuf et pétillant que lui insufflent ses racines et son réseau de talents séquanodionysiens (bref, du 93 hey) & la rigueur des agences de premier plan. Car Nouvelle Cour a été fondée pour repérer, professionnaliser et propulser des jeunes diplômés issus de BTS Communication de Seine-Saint-Denis (ils ont été près d'une centaine) à passer par chez nous) vers des emplois chez l'annonceur ou en agence qui pouvaient avoir peine à s'ouvrir à eux. C'est pour cela que Nouvelle Cour est une association, soutenue par des agences et des entreprises marraines. Choisir Nouvelle Cour, c'est donc favoriser inclusion, stratégie et créativité !

Name: Mie Heiberg Grafik
Description: Hos Mie Heiberg Grafik laver jeg logoer baseret på virksomhedens værdier. Vi bruger disse værdier som inspiration til designet af logoet. Vi mener, at dette giver de mest unikke resultater, der afspejler virksomhedens rødder og identitet. Der bliver naturligvis taget udgangspunkt i dine ønsker til logoet, så du ender med et logo, du er tilfreds med. Dit logo bliver derfor altid gennemarbejdet, da vi starter med at lave en skitse i hånden, hvorefter skitsen bliver overført til computeren.

Name: Agencia Búho, creamos marcas que se notan, se sienten y se eligen. Potenciamos tus ideas ++=
Description:
Agencia de diseño estratégico y creativo especializada en branding, packaging y comunicación visual para marcas uruguayas que quieren destacarse con claridad, coherencia y propósito.

Desde 2014, transformamos marcas de consumo masivo, empresas familiares y pymes de servicios profesionales en identidades visuales coherentes, visibles y memorables.

Creemos que cada empresa tiene una historia que merece ser contada. Nuestro trabajo es traducir esa historia en una identidad que conecte, inspire y venda.

Entendemos el diseño como una herramienta estratégica de comunicación y un motor real de cambio.

No hacemos solo diseño: hacemos realidad las ideas.
Marcas que se notan, se sienten y se eligen.

Nuestra Filosofía
La creatividad, la estrategia y el propósito son parte de nuestro ADN.

Por eso, trabajamos junto a cada cliente en un proceso colaborativo donde la visión, la claridad y la emoción se unen para dar forma a marcas que trascienden el diseño: marcas que dejan huella.

Somos claridad + estrategia + Propósito + Diseño.
Somos Búho

Name: Cosmic Design
Description:
Who Is Cosmic?
Cosmic Design is an award-winning, multidisciplinary creative agency based in Downtown Toronto. Offering a diverse range of services – print and digital design, advertising, social media, branding, video, animation, email marketing and beyond – we are fully equipped to face the challenges of modern business. Guided by strategic thinking and visionary ideas, our nimble team expertly helms campaigns with influential brands both national and local, specializing in the entertainment, technology, telecommunications and retail fields.

Why Cosmic? 
Working with Cosmic is like enjoying the best of both worlds – the agility, responsiveness and collaborative spirit of your own in-house team (minus the overhead) paired with the creativity and strategic vision of a large firm. 

Established in 1999, we are as quick on our feet as we are at our computers. Our dedicated and specialized team of 18 works closely with brands to keep projects of every scope and size up to speed in the ever-evolving digital age. At Cosmic, we believe in cultivating trust and transparency to not only ensure that objectives and budgets are met but to produce results that hits the mark every time.

Dominating the live entertainment and festival scene with a roster of clients including Live Nation and Mirvish Productions, Cosmic has also become a go-to authority in realm of B2B advertising and design. Partnering with industry giants such as Rogers, Blackberry, Ingram Micro and ESET, we have developed full-scale, customized campaigns as well as account-based initiatives leveraging social media, testimonial videos, online contests, gamification, custom apps and activation booths.

Let Cosmic Design explore the creative possibilities of your business, keeping your brand relevant and a leader of industry with innovative solutions that are smart, engaging and leave a lasting impression.

For more information please visit www.cosmicdesigner.com and follow us on Instagram.

Name: Bihua
Description:
Notre studio, basé à Lyon, est le point de rencontre entre créativité et technologie. 
Nous accompagnons les entreprises dans la construction de leur identité visuelle et développons les meilleures solutions pour diffuser leur image de marque sur le web. 
Nous croyons que tout projet de communication doit avoir du sens, et que le positionnement d’une entreprise doit être clair et affirmé. 
Notre équipe engagée et réactive est composée de passionnés d’arts graphiques et de nouvelles technologies. Ils mettent au service de chaque projet leurs convictions, un oeil avisé, un savoir-faire et un goût immodéré pour la modernité.

Creo per loro, infatti, presentazioni ex novo o do nuova forma a documenti già esistenti per trasmettere informazioni importanti in modo veloce, convincente e senza perdita di tempo. Progetto slide fino a quando posso dire "wow" ci sono! In ogni slide ci metto passione, coerenza e tanta dedizione

Name: Más Creativas
Description:
MÁS CREATIVAS nace de la necesidad de crecer de manera creativa, con el propósito de unir y sumar nuestros años de experiencia en el sector del diseño gráfico.

Somos un estudio serio, profesional, comprometidos con el cliente, y expertos en aportar soluciones gráficas.
Estudio de Diseño Gráfico, especializado en packaging alimentario y tematización de espacios sin abandonar las demás facetas gráficas, como la creación de identidad corporativa (logo, papelería), comunicación visual, stand, publicidad, web…
Para nosotros lo principal es el CLIENTE, gestionamos y desarrollamos su proyecto de principio a fin.
Asesoria gráfica, diseño y gestión de proveedores para así aportar soluciones integrales.
GESTIÓN INTEGRAL DEL PROYECTO
Diseño y desarrollo, arte finales para proceso de producción, imprenta y proveedores (coordinacion, seguimiento y control).
DISEÑO GRÁFICO
Desarrollo de logotipo, marca e identidad corporativa.
IDENTIDAD CORPORATIVA
Manual para todas su aplicaciones:logotipo, desarrollo de marca, tarjetas, cartelería, flyers, sobres, textil, vehículos, merchandaising, prensa, etc.
DISEÑO DIGITAL Y RRSS
Diseño banners, gif, webs, mailings y gestión integral de RRSS
SEÑALÉTICA
Rotulación exterior e interior, tematización de empresas, corpóreos y rotulaciones de todo tipo (vehículos, neveras,).
GRANDES FORMATOS
Diseño de stands, lonas, vinilos, roll-ups, vallas, mupis, stopper, corners, etc.
PACKAGING
Diseño de todo tipo de envases en diversos materiales (todo tipo de envases de alimentación, etiquetas, mallas, film, bolsas, cajas, etc.)

Name: Kiosk Studio
Description:
Kiosk Studio offers advice and services within visual communication. We specialize in crafting refined designs for books, websites, spaces, and dynamic identities that excel in both print and digital environments.

Our inspiration is drawn from the ordinary facets of everyday life, channeling a diverse range of methodologies to devise effective visual solutions. A sense of play defines our practice as we try to whip words into shapes, mold shapes into meanings, and meanings into sense—making sense of the world one sense at a time.

As experts in the cultural sphere, we've specialized in rebranding both emerging and established institutions, organizations, and brands, establishing close partnerships with directors and key staff. This journey informs our work with clients across various sectors, driven by our fundamental mission: utilizing design to genuinely impact culture.

At Kiosk Studio, design is a dialogue. Our art direction is tailored to engage commissioners, clients, and collaborators, guiding them through a process that unveils their identity and clarifies their purpose. Whether it's a book, a spatial environment, or a visual identity, our designs are a manifestation of core values. This approach often cultivates enduring relationships, allowing us to navigate the evolution of a brand or body of work with our clients.

Name: Formo Studio
Description: Studio de communication créé en 2010 à Toulouse, Formo organise, imagine et produit des outils de communication.

Name: AXYZ Studio 3D
Description:
Depuis sa création en 1992, AXYZ, société d’ingénierie graphique, explore les usages de la 3D et met à votre disposition son expertise et ses compétences pour mettre en œuvre vos idées et projets.

AXYZ réalise des images de synthèses 3D fixes, animées et "temps réel", destinées historiquement à l’architecture, l'urbanisme, la promotion immobilière, le patrimoine, les industries et la santé. 

Aujourd'hui, AXYZ étend son expertise aux domaines de la réalité augmentée (RA) et de la réalité virtuelle (RV) avec la réalisation de projets dans des domaines variés tels que les musées, les parcs zoologiques, les industries ou les organismes de formation. 

Les derniers projets d'AXYZ :
• Simulation 3D interactive et immersive, pour présentation de projets d’architecture et d’urbanisme 
• Visualisation de programmes immobiliers, de projets d’urbanisme et d’aménagement de Z.A.C ;
• Restitution de patrimoine historique ultra réaliste en images fixes, en 3D temps réel ou en films d’animation à destination de la muséographie. 
• Développement d’applications interactives en Réalité Augmentée ou en Réalité Virtuelle pour l'industrie, le commerce, la santé et la formation.

Name: Pencil branding and advertising
Description: Provide innovative and effective integrated brand marketing and public relations solutions which help our clients grow their businesses and realize their marketing goals.

Name: Ruby6
Description:
Ruby6 has been delivering cutting-edge marketing and digital solutions to a diverse portfolio of brands in Brisbane since 2007. Located in Fortitude Valley’s bustling James Street precinct, we’re a young, trend-driven and savvy team that thrives on delivering exceptional and measurable success. In 2020, Ruby6 was acquired by Cole Lawson Communications, a platinum award-winning public relations agency. Together, we offer clients a completely integrated suite of services across marketing, branding, digital, media relations, corporate communications, and issues management.

Ruby6 collaborates with ambitious clients to create branding, digital and marketing solutions that drive business performance. While our roots are in the hospitality sector supporting restaurants, bars, cafes, beverage brands, hotels and food suppliers, we have branched out as we have grown to become an all-round consumer powerhouse. Our clients also span sectors including fitness, fashion, homewares, healthcare, financial services, property, technology and non-profits.

Name: AIGA Austin
Description:
AIGA Austin is the Austin chapter of AIGA, the professional association for design. With 66 chapters, 21,000 members, and 200+ student groups, AIGA provides a diverse network for creative professionals.

AIGA, the professional association for design, is the place design professionals turn to first to exchange ideas and information, participate in critical analysis and research and advance education and ethical practice.

Name: BL Digital Roma

Description:
13h52 est le résultat de plusieurs années d'expériences dans l'industrie musicale.

C'est notre vision de ce que la création digitale peut apporter à la musique en 2022, notre envie de créer la rencontre entre artistes et fans par le biais de l'image.

Notre but est de pouvoir apporter notre expérience 360 pour vous accompagner au mieux sur le long terme, en ayant connaissance des réalités du marché et de l'évolution rapide des outils et techniques.

En réunissant à deux un grand panel de compétences techniques (graphisme, photographie, illustration 2D, 3D, tournage & montage vidéo, motion design, AR...) et de compétences stratégiques (DA, digitale, marketing, expertise sur l'industrie) nous pouvons vous aider ainsi que vos artistes à représenter au mieux leurs projets, à trouver leur voix visuellement et digitalement pour établir un lien fort avec leur public.
