Brand Language | Identity Design | Brand Activation

Name: Serico
Description:
Depuis 1973, Serico est une force créative du domaine manufacturier.

Son équipe de gens passionnés cherche sans cesse à innover en repoussant les limites de la technologie et de l’imagination. En œuvrant dans une multitude de secteurs au Canada, aux États-Unis et à l’étranger, Serico s’est forgé une solide réputation en tant que manufacturier, concepteur et partenaire de confiance.

L’entreprise propose des solutions clé en main en se chargeant de toutes les étapes de la conception et de la fabrication. De l’idéation au graphisme, au dessin conceptuel et à l’illustration, en passant par l’impression, le thermoformage, la menuiserie et l’assemblage,

Serico est un chef de file tout aussi polyvalent qu’avant-gardiste.

_


Since 1973, Serico has been a creative force in the manufacturing world, with a team of passionate innovators who relentlessly seek

new ways of expanding the limits of technology and imagination.

By working in a multitude of industries in Canada, the United States, and abroad, Serico has distinguished itself as a trustworthy manufacturer, designer, and partner. The company provides turnkey solutions by handling every step of its clients’ projects. From ideation to graphic design, to conceptual drawing, illustration, printing, thermoforming, woodworking, and assembly,

Serico is a uniquely versatile and cutting-edge leader.

Name: Monsieur Présentation
Description:
Faites-vous partie de ceux qui maitrisent leur sujet, mais qui ne savent pas comment le mettre en valeur dans une présentation? Rendez vos réunions et vos présentations plus dynamiques, et plus efficaces, grâce à une présentation visuelle inoubliable.

Avec l’aide d’un spécialiste en design de présentations virtuelles, vous apprendrez à améliorer votre performance dans l’organisation et la synthèse de votre contenu grâce aux réflexions conceptuelles et graphiques à faire AVANT de commencer l’étape de la création.

Vous apprendrez une procédure éprouvée qui vous permettra d'améliorer vos diapositives efficacement.

---

OBJECTIF :

Outiller le participant afin de livrer de meilleures performances avec un support visuel attrayant dans le but de communiquer un message de façon simple, claire et convaincante.

---

CONTENU DE LA FORMATION :

Présenter la théorie sur les bases des règles graphiques :
• La couleur, la typographie, les images et la mise en page;
• Des conseils et des outils gratuits en ligne;
• Des exemples et des contres-exemples;
• Des jeux-questionnaires et des exercices de remue-méninges;
• Une procédure de création pour concevoir vos compositions visuelles.

---

Nous outillons les gestionnaires d’équipes, les représentants, les formateurs et les travailleurs autonomes à faire passer un message percutant et mémorable.

Phidel Communications offre :

Services-conseils
Formations
Design de présentation

Contactez-nous pour recevoir une formation adaptée à vos besoins dans votre milieu de travail et n’hésitez pas à faire valider vos diapositives par nos experts.

Name: Agence Tyméo
Description:
Situé au cœur des vignes en Bourgogne, nous explorons tous les champs de la communication et du graphisme : conseil, stratégie, édition, création d'identités visuelles, logos ,création de sites Internet, packagings, réseaux sociaux... Toujours dans le respect de la personnalité et des objectifs du client. 

Nous sommes aujourd’hui trois créatifs accompagnés de deux chefs de projets. Parce que nous sommes une agence à taille humaine, nous avons une organisation simplifiée qui offre une grande réactivité, une écoute attentive de nos clients et des tarifs compétitifs. Nous aimons entretenir des relations saines avec nos clients, basées sur la confiance et la durée. Nous aimons écouter vos histoires, les comprendre et les mettre en image.

Parce que nous pensons que les messages simples sont les plus forts, nous aimons les créations sobres et épurées qui ont du sens. Votre satisfaction étant notre meilleure publicité, nous sommes soucieux du moindre détail. Nous aimons rendre des projets dont nous sommes fiers et qui répondent aux objectifs définis en amont.

Petites ou grandes entreprises, indépendants ou porteurs de projets, n'hésitez pas à prendre contact. C'est avec plaisir que nous vous apporterons conseils et devis sur vos projets qu'ils soient concrets ou encore au stade de l'idée.

Name: Atelier Mayanne Trias
Description:
L’Atelier Mayanne Trias est un atelier de création crée en 2011 par Mayanne Trias et situé à Paris. 

Nous sommes une équipe de 5 graphistes, venant de différents horizons, réunissant nos compétences pour accompagner main dans la main, nos clients dans leurs problématiques graphiques. 

Notre approche se place quelque part entre un design élégant et ludique. Nous croyons au pouvoir du design et à son impact dans notre société. En quête de projets qui améliorent notre quotidien et qui font bouger les choses, nous accompagnons Le Slip Français, Le Chocolat des Français, Monsieur Barbier, Le Label EPV, 20 Minutes Moi Jeune, Little Gustave … nous aimons faire confiance aux jeunes entrepreneurs afin de les aider à grandir et à se développer.

Whether you need a full logo and branding package, a professionally designed brochure, or postcards created, printed, and mailed, we handle it all. We take time to understand your goals and deliver results with friendly, reliable service.

Description:

Name: The Private Space
Description:
The Private Space What is TPS
The Private Space es un punto de encuentro para los amantes del arte y el diseño. Un gran espacio de más de 400 m2 con una galería expositiva, una tienda, un sello editorial propio y una sofisticada imprenta. Un espacio abierto a la literatura, la fotografía, la música, la ilustración, el diseño y la moda, los audiovisuales... ¿Privado? Privado como una casa particular sin puertas, sin portero, sin moqueta; que acoge singulares propuestas.

Who is TPS
The Private Space es un equipo multidisciplinar, abierto y multiforme. Es multidisciplinar porque está integrado por expertos de distintos ámbitos: comisariado artístico, impresión y manipulación de la imagen, edición y comunicación. Es abierto porque siempre está dispuesto a colaboraciones con artistas y comunicadores, ya sea para trabajar juntos en las exposiciones de TPS Gallery, en las producciones editoriales de TPS Books, en las creaciones de TPS Shop, en los eventos de TPS Garden... Es multiforme porque se transforma en galería, zona de eventos, imprenta, editorial y tienda en función de sus proyectos, pudiendo dominar una área sobre las otras o combinar todas a la vez en la sinergia The Private Space.

Where is TPS
The Private Space está en el 37 de Roc Boronat. En la antigua fábrica la Harinera La Asunción, construida el año 1900 en Poble Nou, un histórico barrio industrial de Barcelona reocupado por talleres de artistas, estudios de diseño, bares y salas de concier- tos que, en los últimos años y a través del proyecto 22@, se ha convertido en el distrito de la innovación y de la investigación tecnológica.

Name: BCPT Associati srl
Description:
Bcpt Associati is an Italian communication and brand design company, founded in 1992. 

Our projects range from brand identity design for private and public companies to strategic design consultancy and communication for cultural events, branding and promotion of territories and city identities. 

We specialize in brand identity design, packaging design, publishing design, web and motion design, exhibition display and retail identity. We work for Italian and international clients, supporting them over the whole design process, from preliminary analysis through the definition of a strategic approach, to design work and production solutions. 

Our goal is to produce effective and captivating design solutions, underpinned by an original thinking and analysis process, attention for real contents, meticulous care for details and innovative production solutions. This is the reason why we call our design deliver ‘Authentity’, matching the words “authenticity” and ‘identity’. 

Our team is a multidisciplinary group of designers and analysts which refers to design consultancy, project managing, graphic design, content design, environmental design, web developing, writing and video making. 

The owner and creative director Marco Tortoioli Ricci is Design Methodology Professor at Isia Urbino (Higher Institute for Graphic Arts) since 2006, and Design Professor at the Fine Arts Academy in Perugia since 2014. He’s also President of AIAP (Italian Association of Visual Communication Design) since 2019. 

BCPT has been awarded by the ‘European Design Award’ competition and several of our projects have been selected and published on ‘ADI Design Index’ annual.

Name: Trumpet branding & design
Description:
What do people say, think, and feel about your business?

The answers you get, the instant reaction someone has when your business is mentioned, that is your brand.

An important part of branding is your visual identity. But this is only the tip of the iceberg. Branding is the strategy you put in place to form the impression people get about your business. 

Approach your communication by focusing on how you want your target audience to feel. Instead of telling them about features and benefits, you want to make an emotional connection with them. 

Most brands are complex and it is our job to strip away the unnecessary and to draw out the essential, resulting in a meaningful brand identity design. 

Brands are defined by customers. Branding is the promise you make to your customers. Make them the centrepiece of everything you do. 

Customers look for ways to find what is relevant to them and ignore the rest. To be one of the brands that capture their attention, you need to make your company easily recognisable. 

Your brand needs to evolve to stay relevant. A successful rebranding involves overhauling a company’s goals, message and culture. 

Our branding design can help grow your business.

Would you like to get in touch with us to discuss how?

If so, please give May a ring on +353 86 816 4867 or send an email to may@trumpet.ie.

Really look forward to hearing from you!

Name: Deezign, conseil et création graphique
Description:
Graphiste indépendante doté de 5 ans d’expérience dans le design d’éléments visuels pour supports numériques et print. J'ai ouvert le Studio de Création DEEZIGN en 2018.
Je me dirige vers une éco-conception pour me rapprocher au plus près de mes valeurs.
J'accompagne les entreprises (TPE/PME) et les collectivités vers une communication plus éco-responsable 
Cette démarche s'articule sur différents axes : 
 Sur le choix d’une typographie plus éco-responsable. Sans réduire la lisibilité ni la mise en forme.
 Sur le choix des couleurs, (privilégier des couleurs réalisables à partir des quatre couleurs de base)
 Sur le format et le grammage du support pour optimiser le papier, les encres, l’emballage et le transport
 Sur le support de diffusion le plus adapté (print ou digital), afin de limiter soit l’impression soit l’impact numérique
 Sur la juste évaluation du nombre de tirage afin d’éviter un retirage et le gaspillage

J'interviens sur : 
Identité visuelle (logo, carte de visite, flyer)  // Charte graphique // Plaquette commerciale // Catalogue // Livre // Packaging // Affichage // Présentation Slide // Stratégie marketing et commerciale // Conseil en communication visuelle

Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus, contactez moi !

Info
Staet van Creatie is een grafisch ontwerpbureau. We ontwerpen huisstijlen, we ontwikkelen websites en geven vorm aan promotiemateriaal en meer.

De wensen van de klant staan bij ons centraal. Daar stemmen we onze activiteiten op af. Want we zijn flexibel en meedenkend. We streven naar kwaliteit in creatie en in uitvoering. Van concept tot eindresultaat.

Diensten
We bieden creatieve oplossingen voor elk doel en budget. Zodoende leveren wij Creatie op maat, maar ook aan de hand van reeds uitgewerkte en aanpasbare ontwerpen. Hierdoor kenmerkt Staet van Creatie zich niet alleen door een breed pakket van dienstverlening, maar ook door een gavarieerd klantenpakket.

We zijn juist sterk door klein te zijn, maar we hebben een groot netwerk van collega’s en toeleveranciers. Van drukkerijen tot fotografen, van illustratoren tot programmeurs.
Voor u als klant betekent dit één adres voor al uw creatie.

Werkwijze
Vormgeving en creativiteit staan in dienst van het gewenste product. Dat vraagt om een praktische en effectieve werkwijze. We luisteren goed naar de wensen van de opdrachtgever. We kijken verder dan onze neus lang is en spreken de intentie uit om in onze creative keuzes steeds verrassend en vernieuwend te zijn.

Name: Ontwerp Brouwerij
Description:
Mijn naam is Peter Hordijk, 39 jaar en de creatieveling achter Ontwerp Brouwerij. Ik kan je uitgebreid gaan vertellen dat ik logo’s ontwerp, advertenties, websites en alles wat je mag verwachten van een grafisch ontwerper. In plaats daarvan spreek ik liever van ‘ongefilterd grafisch ontwerp met meer smaak’.

Ontwerp Brouwerij is een samenvoegsel van twee passies. Namelijk grafisch ontwerp en bier brouwen. Die passies hebben heel wat met elkaar gemeen. In beide gevallen zoek ik naar een bepaalde smaak en maak daarbij altijd gebruik van het juiste recept en de beste ingrediënten. 

Grafisch ontwerp gaat de wereld niet redden, maar laat het er wel een verdomd stuk beter uitzien. Ik drink geen koffie dus als jij een keer niet wilt afspreken op kantoor maar ergens waar ze een goed glas bier schenken. Let me know!

Peter Hordijk
Ontwerp Brouwerij

Description:
Nacemos en 1973 en el corazón de Barcelona, un proyecto puesto en marcha por José Mª Rubio, 120mt2 llenos de ilusión y gran esfuerzo personal y de la familia, con la valentía del conocimiento profesional de un sector en el que él había trabajado y disfrutado desde casi un niño.

10 años después hemos crecido, en clientes que han confiado, con nuevas incorporaciones de personal especializado, introducción de equipos informáticos, trabajando todos a una en una nueva nave de 240mt el centro de Barcelona.

En 1989 Troqueles Rubio hizo un gran salto cualitativo y cuantitativo, en la fabricación de troqueles, incorporando una máquina láser al proceso de sierra, una innovación tecnológica y pionera en el país , que dio respuesta a una creciente demanda de producción, y situando la empresa a un nivel de referente en el sector.

Actualmente, seguimos siendo Rubio segunda generación, el esfuerzo por conservar el legado de la empresa, lo trabajamos y lo disfrutamos

En nuestro futuro tenemos como objetivo continuar alimentando la confianza de todos los que ayudan día a día, y abrirnos a nuevos mercados extranjeros para exportar nuestra filosofía personal y de empresa.

Name: Booste Ton Book
Description:
C’est quoi Booste ton book ?
Booste ton book t’aide à enrichir ton portfolio de design web et mobile grâce à des briefs fictifs.

C’est pour qui ?
Tu es étudiant.e et ton book manque cruellement de projets ? Tu cherches à montrer ce que tu sais faire mais tu es en manque d’inspiration ? Tu es en quête de ton premier job ou tu souhaites changer de secteur ? Ou peut-être que tu es un.e freelance qui vient de se lancer ou que tu es à la recherche de nouveaux contacts, de nouveaux clients ?

Sur Booste ton book, tu trouveras des briefs fictifs qui vont te permettre de publier des projets web et mobile qui te ressemblent et qui t’aideront à atteindre tes objectifs.

Et ça se passe comment ?
Chaque semaine, je publie un nouvel exercice pour te lancer sur un projet qui te ressemble et sur lequel tu peux montrer l’ensemble de tes compétences. Le sujet reste libre à chaque fois pour que tu puisses t’approprier le brief en fonction de tes objectifs.

En fonction des sujets, le temps passé peut être plus ou moins longs : à toi de voir le temps que tu souhaites accorder à chacun de ces projets. Tu peux, par exemple, choisir de traiter rapidement les briefs pour les publier sur les réseaux sociaux (avec le hashtag #boostetonbook) et ainsi accroitre ta visibilité. Ou, au contraire, les traiter de façon plus approfondie pour les publier sur ton book afin de développer en détail ta méthodologie de travail.

Le hashtag #boostetonbook me permettra d’échanger avec toi, si tu le souhaites, sur tes projets. Selon moi, l’échange est essentiel pendant la conception, notamment pour se remettre en question et s’améliorer alors n’hésite pas à taguer Booste ton book sur tes publications 

Tu es prêt à donner un nouveau souffle à ton book et atteindre tes objectifs ? Alors rejoins-nous sur Booste ton book !

Diseño
Aplicación

Creemos en el trabajo en equipo, en la conversación, en hacer mejor y en la confianza. Creemos en los retos y en el orden. Creemos que hay que ser consecuentes. Creemos en los cambios de rumbo. Name: Vivid Frog Creative
Description:
Hi, I’m Kyla, a freelance graphic designer based in Cheshire and Staffordshire, working with clients across the UK to craft bold, memorable designs. With over 12 years of experience—including four years as a freelancer—I specialise in print design, branding, magazine and editorial design, social media graphics, and everything in between. My mission? Helping your brand stand out in a vivid world.

As I always say: “In a Vivid world, don’t blend in—STAND OUT!”

How I Can Help You

Design isn’t just about making things look good—it’s about solving problems and creating meaningful connections. I help businesses:

•  Build a strong brand identity that reflects their values and resonates with their audience.

•  Stand out in their market with bold designs that capture attention and communicate clearly.

•  Grow their business by using strategic design to enhance credibility, professionalism, and trust.

Whether you’re launching a new venture or refreshing an existing brand, I’ll work with you to bring your vision to life. From the perfect logo to cohesive packaging and polished marketing materials, I ensure every detail feels intentional and impactful.

How Vivid Frog Creative Began

In early 2020, I was ready for an adventure: a one-way ticket to India, six months of travel, and a graphic design role at an animal charity in Sri Lanka. But just 10 days before my flight, lock-down hit. With plans derailed and no job opportunities in sight, I took a leap of faith and created Vivid Frog Creative. Fast-forward four years, and I couldn’t be prouder of how far it’s come.

Let’s Create Something Vivid

Your brand has a story—let’s tell it in a way that leaves a lasting impression. Whether you need branding, print design, or creative support, I’m here to help. Get in touch via email, the contact form, or just give me a call—I’d love to hear what you’ve got in mind!

Name: Northwest College of Art
Description:
In 1982, Northwest Art Center was founded by Craig Freeman, a San Francisco Bay Area artist. Northwest Art Center became Northwest College of Art (NCA) in 1987. It has remained dedicated to its focus as a professional school of art, owned and operated by a professional artist, with classes taught by professional artists and designers — NCA provides an educational experience designed for emerging artists and designers.

Located on the beautiful 26-acre campus that was once the Mains Manor Estate, creating a visual delight of nature and beauty that continues to be a constant source of inspiration for the creative spirit. 

The college has always been a specialized school of art, beginning its journey with a small student body and a two-year certificate program. As the years went by, the college grew in size and the demand for a degree program prompted Mr. Freeman to expand the curriculum to an associate degree level.

Nestled between the Olympic and Cascade Mountains, with Seattle just a short ferry ride away, students enjoy the amenities of a world class city and the beauty and inspiring landscapes that are among the very best the Pacific Northwest has to offer.

Today, NCA continues its history of positive growth, offering a - DOUBLE MAJOR - B.F.A. degree in Visual Communication in 36 months. For almost 30 years, NCA has maintained its mission to educate and prepare individuals for the creative arts world. We invite you to be a part of our exciting and challenging future.

Name: Bowler & Kimchi
Description:
WHY THE NAME BOWLER & KIMCHI?
 
Bowler & Kimchi is a brand identity, packaging design and photography agency based in The Netherlands.
 
For us design is about making emotional connections to create desire. We would like our company to be about people. For us the name Bowler & Kimchi not only shares a little of ourselves, but more importantly it represents what we see as the value of working together as colleagues and clients in the search of something new, special and unique.
 
Kevin being British and Kyanne, Korean / Dutch is the inspiration for the name Bowler & Kimchi. The name being the combination of two icons from two cultures: the British bowler hat and kimchi, essential in Korean cuisine and one of Kyanne’s favourite things to eat. Kimchi is also in Korea what people say instead of ‘cheese’ when making a photo, a nice link to our passion and offer of photography.
 
Get in touch to see what we can do for you.

Name: Studio Halley&Co
Description:
"Les talents de l’agence réunis autour du projet ont su révéler, à travers leur regard profondément ancré dans le sens et l’émotion, l’essence patrimoniale du lieu pour mieux y inscrire la marque — dans une démarche à la fois durable, cohérente et économiquement pertinente."
Mathilde Moure, Directrice du site du Théâtre antique d'Orange

Fondé à Paris en 2010, Halley&Co est un studio de direction artistique dédié à la création d’identités et d’univers de marques. Notre approche, qui allie stratégie créative, design et culture, nous permet d’accompagner avec la même exigence des projets issus de la mode, la beauté, la culture, la food, l’industrie ou le sport.

MANIFESTE

Une marque est avant tout un écosystème vivant, un mélange de culture d’entreprise, d’image et d’émotion, qui a pour but de créer du lien et donne de la valeur à une entreprise. 

Nous pensons que la direction artistique est un levier de transformation à forte valeur ajoutée ; en associant stratégie, culture et design nous révélons la singularité des marques et leur donnons la capacité de croître durablement. 

Nous articulons nos projets en trois temps :

1- STRATÉGIE CRÉATIVE
Analyser et clarifier l’ADN
de la marque pour définir
une vision singulière

2- DIRECTION ARTISTIQUE
Traduire cette vision en identités 
et en univers sensibles
cohérents et distinctifs

3- ACTIVATION
Déployer l’univers de marque
sur l’ensemble de ses points de contact,
print et digital, pour créer une expérience
cohérente et durable.

Name: Graphic Stories
Description:
Graphic Stories Cyprus is a Non-Profit Organization that has established the annual Conference on Graphic Design and Visual Communication, in Cyprus, under the same name, from 2015. It was founded and organized by Aggeliki MK Athanasiadi and Miltos Karras and aims to promote awareness of the Cyprus visual arts, locally and abroad and to encourage networking with cultural institutions, organizations and contemporary art groups internationally. It is an occasion for meeting and interaction between designers in Cyprus and abroad annually and also a benchmark for the field of optical communication in Cyprus and in the broader region of the eastern Mediterranean. It also aims at cultivating visual literacy and perceptual development of critical thinking concerning contemporary visual arts and their subjects of interest, both locally and internationally.

Through the organization of conferences, lectures, exhibitions, and workshops, it aims to demonstrate and promote the value of visual communication to the public and its connection with the happenings in the social field. At the same time, the implementation of the above actions aims at cultivating professional empathy between visual communication designers of Cyprus.

Finally it aims to preserve and promote the cultural heritage of the island, in Cyprus and abroad in relation to visual and applied arts.

In musica il termine “bebung” indica un effetto sonoro simile al vibrato ed è rappresentato da un arco che contiene tanti punti quanti sono i movimenti delle dita che lo realizzano.

Bebung è uno spazio condiviso dove prendono vita sinfonie comunicative composte da più movimenti e articolate secondo professionalità ben precise.

Bebung è advertising & visual design, editing & content writing, illustrazione, web design, digital marketing & video production.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In music, the term “Bebung” indicates a sound effect like a vibrato and it is represented by an arch that holds
as many points as the finger movements required.

Bebung is a shared space where communication symphonies take place. These are made up of multiple movements that are articulated according to precise professions.

Bebung is advertising & visual design, content writing& editing, illustration, web design, digital marketing & video production.

Nuestro equipo es dinámico, exigente, creativo y profesional.

Name: Art is my Career (AIMC)
Description:
Art is my Career merges the traditional work and running of a creative agency with the morals, ethics and working of a Community Interest Company. 

We use our profits to create resources for teachers, parents and students supporting arts and culture education and development to help plug the education, knowledge and skills gap created by arts education funding cuts.

With over 10 years of creative industry experience, we're able to deliver brands to give teams confidence for development, create connections for growth and build reputation through design. 

Our work spans global, national and local businesses, charities and community organisations. 

Our community programme aims to bridge the skill, knowledge and resource gap between education and industry while also instilling pride in the creative community by showcasing the diverse creative talent.  

Our primary target audience is young people aged between 13 – 18 who are considering their exam options and career choices, however resources are available to anyone with an interest in the creative industry. We also work with secondary schools, and FE & HE institutes. 

Through the programme, we directly address key issues identified by PEC, in particular ‘Careers and Technical Education Reforms’. We also support teachers in their efforts to link curriculum learning to careers (Gatsby Benchmark 4). 

AIMC focuses on providing practical, hands-on advice and engaging interactive course materials (complete with lesson plans), highlighting the wealth of opportunities in the sector.

These resources are available FREE to teachers and educational institutes from our website.

‘Art is my Career’ is a registered trademark.

Name: Platinum FMD
Description:
Platinum was established in 1991 after photographer Leonardo Vilela returned from Paris, where he studied photography and honed his skills and knowledge of CGI, an industry still in its infancy at that time. Over the years, with his work gaining each time more visibility and recognition, designer Flavio Albino, a key recurring collaborator, became the new partner responsible for the post production area. By 2001, having already gained a reputation of quality and innovation in the conception of images for the publishing market, Platinum partners decided to further broaden its horizons by creating a 3-D area under the command of illustrator Luciano Honorato, who also became a partner in the company.
The never ending search for new tools and possibilities for image creation came to the define the hallmark of the studio in Brazil and in the whole world, as many of its jobs earned Awards by renowned Publicity festivals - Cannes, Clio, NYF, CCSP, OJO Latin America, Archive covers, EPICA - while one of the award winning images was granted a permanent exposition at the museum of louvre. Now, in 2017, after 25 years of excellence in image production, Platinum took a further step to broaden its solutions portfolio and brought André Régnier, with 22 years of experience in the creation of advertising jobs, as a new partner. The crew was also improved with a T.I especialist Daniel Porto who since 2013, working with motion control and hight speed image capture.
Together with the other partners they bring together their talents to create Platinum Films, a new venture that brings the same world quality image creation capabilities to the production of movies, specially table tops.
In less than a year of existence, this new enterprise has already produced outstanding work for companies such as Bob’s, Petrobras and Cervejaria Itaipava.

Effective Visual Strategies for Brands:

Me and my team specializes in crafting and executing efficient visual and brand strategies that strengthen and elevate brand equity for organizations worldwide. Working collaboratively with leaders, we use targeted brand management and visual tools to optimize brand perception and resonance.

The Process:

1) HUNT
When our clients are ready to innovate, we embark on a carefully planned mission. Our goal is to pursue the uncharted—wild, raw, and untapped ideas that lie dormant, waiting to be discovered. Each hunt is an exhilarating journey, unique in its challenges and rewards.

2) TRAP
Armed with comprehensive research and a defined framework, we dive into an intense phase of brainstorming and exploration. This part of the process is marked by trial and refinement, pushing us through cycles of inspiration and analysis until we capture the most powerful concept, ready for development.

3) SERVE
With the idea in hand, we transition to creation—meticulously crafting the final product to align with the client's vision. We ensure every detail is perfected, delivering results that reflect our passion and dedication, whether locally or internationally, tailored to each client's unique palate.

WORKING GLOBALLY, BASED IN MONTRÉAL:

Creemos en las historias que conectan, las que dejan huella sin gritar, las que hablan de lo que una marca es, no solo de lo que hace.

Trabajamos con empresas y entidades comprometidas. Nos gusta entender qué quieren decir, por qué lo hacen y cómo traducirlo en algo que se vea y se entienda.

Hacemos diseño de proximidad: cercano a las personas y a lo que les mueve.

Diseño con narrativa:
Desarrollamos proyectos que cuentan una historia coherente, ya sean de marca, editoriales, audiovisuales o web.
Diseñar tipografías se nos da especialmente bien.
También hemos hecho dos juegos de mesa educativos, pero ese es otro cuento.

Identidad con significado:
Definimos la voz y el lenguaje visual que conectan tu propósito con las personas.
Estrategia es una palabra fría, pero es lo que nos permite saber qué pasos dar.
Lo hacemos contigo y con tu equipo, con la mente muy abierta.

Creamos campañas y acciones que comunican desde el lado más humano.
Del concepto a la toma a tierra.

Trabajo con marcas que sienten que no están comunicando lo que deberían. Que saben que la imagen no es solo estética, sino estrategia. Y que quieren diferenciarse sin disfrazarse.

¿Cómo puedo ayudarte?
 Branding
Creo marcas visuales para negocios alimentarios que están empezando y necesitan una identidad fuerte, clara y con personalidad.
Trabajo contigo desde dentro, entendiendo tus valores, tu visión y lo que te hace diferente.

 Rebranding o rediseño de marca
Renuevo marcas alimentarias que necesitan reposicionarse o volver a conectar con su cliente ideal.
Diseño con estrategia para transformar la percepción del consumidor y revitalizar tu negocio desde la esencia.

 Packaging
Diseño envases que atraen, explican y venden. Que despiertan deseo desde la estantería y reflejan lo que hay detrás del producto.
El packaging es tu vendedor silencioso: lo diseño para que hable bien de ti.

 Siempre entrego un brandbook completo y un manual de estilo para que tu marca sea consistente en el tiempo.

Trabajo desde un pequeño pueblo de Cantabria, con visión nacional.

clear, jargon free, communication...

Big client experience...

You're part of the design team...

We're a highly motivated team, committed to producing quality solutions. We offer a fast and extremely efficient, complete design service, from concept to artwork.

 CRÉATION :
Nos designers vous conseillent et concrétisent vos idées en alliant esthétisme, impact et efficacité tout en s’adaptant à votre budget. Ils mettront en valeur votre identité, votre message ou vos produits en fonction de votre positionnement…Laissez-nous vous guider !

 INFOGRAPHIE :
Mise en page, mise en forme, déclinaison… Parce qu’il ne faut pas tout confondre, ce pôle doit être juste et précis. Chartes graphiques, règles typographiques, contraintes techniques : nos experts maîtrisent le sujet sans fausse note !

 MULTIMEDIA & MOTION DESIGN
Le multimédia s’impose aujourd’hui comme un outil indispensable à la stratégie de communication. De nouvelles perspectives s’ouvrent avec la 3D, la vidéo, le motion design, l’hologramme et HTML5/CSS pour faire vivre vos contenus et leur apporter une nouvelle dynamique.

 STUDIO PHOTO
L’agence est équipée d’un studio photo à part entière où sont réalisés des shootings produits - e-commerce et ambiances - des prises d’images fixes, des animations de produit (bijoux, cosmétiques…) en 360° et des captations vidéo.

 IMAGE & PRÉ-PRESSE
Spécialistes en retouche photo, chromie (quadri et tons directs), nos photograveurs magnifient l’image, afin d’aboutir à un visuel soigné en adéquation avec vos besoins. Trait d’union entre la conception et l’impression, ce pôle veille au respect des contraintes techniques, contrôle la qualité pour garantir la conformité de l’impression finale.

 ATELIER D’IMPRESSION
L’atelier allie ingéniosité et créativité pour répondre aux demandes des plus classiques comme des plus atypiques. Série limitée, impression grand format, support spécial, signalétique, évènementiel, Goodies, trophée, bâche, roll-up… Ce pôle s’adapte à vos projets et innove pour une solution sur-mesure.

• Corporate Rebranding Programs

Frey pushes past the industry standard of what’s possible to deliver a result that goes above and beyond the original vision.
 
In order to continue producing high-quality work, Frey’s team has needed to grow. In the past five years, our agency has evolved at a rapid pace, cultivating more talent as we bring in more clients. 
 
We’re looking for creative and passionate individuals to add to our agency. Are you interested in joining Team Frey? Head to https://freydesigngroup.com/careers to discover our available positions.

Name: FredyArts Designer Gráfico | Agência Digital
Description:
Nascido na cidade de Campinas-SP em 1980, fascinado pelo mundo das artes gráficas, formado pela Universidade Paulista UNIP em Criação e Produção Gráfica Digital ( Atualmente Design Gráfico), Escola de Arte e Design ARQUITEC no curso de Design Gráfico e LIFFEY COLLEGE em Dublin, Irlanda, no curso de idiomas (inglês).

Profissional criativo, responsável e pró-ativo, sem medo de novos desafios profissionais e pessoais. Minha grande paixão é expandir meus horizontes. Sou curioso e ousado em tudo que faço, sem medo de errar. Morei por dois anos e meio na Europa, tive a oportunidade de melhorar meu inglês e conhecer 14 países. O Conhecimento de culturas diferentes me trouxe satisfação pessoal, porém durante minhas viagens sempre busquei estar atento às tendências de design utilizadas no exterior.

Sempre procurei fazer Design para um mundo melhor, acreditando que design não é apenas uma bandeira sustentável ou apenas uma forma de ganhar dinheiro e sim uma maneira de deixar as coisas mais bonitas.

Procuro ter uma proximidade com todos meus clientes, tratando de forma única e exclusiva cada um, sendo justo e ético em todas minhas tarefas.

Gosto daqueles projetos em que sei metade do que devo fazer para concluí-los, mas não tenho nem idéia da outra metade, pois o desafio é minha fonte de inspiração.

Por fim, ser Designer Gráfico é uma arte que se constroi ao longo dos anos com muito amor, dedicação, estudo e  principalmente felicidade !

Name: قصر الشركات | تصميم بروفايل شركة - تصميم هوية بصرية
Description:
في عالم الأعمال المتسارع، لم يعد الاكتفاء بتقديم خدمات أو منتجات عالية الجودة كافيًا للتميز، بل أصبح من الضروري أن تمتلك شركتك بروفايل احترافي وهوية تجارية قوية تعكس شخصيتها وقيمها وتترك انطباعًا لا يُنسى لدى العملاء، وهنا يأتي دور قصر الشركات، الشركة الرائدة في السوق العربي في مجال كتابة وتصميم بروفايلات الشركات وابتكار الهويات التجارية بأسلوب يجمع بين الإبداع والاحترافية.

يقدم قصر الشركات خدمة تصميم بروفايل الشركات وفق رؤية تسويقية مدروسة، حيث نقوم بكتابة المحتوى بأسلوب يجذب القارئ ويعكس هوية شركتك، مع تنظيم الأقسام الداخلية للبروفايل بطريقة مريحة للعين وسهلة التصفح، بدءًا من المقدمة والتعريف بالشركة، مرورًا بعرض الخدمات والمنتجات، ووصولًا إلى رؤية الشركة ورسالتها وقيمها وإنجازاتها، وكل ذلك بصياغة مميزة تعكس احترافيتك وتدعم صورتك أمام العملاء والمستثمرين.

أما من ناحية التصميم، فنحن نستخدم أحدث برامج Adobe لتقديم تصميمات راقية وعصرية تراعي هوية علامتك التجارية، مع اختيار ألوان وخطوط وصور تعكس طابع شركتك، ونضمن أن يكون البروفايل جاهزًا للطباعة بصيغة PDF عالية الدقة، كما يمكننا تسليم الملفات المفتوحة عند الطلب لتمنحك المرونة في التعديل مستقبلاً.

ولا يتوقف الأمر عند البروفايل فقط، بل نذهب أبعد من ذلك من خلال خدمة تصميم الهوية التجارية الكاملة، والتي تشمل تصميم الشعار، بطاقات العمل، الأوراق الرسمية، الأظرف، البروشورات، والمواد الدعائية، لنمنحك حزمة متكاملة تضمن اتساق مظهرك البصري في جميع قنوات الاتصال مع عملائك، وبذلك تصبح علامتك أكثر رسوخًا في أذهان الجمهور وتحقق التميز التنافسي المطلوب.

اختيارك لقصر الشركات يعني حصولك على شريك موثوق يملك الخبرة الكافية لفهم متطلباتك وتحويلها إلى حلول إبداعية تلبي أهدافك التسويقية، نحن نعمل مع مختلف القطاعات سواء كانت شركات ناشئة أو علامات تجارية كبرى، ونسعى دائمًا لتقديم مخرجات تعكس هوية العميل بأفضل صورة ممكنة، مع الالتزام بالمواعيد والجودة العالية.

ابدأ رحلتك نحو هوية قوية وبروفايل احترافي مع قصر الشركات، واجعلنا نروي قصة نجاحك بأسلوب يليق بك، وللاطلاع على خدماتنا وأعمالنا يمكنك زيارة موقعنا: www.companiespalace.com أو التواصل معنا عبر الواتساب: 00201015510245.

Een aantal  van onze medewerkers vormt namelijk al vele jaren de betrouwbare motor achter onze dienstverlening. De overige teamleden kwamen uit de startblokken - klaar om een frisse wind door onze onderneming te laten waaien. Ideale combinatie als je een solide onderneming wilt zijn die stevig met twee benen in het nieuwe mediatijdperk staat.

Samen vervaardigen we advertenties, kranten, magazines, brochures, e-papers, banners en boeken, maar we tonen ons ook sterk in het ontzorgen van uitgeverijen. Dit doen we door onze ICT-kennis te delen en zo o.a. tijdrovende werkprocessen uit handen te nemen en zoveel mogelijk te automatiseren.

Bee in Media biedt tevens op het gebied van grafisch ontwerp en mediaproductie een breed palet aan diensten aan, waaronder het vervaardigen van advertenties, het restylen of realiseren van websites, visitekaartjes, internet-banners statisch of html-5, briefpapier, folders, flyers, brochures, kranten en magazines en het ontwerpen en restylen van logo’s of huisstijlen. Tevens vervaardigen we in samenwerking met diverse betrouwbare partners bedrijfskleding en belettering op auto’s of bedrijfspanden en verzorgen we al uw drukwerk.

Name: DOJO Creative
Description:
Welcome to DOJO Creative. We are full-service design, marketing and advertising firm with a strong focus on high-end design and great customer service. We cater to our clients' needs with phenomenal solutions that will have people saying “Damn, that’s sharp! Who did that for you?” about your new logo, website or marketing piece. Creating sleek, sexy marketing pieces and approaches that cater to your needs and produce great results is our business. Building long, deep relationships with our clients is our mission.

DOJO Creative was founded by Douglas Elder and Josh Harmon who together have over 40 years experience in this crazy business. Doug and Josh worked together for the past 7 years and have successfully completed over 500 customer projects including website redesigns, branding, logos, corporate identity, public relations and a lot more. They recently left and founded DOJO by leaving another local agency. Both share an eye for design, building solid client relationships, doing great work and solving problems for clients. Doug Elder has worked for some of America’s best ad agencies and nationals clients doing work in Miami, Chicago, Los Angeles and Santa Barbara on the design end as well as the account executive side. He now calls the Michiana area his home after moving back from California with his son Dyllan and two dogs Frank and Otis. Josh Harmon’s experience spans over the past 20 years as well.  Starting out while still in high school with an advertising internship working for an aftermarket parts distributor, to working in-house with Martin’s Supermarkets and then spending the past 10 years with another local agency.

Call us today, we'd love to meet with you! 574-276-4998!

Si vous cherchez à développer votre identité visuelle, nous créons un univers graphique et des supports de communication qui reflètent l'image de votre entreprise. Création de logo, de supports imprimés, prises de vue photo ou vidéo, conception de sites internet et e-boutique, sont autant de prestations que nous pouvons vous proposer.
Nous comprenons également que la communication en ligne peut être complexe et nécessite une expertise en constante évolution. C'est pourquoi nous proposons des formations pour permettre aux entreprises de mieux comprendre les enjeux de la communication sur les réseaux sociaux, la gestion de l'e-réputation ou encore la rédaction de contenus web.
Ellipse répond à toutes vos problématiques de communication et vous accompagne dans chaque étape de votre projet.

Name: Dream Graphics
Description:
Graphic design, known as visual communication design, uses "vision" as a way of communication and performance, and uses a variety of ways to create and combine symbols, pictures and words to convey ideas or messages. visual performance. Graphic designers may use professional skills in typography, visual arts, page layout, computer software, etc., to achieve the purpose of a creative plan. Graphic design can generally refer to the process of making (designing), as well as the final finished work.
Common uses of graphic design include logotypes (trademarks and branding), publications (magazines, newspapers and books), print advertisements, posters, billboards, website graphic elements, signs and product packaging. For example, product packaging may include logos or other artwork, curated text and sheer design elements such as stylized images, shapes, sizes and colors. Composition is one of the most important characteristics of graphic design, especially when the product uses pre-existing materials or fuses multiple elements.

Name: ACTUAL Cartographie
Description:

Whether planimetric, illustrated, or 3D, our maps are valued by thousands of institutional and private clients for their effectiveness and aesthetics. Since 1988, over 10,000 maps have been crafted by our dedicated cartographers, ensuring each creation is unique and updatable. Our creativity, combined with deep expertise in signage, publishing, georeferencing, web, and communication, gives ACTUAL a key advantage to optimize your investments.

With each project, clients have the option to co-own reproduction rights with ACTUAL, allowing unlimited and free reproductions—provided the document isn’t resold directly or indirectly.

Cartographic Workshop
From print products to web files, in small or large formats, ACTUAL adapts each project to your specifications. We also offer thematic variations to expand the use of your original creation.

Experience & Innovation
Thematic mapping is at the heart of our agency. For over 30 years, we have been a leading force in advancing both the form and content of maps. Technical advancements have elevated the aesthetic and geographic quality of our work. Our team—comprising expert cartographers, graphic designers, illustrators, and integrators—ensures every project is optimized and aligns perfectly with your brand identity.

Description:
Het gemak van leasen en de kwaliteit van een professionele website op maat, gecombineerd in een compleet alles-in-1 website pakket, voor een vast laag bedrag per maand.

Verdwaal niet in de details. Kies voor één compleet pakket.

Er komen veel details kijken bij het laten maken van je website. Je begint bij een domeinnaam, daar moet een hosting aan gekoppeld worden, e-mailadressen worden aangemaakt. Dan nog de website bouwen, oja de teksten niet te vergeten.. Ook nog afbeeldingen zoeken. Nog niet eens begonnen over zoekmachine-optimalisatie. Ben jij de draad al kwijt?

Volledige ontzorging.

Met alleen één gesprek staan jouw website en social media kanalen online binnen de kortste tijd. Wel zo fijn.

Doordacht. 

Want kwaliteit, snel en voordelig leveren is geen toeval.
Onze klanten, ondernemers, doen waar zij goed in zijn. En wij doen waar wij goed in zijn, namelijk het bouwen van websites. Nu middels het leasen, kwaliteit toegankelijk voor iedere ondernemer met elk budget.

Name: Delphine Gouzille Designer
Description:
Originaire de Bordeaux je suis designer depuis 2017. J’aime particulièrement travailler sur les objets et les images, leurs caractéristiques et leur présence dans l’espace. C’est cette passion pour les objets qui m’a menée à l’école d’enseignement supérieur des Beaux-Arts de Bordeaux, d’où je suis sortie en 2016 avec un DNSEP (diplôme national supérieur d’expression plastique) mention design. Cette formation pluridisciplinaire m’a permise de travailler avec de nombreux médiums et d’avoir un regard différent sur l’espace et les objets qui nous entourent.

En sortant de l’école j’ai effectué un service civique, communication et graphisme, dans une galerie d’art contemporain à Bordeaux : L’Agence Créative pour l’Art Contemporain. Cette année auprès de Nadia Russell Kissoon m’a permise de mettre en pratique mes connaissances tout en apprenant un peu plus tous les jours. J’ai également eu la chance de faire mes premières expositions en collaboration avec d’autres artistes.

Ma passion pour l’objet et l’image étant toujours très présente, j’ai décidé à la fin de mon service civique de travailler dans le milieu de la rénovation et de l’aménagement d’intérieur. Embellir, venir recréer un espace en fonction des besoins du client fut une expérience très enrichissante et gratifiante pour moi. J’ai poursuivi ce parcours en passant par le domaine de l’aménagement de cuisines et de salles de bain.

Aujourd’hui je combine mes deux passions, pour les images et les objets, en vous proposant mes services en tant que designer graphique et décoratrice d’intérieur. Proche de mes clients, mais aussi des professionnels avec qui je collabore, je fais de l’humain le cœur de mon métier.

Name: Studio 361
Description:

Si tratta si una realtà professionale costituita da un Network di professionisti, altamente specializzati, che collaborano in sinergia e mettono a disposizione la loro professionalità nell’ambito della comunicazione d’impresa e della creatività.

Le attività sviluppate dal network si rivolgono ad Aziende, agenzie di comunicazione, tipografie ed Istituti di formazione, ma anche a strutture che organizzano eventi specifici nei settori della formazione professionale su prodotti Adobe Creative Suite, consulenza web, progettazione e consulenza grafica, editoria sia cartacea che digitale e realizzazione di applicazioni per tablets e smartphones, sia in ambiente iOS che Android.

We believe these practices should become an inseparable part of modern design process.

With a solid background in graphic design and strong creative coding expertise, we are able to provide turnkey solutions as well as connect with project teams as an external competence center. Let's move towards a brighter future together!

Poulin + Morris Inc., an award-winning, internationally recognized, multidisciplinary design consultancy, is led by Richard Poulin and Douglas Morris and involved in all areas of visual communications, including environmental graphics, donor recognition, and wayfinding sign programs; exhibition design; branding; digital media; print media; and publication design.  We solve design problems for an extensive range of clients, from architects, corporations, and real estate developers to cultural, educational, governmental, medical, and non-profit organizations.

Our ability to undertake challenging projects, varied in nature, size, and scope, is our primary strength.  Our reputation is built on our ability to listen intently, responsibly, and decisively to our client’s needs.  Experience has demonstrated that although each task demands its own unique approach and individualized solution, certain basic principles can be applied to all design problems.

Poulin + Morris, located in New York City’s Tribeca neighborhood, is comprised of a diverse group of creative individuals trained in graphic, environmental, exhibition, and industrial design, photography, research, and writing.  Our work has received awards and recognitions from major professional organizations and publications worldwide.  The firm is a past semi-finalist for a communications Design Award by the Smithsonian Institution’s Cooper-Hewitt National Design Museum’s National Design Awards.

BRAND IMPLEMENTATION - Most brands already have a set platform but need attention. They need to be taken care of in order to stay interesting. By working with your brand, implementing it in different projects and channels, we can help keep it fresh. Whether that means creating a campaign identity, an invitation, in-store communication, a new website, a catalogue or just assisting in your “day-to-day” marketing stuff - no project is too small or too large.

PACKAGING DESIGN & SYSTEM - Packaging systems create a strong emotional response. Good packaging reaches out and grabs the consumer’s attention. Great packaging is as smart and appealing as the product inside. That’s our goal – to make packaging that communicates with the consumer, adding value to your product and helping it sell even more.

Let us know how we can help you.

Description:

We appreciate how fast-paced environments act as invaluable sources of creativity; however, we also recognise the potential for design-overloads to work as imminent distractions – creating worlds of imitation - rather than platforms where talent and design can evolve.

The speed at which the world is changing increases the importance of robust and adaptable design to reach an increasingly demanding audience exposed to an abundance of choice. Design is everywhere; however, in our view, the superior design represents itself through bespoke platforms where communication, strategy, functionality and end-user experience remain at the forefront throughout the creative process.
 
Our work encompasses a multitude of projects and services. We complete all projects in-house, and our clients deal directly with their designated designer. This process allows for transparent dialogues where new ideas can be explored in an open forum and enable our team to deliver superior results while providing sound reasoning behind their approach. We are passionate about design and always aim to exceed our clients' expectations.

Nothing is impossible, the impossible is just another challenge, and for us; every challenge has a creative solution.

Gropen is a licensed Class “A” Contractor as recognized by the Virginia Board of Contractors, and a SWaM-certified small business.

Our facility is unique in the signage and fabrication industry, because we employ a full-time design team alongside our fabrication equipment and staff. We manufacture from raw goods to finished products, meaning we are not dependent on sub-contractors during any stage of project design to fabrication. We set the time frame and oversee quality control; every step of the process from project inception to installation is under our supervision. This facilitates an efficient expedited collaboration. 

We believe in the importance of building and nurturing valued relationships within our community and beyond. Our primary goals continue to be to help customers dream and design projects that best fit their needs, and to deliver quality products that exceed expectations.

Wer wir sind?

Hinter Vajus Mediendesign steckt kein anonymer Kreativbetrieb, sondern ein kleines, leidenschaftliches Team mit Herz, Verstand und einer Menge Ideen.

 

Was wir mitbringen?

Wir haben beide eigene Stärken, Erfahrungen und Perspektiven: mal strategisch, mal kreativ, mal technisch – aber immer mit dem Anspruch, Ihre Vision sichtbar zu machen. Wir hören zu, denken mit und setzen um. Und das nicht von der Stange, sondern maßgeschneidert auf Sie und Ihr Projekt.

 

Was uns verbindet?

Die Leidenschaft für Gestaltung, die Freude an Innovation und der Anspruch, für unsere Kund:innen stets das Beste herauszuholen.

 

Was uns wichtig ist?

Eine offene, ehrliche Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe. Denn nur wenn wir Sie und Ihr Unternehmen wirklich verstehen, können wir Ergebnisse schaffen, die wirken – und die zu Ihnen passen.

Conseguir la plena satisfacción de nuestros clientes, cumpliendo con las necesidades previas, incluso adelantarnos a futuras expectativas de cliente diseñando y desarrollando productos innovadores.
Máxima atención al cliente, un servicio de proximidad y rapidez de respuesta.
Apostamos por soluciones integrales al cliente: nuestro producto permite ofrecer el conjunto integral de elementos a troquelar.
Asesoramiento al cliente y puesta en máquina en casa del cliente.
Trabajar en la línea de la mejora continua, la eficacia y eficiencia en los procesos.
Asegurar el cumplimiento de la legislación y reglamentación aplicable a las actividades de la empresa, así como los requisitos de partes interesadas que debamos cumplir.
La gestión de calidad bajo un enfoque de gestión del riesgo y de las oportunidades, con la adopción de objetivos de calidad y acciones que nos lleven a mejorar continuamente.
BCN TROQUELES pone a disposición de las partes interesadas esta política. La Dirección ratifica estos compromisos y garantizará que se conocen, se entienden, están implementados y mantenidos al día.

- Deliver stunning images of architecture, supplemented by detailed surroundings, thought-out concepts and people
- Highlight advantages of the most complex layouts and interiors
- Bring motion into CGIs with a touch of animation and after effects
- Summarise the most complex ideas as effectively as possible through 3D video animation

Drawing on both our skill set and a collaborative partnership, we are convinced that we can take your project to the next level!

Name: Tantamount
Description:
POWERFUL, COHERENT AND WELL-MAINTAINED BRAND ID SYSTEMS

Brand and branded communications aren't just about visual appeal. They involve a range of elements that work together as a unified system to provoke an emotional response. 

At Tantamount, we understand and control these different elements. Our clear, structured approach allows our designs to go beyond superficial messaging to highlight the unique personality, vision and value proposition of each of our clients' brands.

CLARITY MATTERS
If your message is vague or inconsistent across platforms, it’s hard to inspire loyalty from stakeholders. But we find many new businesses aren’t really clear about their vision, while the message of longer-standing businesses can start to fray as they bring in new personnel, out-source social media communications, or adopt an associate model to speed business growth.

OUR APPROACH
We work closely with our clients to understand each business, its offering, its values and its vision. Then we use our skill with words and design to communicate this through print or digital collateral, video, web, rich media…  synergising content and format to inspire emotion and create community.

WHERE WE WORK
We are active in the local business community in the West Midlands, but we work with clients around the world. Wherever you are, if you want to be sure your business is saying the right thing in an engaging, effective and consistent way, we’d like to talk to you.

 COMMUNICATION DESIGN
 BRAND DEVELOPMENT
 DIGITAL EXPERIENCES
 CONTENT CREATION & EDITORIAL
 ONLINE VIDEO & RICH MEDIA
 PRINT & DIGITAL PUBLISHING

FOR ASPIRING AUTHORS
We have a special relationship with business experts who want to publish their expertise and we offer author mentoring through our From Authority to Authorship programme.

DISCOVER MORE
Pop over to our website at tantamount.com and download your free copy of the Tantamount magazine: it's full of useful articles about design, communications, and publishing.

After many conversations and cups of tea: I took a leap of faith and started Blades Creative Design Studio in 2015. Today, my small-but-mighty team serve as the advocate and designer for creative, lifestyle, and wellness brands, bringing their purpose and potential out into the world.

We are Italian, like a neighbourhood cafe where you feel at home, a bit eccentric, but a sincere place: the place where Design becomes warm, cosy, familiar. 

In a nutshell, we are like the rock salt (that means "Sale Grosso" in Italian) that activates the transmission of sensory signals. The rock salt that preserves, absorbs moisture, is suitable for scrubbing. The rock salt that looks great on focaccia.

Velkommen til Krogh Andersen AS, en grafisk skiltevirksomhed der handler fra ide til virkelighed.

Krogh Andersen Skilte og Reklame blev i 1958 grundlagt af Søren Krogh Andersen. I 1996 overtog sønnerne Mogens og Niels firmaet og har siden ført det frem til at være Nordjyllands ledende skiltefirma.

Vi har mere end 50 års erfaring med ideer, produktion af facade og interne skilte, byggeskilte, storformat print, udstillingsmaterialer mm. 
Firmaet har altid været på forkant med den teknologiske udvikling som har ført os til en position blandt de førende i landet. 
Med gode fysiske rammer, en god maskinpark, en kreativ grafisk afdeling og ikke mindst kvalificerede medarbejdere i Hjørring og eksterne montører i hele landet, står vi godt rustet til at løse alle opgaver.

Name: Springboard Creative
Description:
Competition has gravity all its own. For some small businesses and start-ups, the force can be so strong they never break through. To overcome the pull, a business must harness the power of its uniqueness – what we call the jumping-off point. It's your company's point of departure from the marketplace – what separates you from your competitors.

We help you identify your jumping-off point. And, once we find it, we wind your brand tightly around it, so it acts like a springboard, launching you toward higher recognition and greater market share.

Name: Bruno Sola - Diseño Gráfico & Web
Description:
Hola, soy Bruno Sola Me dedico al diseño gráfico, web y de marcas (branding). Me gusta emprender nuevos proyectos, la generación de ideas y los cambios.

Estoy aquí para ayudarte a bajar esa idea que tienes a la tierra.
Hacerla clara, sencilla y llena de color para que marque una diferencia en las personas, en la sociedad.
Llevo nueve años dedicándome al diseño gráfico. Empecé en la facultad, creando ideas de negocio con compañeros de clase mientras realizaba trabajos llenos de color para clientes esporádicos.

Me mueven los colores, las ilustraciones, los gráficos. Me gustan tanto que he ayudado a diferentes personas a crear sus marcas corporativas, a crear sus logotipos para que pudieran ponerle cara y personalidad a sus proyectos.

He trabajado para empresas de todo tipo, en el ámbito nacional e internacional. Desde empresas de coaching, jugueterías a editoriales con una personalidad muy única. Todas me han aportado una visión de las cosas que hace que pueda comprender mejor como se puede sentir el empresario a la hora de invertir en diseño.

Todos tenemos miedos. Miedo a que no salga bien, miedo a invertir en algo que desconozco, miedo al engaño, etc.
El diseño es mandar tu mensaje con valentía, decir quien eres y como trabajas. Mostrar tus auténticos colores en un símbolo, en una marca, en una web que te representa.

Si estás dispuesto a cruzar ese miedo, a superarlo. Aquí estoy, puedes contar conmigo.

Name: JUST Branding Podcast

The JUST Branding Podcast (https://justcreative.com/podcast), hosted by Jacob Cass & Matt Davies, is the only podcast dedicated to helping designers & entrepreneurs grow brands.

Each episode goes deep into the details of the brand building process, with professional insights, actionable tips and resources to help you build better brands. Guests have included thought-leaders such as Chris Do, Marty Neumeier, Michael Johnson and more.

The podcast focuses on helping designers & entrepreneurs bridge the gap between strategy and design. Branding professionals from around the world join Jacob & Matt in discussing the benefits of brand strategy, brand strategy tools, how to sell strategy, brand purpose, brand positioning, neuroscience, brand personality, messaging, storytelling, brand naming, tag lines, logo design, brand identity design and brand experience.

Name: BrandiaStudio
Description:
Somos una consultora creativa especializada en el desarrollo de marcas disruptivas.
La marca es un medio para un fin. Nos aseguramos de que cumpla con nuestros clientes, desde la promesa hasta la realidad. Hacemos que la marca funcione

Trabajamos para los disruptores y los disruptivos, ayudando a los líderes ambiciosos a definir estrategias de marca atractivas, diseñar experiencias de marca potentes e innovar en nuevos productos y servicios dirigidos por la marca. Nos desafiamos a nosotros mismos y a nuestros clientes a superar los límites; desafiando lo ordinario, para lograr lo extraordinario.

Nuestro pensamiento creativo/disruptivo se base en 3 pilares que hacen posible lograr resultados más hayá de lo esperado.

Marca:
El pensamiento disruptivo comienza con una gran historia. 
Ayudamos a nuestros clientes a descubrir y definir el discurso de marca más de la forma más poderosa y auténtica que inspirará a su gente, atraerá a sus clientes y mercados. Desarrollamos iniciativas 
audaces e innovadoras logrando hacer realidad la visión de marca.

Experiencia:
El pensamiento disruptivo ofrece excelentes experiencias para los clientes. Diseñamos experiencias de marca poderosas y creativas, que desafían a las personas a pensar, sentir y comportarse de manera diferente con respecto a la marca y a convertir a los clientes pasivos en apasionados defensores de la marca.

Innovación:
El pensamiento disruptivo requiere innovación. Trabajamos en conjunto con nuestros clientes para desarrollar nuevas marcas, productos y servicios que estén arraigados y que den vida a lo que los hace especiales. Creemos que es este tipo de innovación liderada por la marca la que demuestra un éxito sostenible.

Ayudamos a nuestros clientes a transformarse a sí mismos y a sus mercados. Ya sea para reposicionar su marca, revitalizar su cultura interna o lanzar algo nuevo. Les ayudamos a navegar en su desafío con el pensamiento disruptivo de la estrategia de marca y la experiencia.

Name: Eighty2degrees Design Studio
Description:
Eighty2degrees is a multifaceted, creative studio that believes design is essential for raising awareness around critical issues. Since 2010, we have partnered on design, branding, and communications projects with clients who want to create positive change in unique and bold ways.  

Our studio was founded on the belief that design is essential to solving problems and making an impact. We wholeheartedly believe in the missions of all our clients, and strive to be a key creative partner to inform, educate, and raise awareness.  

Eighty2degrees works on branding, print, and digital projects for mission-driven organizations including the Campaign Legal Center, Capital Area Food Bank, Columbia University, Georgetown University, Habitat for Humanity, Smithsonian Institution, National Skills Coalition, National Geographic, Planet Word Museum, Public Justice, United Nations Foundation, and U.S. Energy Foundation.

Nossos serviços:

Desenvolvimento de marca: criamos identidades visuais fortes e autênticas que refletem a verdadeira essência da sua empresa.

Estratégia de marca: criamos planos estratégicos para posicionar sua marca efetivamente no mercado.

Design criativo: produzimos materiais visuais inovadores que capturam a atenção do público e despertam a imaginação.

Consultoria de mercado: oferecemos insights valiosos para impulsionar seu negócio e garantir sua relevância em um cenário competitivo.

Nossa missão é conectar marcas com consumidores por meio de soluções criativas e inovadoras. Transformamos desafios em oportunidades, buscando constantemente superar as expectativas de nossos clientes.

We are passionate about creating and developing brands that tell impactful, enduring stories. Combining talent, strategy, design, and innovation, we partner with our clients to define and express their businesses' unique essence.

Our Services:

Brand Development: We craft strong, authentic visual identities that reflect your company's true essence.

Branding Strategy: We create strategic plans to effectively position your brand in the market.

Creative Design: We produce innovative visual materials that capture public attention and spark imagination.

Market Consulting: We offer valuable insights to drive your business forward and ensure its relevance in a competitive landscape.

Our mission is to connect brands with consumers through creative, innovative solutions. We transform challenges into opportunities, consistently striving to exceed our clients' expectations.

Hjärter Esse - Personligt och lokalt med hjärtat i kommunikation.

Name: It's just me!
Description:
Your Brand In Motion.

Rörelse. Form. Illustration. Få saker är så omedelbart effektiva när det gäller att beröra som det visuella uttrycket. Det är också få saker jag älskar mer än att skapa den effekten. Jag väcker de känslor du vill väcka, kommunicerar de budskap du vill förmedla. Det grafiska uttrycket är den gemensamma nämnaren. Formen kan vara allt ifrån en logotyp eller grafisk profil till animeringar.

Du sätter målen, jag hjälper dig att nå dem. Tillsammans sätter vi saker i rörelse, och berör. Åt rätt håll, på rätt sätt.

Jag är Rikard Häll och har många års erfarenhet av grafisk form inom reklam, design och varumärkesbyggnad. Utöver erfarenhet har jag också byggt ett stort kontaktnät med kompletterande kompetenser. Så att vi kan nå dina mål, oavsett vilka medel som krävs.

Hör av dig så pratar vi mer om vart du vill och hur du kan komma dit.

S STUDIO GFX is a cutting-edge graphic design agency that thrives on pushing boundaries and delivering exceptional visual experiences. With a team of passionate designers and a commitment to innovation, we bring your ideas to life with captivating designs that leave a lasting impact.

Our Philosophy:
At S STUDIO GFX, we believe that every project is a work of art. We understand the power of visual communication and strive to create designs that not only capture attention but also evoke emotions and convey messages effectively. Our philosophy is rooted in the belief that design should not only be aesthetically pleasing but also purposeful and meaningful.

What We Offer:
1. Creative Branding: We help you build a strong and unique brand identity that sets you apart from the competition. From logo design to comprehensive brand guidelines, we create a cohesive visual language that resonates with your target audience.

2. Stunning Print Design: Whether it's brochures, flyers, posters, or business cards, we excel in creating visually stunning print materials that leave a lasting impression. Our designs are carefully crafted to align with your brand's personality and objectives.

3. Engaging Web Design: In today's digital age, having an impactful online presence is essential. Our web design services focus on creating user-friendly, visually appealing websites that effectively communicate your message and drive conversions.

4. Eye-catching Illustrations: Illustrations have the power to captivate audiences and bring your ideas to life. Our talented illustrators create custom artwork that adds a unique touch to your designs, helping you stand out in a crowded marketplace.

5. Striking Motion Graphics: From animated logos to explainer videos, we leverage the power of motion graphics to tell your story in a visually compelling way. Our animations breathe life into your brand, making it memorable and engaging.

Name: Ripe Inc.
Description:
At Ripe, our mission is to capture the true essence of your business and demonstrate its positive impact on people's lives. We specialize in transforming businesses, not just through the visual brand identities we create, but also through the intangible work that happens behind the scenes. A significant part of our expertise lies in organizing and simplifying complex systems and messages, as well as fostering alignment to create an internal focus.

While the public sees the captivating brand identities we develop, a substantial portion of our work involves ensuring that your organization operates seamlessly and efficiently. We streamline processes, clarify messaging, and align teams to create a strong foundation for powerful brand building. This internal focus drives cohesion, consistency, and authenticity throughout your entire business ecosystem.

By working behind the scenes to optimize internal operations, we enable your brand to shine brightly in the market. Our proven strategies and methodologies result in heightened visibility, enhanced credibility, and increased profitability for our valued clients. We understand that brand building encompasses not only the external image but also the internal infrastructure that supports and sustains it.

Partnering with Ripe means accessing comprehensive brand expertise that extends beyond aesthetics. We combine our passion for visual storytelling with our ability to organize, simplify, and align complex systems, creating a holistic approach to brand development. Together, we build a solid foundation that empowers your business to thrive and make a lasting impact on your target audience(s).

Name: PÁNICO ESTUDIO
Description:
Pánico is an award-winning branding studio, based in Argentina and Ecuador. We focus on simplicity and unadorned truth.

Corporate language has become worn out and unnecessary in a world where brands talk to us daily. That’s why our process focuses on understanding language beyond a logo. Clients no longer want to waste time and seek to understand a brand in the shortest possible time.

Therefore, it is necessary for brands to be direct, have character, attitude, and personality. No more pre-made speeches and generic slogans, no more filler information needed.

Simple, direct, and powerful is our motto.

This concept has led us to work with clients around the world, such as Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Thailand, Germany, Spain, Dubai, Argentina, Hong Kong, among others, and to be published in books in China, London, USA and magazines such as Communication Arts (New York) and Étapes (France).

Name: Billion Dollar Graphics
Description:
Billion Dollar Graphics was founded by Mike Parkinson. After working as a visual communications consultant in many competitive industries for 20 years, Mike learned and quantified what worked and what did not. His client's success rate increased significantly using the tools he developed.

In an effort to share the secrets and best practices he had learned and developed, Mike created seminars, courseware, and wrote articles and books about visual communication and practical, real-world applications. Billion Dollar Graphics was founded soon after and grew because many graphic needs went unaddressed and professionals and organizations had grown frustrated with their existing products and processes. Most professionals knew that clear, communicative, compelling visuals were important but did not know how to do it or were dissatisfied with their current graphics.

Billion Dollar Graphics offers how-to books, innovative training workshops, ready-to-use graphics, consulting, and graphic design services (through 24 Hour Company) to show how you can use visuals to increase your success rate.

Name: Design JD
Description:
Whether it is Branding or Wayfinding you are looking for - you've found the right team...

You might want to know what to expect when you start working with us on a branding project. So here's the typical process we follow.

Initial exploration
We're guided by you. However, sometimes, what you want and what you need are two different things. That's why we first work to understand your needs and then offer you the best possible advice – which may go beyond what you anticipated.

Unleashing our creativity
Inspired by the intense research phase, we focus our innate creative impulse and talent on your project. Initially, we present you with a selection of design concepts. As the project continues, we develop your chosen idea in partnership with you.

Ultimate professionalism
As you'd expect from a successful agency established in 2006, we're not flaky creatives. Obviously, time, cost and quality are all taken into account. You'll be relieved to find we're businesslike, reliable, and stick to the commitments we make.

It’s a unifying force that promotes pride within your organization and makes your customers feel understood. In short, your brand is a boss. Name: 3DPRO
Description:
Founded in 1998, we are one of the longest-running, continuously operated communities of its kind. Proudly independent, member-supported, and free of corporate influence, 3DPRO is a sanctuary for the best in the business

3DPRO members include Academy Award winners, Emmy Winners, TED Talkers, Authors, industry directors, key personnel, and technical leaders from dozens of the world’s most renowned visual effects, animation, and gaming studios.

Our membership is comprised of employees from dozens of organizations around the world, from industry leaders to small independent studios. 3DPRO is many members' primary place to engage online.

3DPRO is not just highly valued for what we do offer, but also for what we don’t.

No bots. No ads. No algorithms. No spam. No anonymous members. No tracking. No data sharing. No corporate influence. No investors. And no jerks.

Our longevity isn’t by accident. No new platform could start today and recreate the nearly 30 years of trust, culture, and shared history that define 3DPRO. 

Are you an industry veteran interested in 3DPRO? You may be eligible for a discount.

Foundational members of the VFX and Gaming industries are often eligible for special rates. Please inquire with Zero Dean on LinkedIn.

The New Fat is a Nottingham design agency with a reputation for excellence spanning more than 24 years. We’re proud of our commitment to creativity, doing the best possible job and having happy customers.

PRINT – Developing and applying eye-catching graphics to make the best use of any space – whether a business card or brochure, display ad or merchandise, vehicle or building. 

DIGITAL – Developing stunning websites which improve search rankings, and providing great artwork for social media, e-marketing or screens – including film.

The New Fat operates regionally, nationally and globally across all sectors, including manufacturing, retail, hospitality, education, health and travel. Clients range from global brands to small businesses, start-ups and charities. 

We cherish our ability to take on any creative task. Yes, we’ve designed retail displays, expo stands, branded clothing, brochures, corporate identities and websites. But who else can claim to have produced a logo for Slug Week?

“The redesign of our website has exceeded all expectations. Working with The New Fat team was, as always, hassle-free.” – Rainforest Foundation UK

Name: Mundfuld Studio
Description:
Vi former, definerer og redesigner brands.

Alle brands har en unik historie, der definerer dem. Vores speciale er, at designe visuelle universer, der understøtter de historier bedst muligt. Vi stræber altid efter at skabe smukke, simple og minimalistiske løsninger.

I en verden, der bevæger sig stadigt hurtigere, skaber det enkle design en ro omkring et brand. Og ro giver fokus. I sidste ende betyder det, at budskabet står klart og tydeligt frem. Som et fast holdepunkt i en evigt foranderlig virkelighed. Vi designer komplette, visuelle identiteter og digitale oplevelser. På den måde får vi form og indhold til at mødes i formidlingen af den ægte og ærlige fortælling.

Mundfuld Studio, siden 2015
Martin Ejvind Arthur Weiling stiftede Mundfuld Studio tilbage i 2015 efter 12 år på designbureauer i både København og Aarhus. Mundfuld Studio leverer karakteristisk, minimalistisk design som underleverandør til større og mindre bureauer og løfter brede opgaver, som totalleverandør for egne kunder. Vi hjælper både mindre virksomheder, store organisationer og nye startups til at brænde igennem.

Mere end design
Vi er et designbureau. Først og fremmest. Men vi har også et stærkt iværksætter-gen. Vi indgår meget gerne dybere og længerevarende partnerskaber med gode folk, der har et unikt produkt eller en idé, som verden ikke kan undvære. Indimellem får vi også selv produktidéer, der – i al beskedenhed – er for gode til ikke at føre ud i livet.

Det starter med en snak
Den kreative idégenerator står sjældent stille, og vi tager altid gerne en kop kaffe og en uforpligtende snak om ønsker, drømme og muligheder. Vi elsker visioner, og bundlinjens størrelse og antallet af medarbejdere betyder min

De grafische visualisaties of te realiseren produkten kunnen uiteenlopen van stationary tot een brochure tot social media content - of ZoWiets.

+
Ik sta dolgraag aan de wieg van jouw (re)branding. Ik vind het prachtig om jonge ondernemers een vliegende start te geven met een compleet nieuwe uitstraling. En daarnaast help ik de doorgewinterde ondernemer ook met liefde aan een nieuwe look & feel. Die nieuwe identiteit voer ik consequent door in gewenste huisstijl uitingen.
Het kan natuurlijk zo zijn dat je uitgebreidere wensen hebt dan alleen een nieuwe identiteit voor je merk. Samen bekijken we wat de mogelijkheden zijn. Daarbij zet ik met veel plezier mijn uitgebreide netwerk in om de juiste partner te zoeken voor het maken van illustraties, foto’s of bijvoorbeeld het bouwen van een website.

___ He also curates Stereohype competitions and B.I.O. (By Invitation Only) Series (650+ global talents since 2004).

Dedicated to exceptional results. What can we create together?

Originally founded by Tomi Vollauschek and Agathe Jacquillat
