Name: Visualisierung der Vergangenheit - PRAEHIST3D
Description:
Willkommen bei PRAEHIST 3D! 

Ich bin ein leidenschaftlicher Archäologe und 3D-Generalist, spezialisiert auf 3D-Scan, Druck und Visualisierungen. Seit 2015 widme ich mich der Digitalisierung archäologischer Funde, Befunde und Grabungsflächen, um sie für Forschung, Archivierung und Ausstellungen zugänglich zu machen.

Mein Fokus liegt auf modernen 3D-Scan und Druckverfahren, die ich sowohl in der Archäologie als auch in der Geschichtswissenschaft anwende. Zu meinen letzten Projekten gehört die 3D-Erfassung eines 2400 Jahre alten Holzrads sowie die Digitalisierung von über 50 Sammlungsobjekten für virtuelle Ausstellungen. Dank meiner Expertise in der additiven Fertigung kann ich schnell 3D-Drucke von Scans oder Rekonstruktionen anfertigen.

Neben meiner Projektarbeit biete ich auch Workshops zur Erstellung von 3D-Modellen und dem Umgang mit Scantechniken und Druckern an. Mein Blog dient nicht nur als Plattform zur Präsentation meiner Projekte, sondern auch als Wissensressource für alle, die sich für 3D-Scanning und -Druck interessieren.

Name: Tsto Creative Agency
Description:
Tsto is a creative agency founded by six designers. We are graphic design professionals specialised in coming up with ideas and visualising them to help our clients define and communicate their identity and message.

Our approach is thorough and hands-on. We tackle an assignment by first taking it apart to its bare essentials, and then building it in a new way that best serves the client. This design philosophy lets us go deeper than the surface, to the essence of each case.

Through the varied skills of our designers we find the best-suited tools to bring our ideas to life. We do it in a way that focuses on the whole but with attention to all details. Tsto combines thorough to-the-point design thinking to a craftsman’s can-do attitude.

We also work with other proven professionals in whatever media the work requires. Instead of competing with other creatives or agencies, we see them as possible collaborators for best serving each case.

Tsto was founded by Johannes Ekholm, Jonatan Eriksson, Inka Järvinen, Matti Kunttu, Jaakko Pietiläinen and Antti Uotila.

Additionally, our team is proficient in drop shadows, color correction, and image editing, ensuring that your images possess both visual appeal and impeccable quality. Place your trust in us to transform your images into magnificent works of art. Contact us immediately for high-quality image editing services that will far exceed your expectations.

Name: Hola Marte Studio
Description:
hola!

¿Te han preguntado, alguna vez, en qué mundo vives, cuando simplemente no puedes dejar de volar con una idea nueva? A mí me pasa desde chica. Incluso, en 2021, comencé a disculparme por mi dispersión y a explicar que vivo en un planeta rojo y pequeño llamado Marte. Allí habitan otros guerreros como yo que luchan por vivir de su pasión y cada tanto necesitan desconectarse para crear y despegarse!

Soy Jose Baluga, marciana e ilustradora con la misión de embellecer a la Tierra a través de mi arte, traído desde Marte. Y tú, ¿de dónde vienes y cuál es tu misión? Me encantaría explorar tu universo y si lo deseas, ayudarte a aterrizar esa alegría que te genera a través del diseño sensible y la ilustración. Tengo una nave cargada de herramientas versátiles y coloridas. ¿Qué tal si emprendemos un proyecto extraterrenal? Despeguemos en 3, 2, 1…

J’ai la conviction qu’il est indispensable de partager notre savoir-faire respectif pour qu’une communication soit forte, efficace et cohérente.

Name: dac-design.art — DA, UX/UI & pédagogie · voir, penser, ressentir
Description:
Parce que créer, ce n’est pas seulement produire des formes ou des idées,
c’est donner à voir, à penser et à ressentir ensemble.

dac-design.art est pour moi un atelier ouvert :
un lieu où l’on explore, où l’on écoute,
où se construisent des images, des identités visuelles,
des interfaces et des expériences utilisateur
qui prennent le temps de raconter, de relier, d’éclairer.

Je crois à une direction artistique attentive.
Un design responsable, ancré, sensible à son contexte.
Un design qui se construit à hauteur d’usage,
qui prend le temps d’observer, de comprendre,
qui ajuste la forme à l’intention,
et qui respecte ce qui entoure le projet — les personnes, les usages, le terrain.

Créer, c’est aussi transmettre.
Partager une méthode, un regard, des outils.
Rendre visibles les étapes, les intentions, les choix.
Transformer le processus en un espace commun
où l’on comprend ensemble autant que l’on conçoit.

Mon travail navigue entre design graphique, UX/UI, webdesign,
écoconception numérique, pédagogie appliquée,
accompagnement créatif et explorations digitales —
parfois Web3, toujours humaines.

Une manière de créer qui accueille la nuance,
qui soigne l’expérience,
et qui fait émerger des formes simples, utiles,
et ouvertes à ce que chacun peut y trouver.

Name: Common Name
Description:
COMMON NAME is a New York-based graphic design studio, focusing on print, interactive, identity, and exhibition work for art, architecture, culture, and education.

YOONJAI CHOI is a graphic designer and partner at Common Name. She teaches Typography and Design at Columbia GSAPP and Graphic Narratives at Harvard GSD, and is a visiting critic at Yale School of Art, Parsons, Pratt, Syracuse Architecture, and Rutgers. Prior to co-founding the studio, Yoonjai held a director position at New York design studio 2×4 for several years. She received her BFA in Visual Communications from Hongik University in Seoul, and an MFA in Graphic Design from Yale University.
 
KEN MEIER is a graphic designer and partner at Common Name. He teaches Core Lab Typography and Advanced Typography at Parsons, and has taught similar classes at Columbia GSAPP and Rutgers. Prior to co-founding the studio, Ken worked with international design consultancy IDEO and New York’s Project Projects. His work has been published by Unit Editions, Graphic, Creative Review, Computer Arts, idN, Print, and the Type Directors Club, among others. He received his BA in humanities from the University of Chicago and an MFA in graphic design from Yale University.

Name: l'air de rien
Description:
L’air de rien conçoit pour vous l’IDENTITÉ DE MARQUE UNIQUE qu’il vous faut.
Depuis + de 15 ans, nous accompagnons les entreprises pour leur construire une image singulière qui leur ressemble.

Nous avons réalisé beaucoup de projets d’identités visuelles toutes aussi merveilleuses les unes que les autres cela va sans dire mais au fil des années et des projets nous avons constaté certains freins à la mise en œuvre d’un projet efficace et pertinent comme avoir mal identifié son besoin, faire trop de compromis pour plaire au plus grand nombre ou encore travailler dans l’urgence.
C’est pour cela que nous avons développé une MÉTHODOLOGIE SPÉCIFIQUE, basée sur la COOPÉRATION pour identifier et répondre à vos besoins, vos valeurs et votre marché.

Notre engagement : vous ACCOMPAGNER dans la définition de votre image de marque afin de vous assurer la VISIBILITÉ, la CRÉDIBILITÉ et la COHÉRENCE qu'il vous faut.
Nous ne ferons pas ce dont vous avez envie mais NOUS FERONS CE DONT VOUS AVEZ BESOIN !

- Vous lancez votre entreprise et vous n'avez pas d'image de marque.
- Vous êtes invisible aux yeux de vos clients et avez envie de les séduire.
- Vous voulez vous démarquer de vos concurrents (on vous parle toujours de vos concurrents mais pourquoi pas de vous ?)
- Votre logotype ne reflète pas votre crédibilité ou le sérieux de votre entreprise.
- Votre image n'est pas en cohérences avec vos valeurs, votre marché ou vos produits.
- Votre activité ou votre structure évolue

QU'ATTENDEZ-VOUS POUR SAUTER LE PAS ? 
Contactez-nous pour échanger sur vos problématiques de communication et peut-être participer à nos ateliers de créativité dirigée pour découvrir quelle image sera la plus pertinente pour votre entreprise.

Ce qui nous définit : honnêteté, sincérité, proximité, humain, respect et intégrité, consciencieux, passionnés, fidèles, créativité, humour et im/pertinence, écoute, partage, collaboration et esprit d’équipe.

Name: West Coast Choppers
Description: Parts that don’t conform to some textbook ideal of manufacturing efficiency. Bikes that come together in weeks (sometimes months), not hours. And we do it all in our shop from start to finish. Nothing is farmed out. Our bottom line is this: We make customs and custom parts the way they should be made. That means using fifty-year-old machine tools if it’s the only way to make a fender look and feel right. Our custom bikes, parts and accessories set the standard for style and old-school craftsmanship while pushing the limits of what a custom is – and can be. If you’ve ever dreamed of a bike that you thought could never be built, then West Coast Choppers is the place to come.

Name: Do Good Design Co.
Description:
We create and transform purpose-driven brands, digitally. We work with purpose-driven professionals, social entrepreneurs, non-profit visionaries and do-good dreamers.

Brand Design & Strategy
Web Strategy, Design & Development
Digital Marketing
General Graphic Design

We are do-ers. We bring a passion for purpose and an entrepreneurial spirit to life through powerful design. A team of talented designers, programmers and strategists, we collaborate endlessly with a deep respect for each other and our clients (and our clients’ customers).

For those who feel inspired by places where “the magic” happens, we welcome you to our creative space.

We believe that design is power. In much the same way that the written word transformed societies, design is a way to craft and fine-tune ideas and send them out into the world, like little copies of yourself.

Major corporations can invest millions of dollars to purchase this power of design and affect the minds of billions around the world, while for people who are really fighting to make a positive difference in the world, powerful design is all too often completely out of reach.

We’re not civil engineers, environmental scientists, or doctors but we feel that we’ve found a way to do what we do to make the world a better place....

By helping people who are doing serious good, to be taken seriously.

Name: Oze Design
Description:
OZÉ design est située à Angoulême au cœur de la Charente, en Nouvelle-Aquitaine à deux pas de la Spirit Valley de Cognac.

En 2020, nous avons passé le cap des vingt ans d’existence. Notre équipe, une organisation à taille humaine, composée d’un référent unique  et de créatifs dédiés ; design packaging, communication visuelle, illustration, suivi technique… chacun de nous a sa spécificité.

La créativité nous anime mais nous aimons aussi les contraintes (si, si, vraiment), les cahiers des charges, les retroplannings, les budgets à maitriser, le suivi technique des dossiers …
Nous aimons relever les défis d’une commande, la rigueur tout en se faisant plaisir !

Notre organisation nous permet d’être réactifs et durables en même temps.

Qu’est-ce qui nous distingue dans le paysage des agences de communication ? on vous dirait volontiers que l’on est créatifs, passionnés… ce qui est vrai !

Être créatif, c’est un état d’esprit qui se cultive au quotidien. Rester curieux, toujours en éveil, savoir se remettre en question et se renouveler …
Apporter le supplément d’âme qui valorise l’image d’une marque, d’un produit, qui assure sa continuité ou lui donne un deuxième souffle… La communication est d’abord un vecteur d’émotions.

Comment ? en dessinant la forme d’une bouteille, d’une étiquette, le cartonnage d’un étui, en sélectionnant les typographies adaptées à votre univers, vos couleurs…

Nous maîtrisons tous les aspects de la communication, du graphisme, de l’identité visuelle (logos, charte graphique) : 
•	Design global
•	Design packaging
•	Design de volume
•	Key visual

Les métiers de la création comportent aussi une forte compétence technique, une connaissance des process industriels, des rapports coût/fabrication…

« La conception d’un objet est indissociable de sa fabrication »

•	Exécution des fichiers techniques 
•	Coordination photogravure, impression, fabricants
•	Réseau de partenaires

Name: Gameplan Creative
Description:
Gameplan Creative has grown into a powerhouse agency built on passion, precision, and performance. With over three decades of experience, we’ve consistently delivered innovative creative and branding solutions which exceed our clients expectations while connecting deeply with their audience. 

Great brands are a blend strategy with storytelling, and design with purpose, to craft visual identities and experiences that leave lasting impressions. Our award-winning portfolio spans many industries, but our roots and reputation are strongest in the high-stakes world of sports branding. From professional franchises to collegiate programs and global athletic brands, we’ve helped shape the visual language of sports—on the field, on screen, and in the hearts of fans.

Our process is highly collaborative. We work hand-in-hand with our clients to understand their goals, their audiences, and the stories they want to tell. Whether it’s developing a full-scale brand identity, crafting cinematic motion graphics, or launching dynamic video features, we ensure every touchpoint reinforces a unified brand experience.

Gameplan Creative’s longevity is a testament to our adaptability, our relentless pursuit of excellence, and our genuine love for the work. For over 20 years, we’ve had the honor of helping brands not only stand out—but stand for something. And we’re just getting started.

Desde 2015, tivemos a satisfação de assessorar mais de 90 clientes dos mais diversos  segmentos, tais como: bens de consumo, serviços financeiros, área da saúde, varejo, food service, moda, e-commerce, serviços, construtoras, agronegócio, consultorias, educação, dentre outros.

Over the last 13 years, Exit Design has created value for large corporate clients such as 3M, Decathlon and India Infoline (IIFL) to exciting entrepreneur driven enterprises like Alma Mater, Uniqreate (Oxford University) and The PRactice.

Services are focussed in the areas of Graphic Design and Digital UI/UX projects. Industries range from Automotive, IT and Financial Services to Hospitality, Retail, Real Estate & Education. We spend time in understanding our clients – and their clients. 

Through this approach, we’ve been fortunate and are grateful to have been featured in some prestigious spaces:

- Work published in ‘Asian Graphics Now’ by Taschen
- Work published in the CII India Design Yearbook 2013 & 2014
- 'Outlined' showcased as an ALPHA Startup at Web Summit, Dublin 2015
- Profiled on www.yourstory.in
- Cover of India Today, Designers to Watch
- Spoken at TEDx on ‘Design Engagement in the Future’
- Finalist at the British Council Young Creative Entrepreneur Awards, 2010

Name: Büro für Gebrauchsgraphik AG
Description:
Gebrauchsgraphik – das Wort erklärt sich von selbst. 
Grafische Erzeugnisse, die nicht nur gut aussehen, sondern auch für den gewünschten Zweck zu gebrauchen sind. Dabei begnügen wir uns weder mit brauchbaren noch mit guten Ergebnissen. Zufrieden sind wir erst, wenn das bestmögliche Resultat erreicht ist. Wann dies der Fall ist, beurteilen nicht wir. Sondern unsere Kunden.

Ihren Vorstellungen verleihen wir die passende Schrift, die gewünschte Farbe, die richtige Form – und die wirkungsvollste Aussage. Dabei verlassen wir uns auf Wissen und Können, auf Kreativität und starke Konzepte, auf kommunikative Zusammenarbeit und zielgerichtetes Arbeiten. Und wir verlassen uns auf das Wichtigste – auf unser Herzblut, das in jedes Projekt fliesst.

Name: Essencio Brands
Description:
Essencio is een creatief bureau in strategie, design en communicatie. En helpt ondernemers en organisaties te groeien in professionaliteit en zichtbaarheid.
Met veel enthousiasme doen we dat enerzijds door middel van passende branding: het ontwerpen van logo's, huisstijlen, websites en online en offline uitingen. We werken altijd vanuit een solide strategie. Samen met jou ontwikkelen we je merkessentie, zodat je vanuit je essentie kan werken. We wijzen je de weg naar een authentieke en eerlijke manier van (content)marketing en zichtbaarheid, zonder trucs, en dichtbij jezelf. Zo kun jij impact maken vanuit je missie. 

Anderzijds ontwikkelen we graag creatieve concepten in print, we hebben een grote liefde voor papier; magazines, boeken en allerlei andere uitgaven. We ontzorgen en denken mee, van doelgroep tot haalbaarheid van een nieuw project. En van de allereerste ontwerpschetsen tot mooi drukwerk.   

BRANDING
Heb je een eigen bedrijf en voel je dat jouw missie grote impact verdient? Effectieve branding, een professionele website en de zichtbaarheid die bij jou past, geven je bedrijf groei, stabiliteit, rust en zekerheid.

MAGAZINES en BOEKEN
Heb je een prachtig idee voor een inspirerend magazine of boek? Of ben je toe aan een restyle? Stijlvolle geprinte producten verrijken het leven van je lezers. Ze zorgen voor een diepere laag van vertrouwen. En er zijn eindeloos veel mogelijkheden.

Of je nu branding, een website of een magazine nodig hebt - ons doel is om van jouw missie een sterk merk te maken. Als we samenwerken, gaan we met jou terug naar de kern van je missie, en werken we van binnen naar buiten. Daarbij is de natuur onze grootste inspiratiebron.

MEER INFO
Bekijk onze website voor alle informatie over branding, websites en magazines: https://essenciobrands.nl

Name: Here.We.Go. Studio – WE DESIGN CHANGE
Description:
We Design Change.

After 20+ years in some of London’s top ad agencies, our founder, Louise Sloper, started Here.We.Go. Studio to break free from the creative & process constraints often found in larger traditional advertising & design agencies. 

Our mission is to work with clients that are making a change to the world & to grow brands through explorative & considerate channels. We have an agile team, servicing client branding needs through graphic design, content & advertising. Social, ATL, digital, experiential, sonic, strategic, e-commerce, written TOV… all are up for grabs to create successful & impactful brand stories. 

As a female-owned creative studio, we can add a refreshing perspective in creating authentic brand story-telling. Our approach is to challenge the world around us to make a social, environmental or cultural statement – & make it famous. 

We're experts in creative thinking, visual identity & logos, digital, sustainability, film & photoshoots, AI, UX & brand strategy. Basically, bringing to life your brand’s TOV in appropriate channels… we don’t sell you what’s not needed.

Clients include The Children’s Society, innocent, The Listening Planet, Eptura, 35Thousand, Effie, The Gerety Awards, Clever Mule/The BFI Network, Greenpeace, People v Extinction, Natural History Museum, CALM & the WHO. Our team has past experience across varied accounts in broadcasting, fashion & beauty, automotive, food/beverage & charity sectors. Our heart is in volunteer work, inclusion & conservation.

Whether you’re a fresh start-up or an established brand looking for a makeover, we are here to partner with you. 

Louise is Chairwoman of #TypoCircle, Campaign 40 Over 40 awarded, a CNM/D&AD mentor, has worked in ape conservation & is an active Arts champion. 

Here's to the Change Makers.

Say: hello@herewegocreative.com



#femaleowned #designstudio #creativeagency #branding #graphicdesign #marketing #photographicdirection #visualidentity #socialimpact #designforgood

At EXHIBIT, we partner with various companies to bring their ideas to life through innovative and effective design solutions. Our team is dedicated to creating designs that communicate our clients' stories in a relevant and accessible way. Whether it's a logo, business card, or social media plan, we believe that every design element speaks volumes about a brand and its values.

Our approach to design is always tailored to the specific needs of our clients. We start by getting to know our clients and their businesses. This allows us to understand their brand, vision, and goals. From there, we collaborate with them to develop a concept that is not only visually stunning but also aligns with their overall marketing strategy.

Our team is made up of experienced designers who are passionate about what they do. We pride ourselves on staying up-to-date with the latest design trends and technologies to ensure that our clients receive the best possible results. Our expertise includes branding, print design, digital design, and more, making us a one-stop-shop for all your design needs.

At EXHIBIT, we understand that design is not just about aesthetics; it's about communication. We work diligently to ensure that every design element we create serves a purpose in effectively communicating our clients' message to their target audience. Our commitment to quality and excellence is evident in the work we produce, and we look forward to partnering with you to create a design solution that meets your unique needs.

Name: jane doe.
Description:
Hello, we’re jane doe. 

An all-female digital marketing agency obsessed with helping brands discover their superpowers. Our motto, find your identity, encapsulates our goal of helping businesses like yours discover and express themselves in a digital world. 

At the heart of our success is a belief that every brand has a unique story that deserves to be told. An identity that, once found and expressed, can connect deeply with audiences and foster unparalleled loyalty. 

With the powerful combo of analytical prowess and creative genius, we specialise in uncovering and expressing these narratives to take your brand from merely existing to living rent-free in the minds and hearts of your customers.

jane doe. has been pushing boundaries for over a decade, transforming the digital marketing and branding landscape while leveraging innovation, creativity, and strategy to help brands achieve full power. 

We offer a comprehensive suite of creative services, from data-driven marketing strategies and SEO optimisation to compelling content creation and social media mastery, to make sure that every campaign makes an impact.

Beyond the metrics and the KPIs, what sets us apart is our commitment to creative innovation and collaboration. The digital landscape is ever-evolving, and so are we. Whether it's the latest in AI-driven marketing techniques or pioneering new social platforms, we're always at the forefront, keeping our clients ahead of the curve. 

We believe in working with our clients and immersing ourselves in their worlds to champion their brands as if they were our own. The result? Successful campaigns plus lasting partnerships built on trust, respect, and a shared vision.
 
jane doe. remains dedicated to pushing boundaries, driving growth, and delivering extraordinary outcomes. Find your identity is more than just our motto. It's a promise that we will amplify your brand and set you apart.

But enough about us. What's your story?

Name: Camille Agency
Description:
From day one, we’ve been told to colour inside the lines. Stick to the brief. Play it safe. But safe has never built brands that stand out. And at Camille, we’re not here for safe.

The branding world is crowded with over-processed processes, buzzwords and same‑same visuals. Camille was built differently, born from a frustration with agencies that forgot what brands are really for: connecting with people. We stripped back what didn’t work, rebuilt what did, and crafted a way of working that puts purpose, clarity and creativity first.

Our work resonates because our approach does. We build brands that make people care and clients proud. Over the years, that approach has turned into our signature. Quietly bold. Purpose-led. Always considered. Always crafted to create impact where it matters.

We’re based on the Mornington Peninsula, but our work travels far. From lifestyle and fashion to interiors, services, and cultural organisations, we collaborate with brands that want more than ordinary.

What we do best:
Brand Strategy // Visual Identity & Packaging // Website Design & Development // Content Strategy & Social Media Management // Digital Marketing & Email // Campaigns & Creative Direction // Art Direction // Copywriting & Brand Messaging.

Why Camille:
 Values-driven & boutique -We choose projects we truly believe in, so every outcome feels aligned.
 Award-winning & experienced - 45+ years of collective expertise across design and digital.
 Seamless team - We act as the external team that feels internal - strategic partners as much as creatives.
 Agile & effective - We make things happen quickly, without sacrificing quality.
 We believe in collaboration, alignment, and impact 

Connect with us to explore brand strategy, digital marketing, or creative partnerships that elevate your business.

Name: Gitte's Skiltecenter
Description:
”Vores gode produkter taler for sig selv – og vores kunder vender ofte tilbage. Nogle har endda fulgt mig, siden jeg begyndte for 35 år siden hos P. Schmidt.

For 15 år siden fik jeg muligheden for at overtage P. Schmidts afdeling for skilte sammen med min mand Nels. Så grundlagde vi Gitte’s Skiltecenter. Og for ti år siden flyttede vi ind i vores helt eget nybyggede virksomheds-domicil i industriparken i Ringsted. Her er alt samlet under et tag. Og den ny store montagehal har betydet, at vi i Gitte’s Skiltecenter har kapacitet til at dekorere flere storvogne på samme tid. Og nu er vores speciale at forvandle store biler til rullende udstillings-vinduer for virksomheder.

Da jeg startede, brugte man stadig pensel på papir. Nu designer vi vores skilte og dekorationer på pc. Og bagefter printer vi dem med avancerede skæreplottere og på alle mulige flader og materialer.
Vi har i dag så mange muligheder og tangenter at spille på for at skabe kreative, originale og fængende skilte til vores kunder. Vi har både vognmænd, tømrere, advokater og tandlæger som kunder. Og hver kunde har sine unikke ønsker og behov, som vi skal finde en unik løsning til.

Det bliver aldrig rutine. Og jeg bliver aldrig træt af at lave skilte. Jeg elsker simpelthen mit arbejde.”

Gitte Mylting

Name: Web-Development.co
Description:
We are working as a registered organization since 2009 in USA, UK, UAE, Pakistan etc. as Web development we are involved in developing websites(World Wide). 

Web development can range from developing the simplest static single web page of plain text to the most complex web-based internet applications covering electronics, businesses, and social network services etc. 

A more comprehensive list of tasks to which web development commonly refers, may include web design, web content development, client liaison, client-side/server-side scripting, web server and e-commerce development. Among web professionals, "web development" usually refers to the main non-design aspects of building web sites: writing markup and coding. Most recently Web development has come to mean the creation of content management systems or CMS. 

These CMS can be made from scratch, proprietary (such as Open Text) or open source (such as Drupal, Joomla, Wordpress, Prestashop, Magento etc). In broader term the CMS acts as middleware between the database and the user through the browser. A principle benefit of a CMS is that it allows non-technical people to make changes to their Web site without having technical knowledge. 

For larger organizations and businesses, web development teams can consist of hundreds of people (web developers) and follow standard methods like Agile methodologies while developing websites. Smaller organizations may only require a single permanent or contracting developer, or secondary assignment to related job positions such as a graphic designer and/or information systems technician. Web development may be a collaborative effort between departments rather than the domain of a designated department.If you want to grow your business Globally! then we are always here to help you.

Name: Kingjames
Description:
In the beginning there was Alistair King and James Barty. That was in 1998. They decided to start an agency from scratch and call it King James; they figured the name might be blessed. Each time they won a new piece of business, they hired another staff member or two, and so it went. They never rested.
 
As they grew they realized that to be truly accountable and truly effective, they needed to be multi-disciplined, not like in the text books, but in a genuinely integrated way. One after the next they partnered with people they admired in skills that King James and their clients needed. Today King James is an advertising and communication group made up of six companies (King James, King James RSVP, Mnemonic, Atmosphere, Hammer and Proof) that work in tandem, live in the same building and misbehave at the same parties. The result is a group that leaps fearlessly between mediums, hunts consumers in packs, and attracts clients that want holistic solutions, not just ads. You name it, King James Group can do it.  
 
Today King James remains an independent group by choice, with offices in Cape Town and Johannesburg. With annual revenue around R42 million and close to 100 staff, the industry publications call them medium size. They prefer to call themselves the 14th largest agency group with a fierce creative ethic, big ambitions and the best bar in town.

Name: Bureau 205
Description:
Le design est un processus intellectuel et créatif dont le but est d’apporter des solutions aux problématiques rencontrées dans nombre de situations courantes et de développer des réponses pertinentes et esthétiques aux problèmes de communication, d’accès à l’information, d’usage et d’orientation.
         Trop souvent, le design est un subterfuge pour rendre présentable un objet à l’obsolescence programmée. En ce sens, la nature même du design est dévoyée puisque son objectif premier est d’apporter qualité et service.
         Le design graphique a la même ambition. Il n’est pas qu’habillage mais résout des équations parfois complexes: identité visuelle d’un organisme, organisation de contenus, didactique visuelle, orientation du public, communication de messages…
         La dimension esthétique est néanmoins essentielle et c’est dans l’équilibre dynamique entre forme et fonction que le design prend tout son sens. Cela implique analyse, dialogue, esprit critique, expérience, intuition, culture visuelle, empathie, sensibilité, inventivité et technique.

Name: ResumeSewa Pvt. Ltd. (  CV & Cover Letter Making Service)
Description:
We understand that crafting a CV and cover letter that stands out among other job applicants can be challenging. However, having a well-written and personalized CV and cover letter can make all the difference when it comes to getting noticed by potential employers. That's where our CV and cover letter making service comes in. Our team of expert writers is here to help you create a professional and customized CV and cover letter that highlights your skills, qualifications, and experience.
Why is having a well-crafted CV and cover letter important?

Your CV and cover letter are the first impressions that potential employers have of you.
They showcase your skills, experience, and qualifications.
They help you stand out from other applicants.
They can increase your chances of getting an interview.
What sets our CV and cover letter making service apart?

Personalized approach: We take the time to get to know you and your career goals, so we can create a CV and cover letter that reflects your unique skills and experiences.
Professional writers: Our team of expert writers has years of experience in creating winning CVs and cover letters for job seekers in a wide range of industries.
Keyword optimization: We know how to optimize your CV and cover letter with relevant keywords that will help it get noticed by hiring managers and recruiters.
Fast turnaround: We understand that time is of the essence when it comes to job applications. That's why we offer a quick turnaround time without sacrificing quality.
Unlimited revisions: We are committed to your satisfaction, which is why we offer unlimited revisions until you are completely satisfied with the final product.
How does our CV and cover letter making service work?

Consultation: We start by scheduling a consultation with you to discuss your career goals, experience, and qualifications.
Writing: Our expert writers then create a personalized and professional CV and cover letter that highlights your strengths and experiences.

Kwaliteit en milieu
GBU staat voor maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen. Wij geloven in duurzame relaties door betrouwbaar en eerlijk ondernemerschap. We bieden werkgelegenheid en zorgen voor een veilige en gezonde werkplek voor onze medewerkers. Een prettig werkklimaat met ruimte voor eigen verantwoordelijkheid en initiatief. Description:
Established in 2009, Hand Drawn Creative is a creative studio based in Bangor, County Down. Founder/Designer/Illustrator Neal McCullough has worked in the creative industries since the 1990s creating bold colourful, vivid and memorable illustration, graphic design and corporate identity.
Hand Drawn Creative works with some of the world’s most recognisable brands adding fun, flavour and colour through Neal’s signature design and illustrative style.
Neal initially set up HDC with a vision to establish a friendly, approachable creative design studio that should help demystify the design and illustration process and dispel the caricature of the frosty, pretentious graphic designer (no black polonecks in this office!)  
Using colour, humour and an unabashed love of mid 20th century design and illustration as his starting point, Neal was soon connecting with clients all over the world with his mod, atomic, retro americana illustrations!

Fondée en 2013 par Estelle GALLOT, l’Agence Artifice est un mélange de passion et de savoir-faire, où le graphisme est bien plus qu’un métier : c’est une vocation !

À l’Agence Artifice, nous ne nous contentons pas de répondre à vos besoins en communication, nous les mettons en avant. De la création de visuels percutants à la stratégie sur-mesure, nous mettons notre expertise à votre service pour construire ensemble une image qui vous ressemble.
Chaque projet de communication a une histoire unique à raconter.

Et pour que ce message résonne vraiment, il doit être parfaitement adapté à vos besoins et à votre cible. Parce qu’au-delà du graphisme, c’est l’histoire de votre marque que nous racontons, avec soin et précision.
À l’Agence Artifice, nous prenons le temps de comprendre qui vous êtes, ce que vous souhaitez transmettre et à qui vous vous adressez. Chaque projet commence par cette réflexion fondamentale :
comment capter l’attention de votre cible et faire passer votre message de façon impactante et qui vous corresponde ?
Un bon projet de communication ne doit pas seulement séduire... il doit aussi dialoguer avec ceux qui le reçoivent.
Chaque élément est pensé pour créer une connexion authentique entre vous et votre public.

L’Agence Artifice est là pour vous aider à trouver le meilleur moyen de transmettre vos valeurs, vos ambitions et vos messages clés de façon à ce qu’ils soient mémorables et efficaces.

Suivez-nous aussi sur :

נעים להכיר אותך, שמי גלית מילוא

אחרי יותר מ- 20 שנות עבודה במגזר העסקי, מאות מצגות ואלפי פגישות בהן הוצגו מצגות ארוכות, משעממות, עם המון טקסט, נתונים בטבלאות וגרפים אינסופיים, יצאתי לדרך חדשה והקמתי את גרפיקס.

הבנתי שחייבת להיות דרך אחרת להכין מצגות עסקיות ולהעביר את המסרים של הארגון. מצגת חזקה שניראית  וואו וגם מעבירה את המסר בהתאמה למשתתפים.

המומחיות שלי עומדת לרשותכם, ליצירת מצגות עסקיות מותאמות לכם בתפירה אישית מדוייקת.
אני מאמינה שאפשר להפוך כל נושא, רעיון או סיפור למצגת עוצמתית, באמצעות כלים מקצועיים, חשיבה יצירתית, יכולת ביטוי וביצוע מוקפד.

בואו ליצור יחד מצגות עיסקיות, מצגות למשקיעים ותקצירי מנהלים, מצגת לפני ראיון עבודה או פגישה עיסקית חשובה, פרזנטציה של מוצר או רעיון בסרטון קצר.

נוכל לדבר גם על חוות דעת מקצועית על מצגת שלכם, ליווי בגיבוש התוכן למצגת עסקית, וכמובן על הדרכות אישיות וקבוצתיות למתן כלים כיצד תוכלו להעביר מסרים ממוקדים וליצור מצגות אפקטיביות בעצמכם.

L'idea, dunque, madre di tutte le azioni, sommata alla grafica e al web: ma soprattutto facciamo che tutto questo succeda in un'unica agenzia.
Autofondati nel 1991, chiuderemo i battenti nel 2050.
Tra una data e l’altra siamo qui, dove pensiamo idee e facciamo fatti, in modo (si spera) efficace, arguto, propositivo e originale.
E mentre facciamo il mestiere che più ci appassiona, scopriamo che ci pagano pure.

She decided to pursue her career in Paris by combining her artistic talent with a French consultant, Marine Gimenez, from firms and consulting agencies such as PwC or 5e Rue, where she supports the corporate brand strategies of AirFrance-KLM, SNCF, Cartier and Public Health France.

Plurielles is the systematic combination of two skills, advice and creativity, drawing on a network of multidisciplinary and multicultural talents if necessary to create visual universes for inspiring companies, brands, places or people who wish to adopt a strong and recognizable identity marker.

Name: Ciao Discoteca Italiana
Description:
Ciao. Discoteca Italiana è un collettivo nato nel 2017 con base a Torino, nel vertice occidentale del triangolo industriale.

Prendendo spunto da elementi stilistici del mondo del design, dell’arte e della canzone d’autore, Ciao rielabora il paesaggio sonoro e visivo dell’industria culturale italiana e le forme comunicative che definiscono il rapporto fra passato, cultura pop e contemporaneità.

I manifesti del C.IA.O. nascono sui muri e trovano successivamente spazio nei salotti, attingono dalla tradizione della propaganda politica della Prima Repubblica, dall’architettura e dall’editoria che hanno animato l’attività culturale nell'Italia del Boom Economico. 
Concepite e sviluppate a Torino, le stampe vengono realizzate, sfruttando differenti tecniche produttive, su carte pregiate e in edizioni limitate.

Parallelamente alla produzione di stampe e prodotti, C.D.I. porta avanti l'attività musicale in club e festival in accordo con la propria visione legata alla rivalutazione della forma canzone e delle strutture della musica leggera.

Ciao! Discoteca Italiana crede nelle sale da ballo libere, nella dialettica della lotta di classe, nella borghesia illuminata, nella ricerca e diffusione della cultura pop e nella ferma convinzione che il linguaggio trovi la sua massima espressione quando collettivamente condiviso e immaginato.

Name: prototype.paris
Description:
Aurore Jannin et Laurent Pinon se rencontrent en 2013 et décident aussitôt de s’associer pour réaliser la signalétique et le catalogue de l’exposition «1917», orchestrée par Laurent Le Bon au Centre Pompidou-Metz. Deux ans après ce coup d’éclat naîtra Prototype, studio de design graphique appliqué aux événements et produits culturels. Repérée dès sa sortie des Arts décoratifs, la jeune prodige Héloïse Blume les a rejoints cette année.

 Prototype est une création de la Renaissance. Né en 1606, le mot apparaît pour la première fois dans l’édition française de la très fantasque Histoire maccaronique de Merlin Coccaie. L’auteur, un poète italien du Cinquecento, y est présenté comme le «prototype de Rabelais» : comprendre Rabelais avant Rabelais. C’est aujourd’hui le nom d’un studio graphique parisien qui a choisi un néologisme et une truculence donc, pour dire la recherche artisanale, l’érudition joyeuse, l’écriture spécifique, l’inédit. Aux côtés des plus grandes institutions culturelles (musée du Louvre, Centre Pompidou, fondation Louis Vuitton, Luma Arles…), Prototype décline depuis 2015 une large gamme de savoir-faire, de l’identité visuelle aux beaux livres en passant par les éditions limitées, les pièces uniques, les sites web, la signalétique et les catalogues d’expositions. Loin de vouloir imposer sa voix ou un style propre, le trio inclut chaque nouveau projet dans sa fantastique symphonie visuelle, où s’accordent musique, art, littérature et architecture, toutes époques confondues. Emily Dickinson, dont ils ont mis en pages les poésies illustrées par la peinture moderniste américaine *, écrivait : «Ignorant quand l’aube viendra, J’ouvre toutes les portes.» 
 Une seule certitude : Prototype l’y a aidée. 

* Éditions Diane de Selliers, 2023.

Name: Applied Systems
Description:
Applied Systems is a type-led brand design studio helping organisations define a voice no one else has.

Typography is the most repeated brand touchpoint. It appears everywhere (from wayfinding and signage to websites, documents, campaigns, and internal communications) shaping tone, authority, and emotion long before the words are read. We see type not as decoration, but as brand infrastructure.

We design identities from strategy. Starting with type allows us to define a distinctive strategic voice and build visual systems that work consistently across audiences, platforms, and environments. Our work is research-led, measured, and collaborative, ensuring brands are clear, confident, and adaptable over time.

We work with property and placemaking organisations, architects, professional services, established brands, and design studios seeking bespoke typography and strategic collaboration.

Alongside client work, we’re committed to education and ethical practice through talks, lecturing, mentoring, and collaboration supporting sustainable, meaningful creative work.

Description:
We are dedicated to solving your brand challenges through innovative, relevant, and meaningful design. Nothing is more gratifying than creating solutions that grow your business, empower your marketing strategy, influence your customers, and drive up the value of your brand. This passion for our craft and our clients has propelled us since 1995.

We like to invest.
We believe branding success is the result of making a smart investment in sound strategy and solid creative. This philosophy is what differentiates us as your creative partner. We immerse ourselves in your brand and invest in you by getting to know your company, your customers, your culture, and helping to identify and provide solutions for your branding, creative, interactive, and marketing needs.

We see details. (And the big picture.)
Design is all about the details and our passion here never ends. We live in a pixel-perfect, i-dotting and t-crossing world. But this love of the particular does not mean we lose sight of the big picture. We challenge ourselves daily to provide our clients inventive, significant, and valuable solutions that bring important change to your brand.

We’re in for the long haul.
We’re grateful and proud to say we have become a trusted advisor to many of our clients for over 26 years. We work hard to earn trust and enjoy building long-term relationships with those who understand the value that a solid brand can bring to their organization.

And yes, we love orange.
Orange is the color of creativity, joy, expression, warmth, and success. It’s no accident that we love and harness its energy to drive us in every project we undertake.

The Maison E.BOEHM is reinventing the rug to make it more sustainable and committed, more respectful of nature, people and environment. From these values were born its collections of Mosaïques de Velours. Name: EIMA Ecole Internationale du Manga et de l'Animation
Description:
L’EIMA est conçue autour de l’insertion professionnelle de ses élèves.

Les cursus de l’EIMA ont été conçus en concertation avec les professionnels du métier : éditeurs, coloristes comme mangaka. Ils savent ce que vous avez besoin d’apprendre pour travailler, et nous vous l’enseignons.

Le jury de fin d’étude de l’EIMA est composé de professionnels de l’édition : car ce sont les professionnels qui peuvent vous dire si vous êtes prêts à devenir professionnels.

À l’EIMA, les enseignants sont sélectionnés pour leur réussite professionnelle : ils savent ce que vous avez vraiment besoin d’apprendre pour réussir.

La manga est japonais : tous nos professeurs de manga sont des mangaka japonais, qui ont réussi professionnellement au Japon.

Les classes de l’EIMA sont à effectifs réduits, de vingt à trente élèves par classe au maximum : le suivi est véritablement personnalisé.

Le réseau de l’EIMA s’étend de l’Europe au Japon : nous sommes reconnus pour la qualité de notre formation par les éditeurs, là-bas comme ici.

À la fin de votre cursus à l’EIMA, vous êtes prêts pour le monde du travail. Ce n’est pas seulement nous qui le disons, mais les professionnels qui composent votre jury de fin d’études.

Name: Studio Safar
Description:
Established in 2012, Studio Safar operates as both a design agency and a publisher, with headquarters in Beirut and Tiohtia:ke (Montreal). 

Evoked by its name, 'Safar,' which means 'travel' in Arabic, the studio is concerned with notions of communication across cultural and linguistic barriers. Embracing an experimental ethos, its projects span different media and design frameworks such as communication strategies, publications, visual identities, exhibitions and sets, and websites. Most of the work services the extended cultural sector, and is engaged in social and political discourse.

The studio is renowned for its annual bilingual (Arabic/English) publication, Safar, a design and visual culture journal that was created to remedy the dearth of critical discourse on design in the global south and to acknowledge designers as active agents of cultural production. Furthermore, the studio is expanding its reach into publishing books that delve into the realm of design within the region.

Name: Serigrafia Seisdedos
Description:
SERIGRAFÍA 6D2 s.l. COMUNICACIÓN VISUAL, SOLUCIONES GRÁFICAS y TALLER de ESTAMPACIÓN.

Empresa de SERIGRAFÍA (Artes Gráficas) dedicada a la IMPRESIÓN en el entorno publicitario de la COMUNICACIÓN VISUAL y las SOLUCIONES GRÁFICAS, siendo TALLER de ESTAMPACIÓN sobre cualquier soporte.

Serigrafía Seisdedos comenzó su andadura hace más de 20 años en el campo de la “serigrafía artística y estampación textil”, realizando trabajos de reproducción de obra gráfica de diversos artistas contemporáneos así como la impresión sobre cualquier tipo de materiales para acabados de máxima calidad de impresión y larga durabilidad.

Desarrollada la técnica artesanal serigráfica, la cual permite la impresión y estampación sobre cualquier material con colores intensos de máxima pureza, fuerza, luminosidad y resistencia, indistintamente con tintadas fluorescentes, metalizadas, luminiscentes, barnices, etc..., y queriendo cubrir las necesidades de la Industria Gráfica, incorporamos el módulo de Tampografía y mejoramos los medios de impresión en Plano y Textil para satisfacer la demanda en tiempo-calidad-precio que exigen los contínuos cambios del mercado publicitario.

Agencias de Publicidad y Órganos de Difusión son clientes que agradecen la comunicación directa con el fabricante final del producto, apoyados por los recursos informático-electrónicos que al día de hoy aportan la fluidez de medios que el sector de las Artes Gráficas Publicitadoras  demanda.

Name: Publiburo

Van idee tot uitvoering, we leggen al onze verbeelding en know-how in de weegschaal om jouw project een maximale zichtbaarheid te geven.

We maken meer dan je denkt...

Bij reclame danken we meteen onze gevel, een gewrapte wagen of drukwerk met een logo. Maar de inrichting van jouw bureel met een groenwand, leuk gepersonaliseerde strandstoelen op een evenement of signalisatie op jouw terrein met net dat tikkeltje extra...

Bij Publiburo bestaat er niet zoiets als ‘een standaard project’,
we benaderen elk project vanuit jouw standpunt en dat van jouw klanten.
Maatwerk: merk-waardig en meer-waardig!

We denken van in het begin in materialen, kleuren en afwerkingen, zo
kunnen we het best inschatten hoe een idee er in werkelijkheid komt uit te zien. Wij zorgen ervoor dat alles vlekkeloos uitgetekend én geplaatst wordt.

We maken het persoonlijk.

We staan al meer dan 34 jaar persoonlijk garant voor de kwaliteit van alles wat we doen, en daar zijn we heel trots op. We zijn gepassioneerd door alles wat jouw zichtbaarheid vergroot, zo helpen we om van jouw verhaal een succesverhaal te maken.

Name: vit-e branding + digital
Description:
vit-e branding & digital is a non-hierarchical communication design agency. Each one of us brings all we have, know and believe to the collective. We create, elevate, and reinvigorate ambitious brands and companies by setting a collaborative framework with our clients, infusing perspective and context into each individual undertaking. From the heart of Beirut Lebanon, we cater to start-ups as well as multinationals, offering tailor-made creative solutions to address multiple business challenges, offering radically better visual communication. Since 2000, we have reached 24 countries around the globe, and counting.  

We believe that everyone has a passion (big or small). Our passion is design. And this enthusiasm shows in our creativity.  As a creative ‘think’ and ‘do’ tank we bring out ingenuity into all that we do and it is how we do it that makes us different. 

Our expertise:
BRAND STRATEGY. STORYTELLING. BRAND IDENTITY. AMBIENT, SIGNAGE & WAYFINDING.  PACKAGING DESIGN. PROMOTIONAL BRANDING. EDITORIAL DESIGN. PATTERN MAKING. WEBSITE DESIGN (UX/UI). MOBILE APPLICATION DESIGN (UX/UI). COMMUNICATION CAMPAIGNS.

We offer a powerful mix of industry experience and we work with clients of different sizes and types, from startups to grown up brands. Although we are based in Beirut, we have reached out to serve clients in 27 countries to date including the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Jordan, Sierra Leone, Nigeria, USA, China, France, Germany, London, Haiti and Greece.

Name: MTR Indoor Outdoor Signing
Description:
Welkom op de LinkedIn pagina van MTR Signing.

Reclamebedrijf MTR blinkt sinds 1997 uit in het realiseren van onderscheidende reclameoplossingen, waardoor jij als klant blijft opvallen. Je vindt bij ons een compleet pakket aan binnen- en buitenreclame en textielbedrukking. Indoor signing, outdoor signing en textiel dus. Jouw wensen vormen de basis voor onze op maat gemaakte kwaliteitsproducten. Die wij vanzelfsprekend binnen de deadline en het afgesproken budget leveren.

Alle aandacht voor jou!
Ons motto is: alle aandacht voor jou! Advies, service en kwaliteit vinden wij namelijk erg belangrijk. Jij krijgt alle aandacht van ons. En door onze reclameproducten krijg jij alle aandacht van jouw klanten. En dat is precies wat je wilt, toch?

Betrouwbaar
Als je op zoek bent naar een betrouwbare partner, ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres. Wij denken met je mee en zien je graag nog een keer terugkomen. We werken met betrouwbare en toegewijde leveranciers. Bovendien zijn we 3M-gecertificeerd. Dit betekent dat we beschikken over uitgebreide vakkennis en vakmanschap en dat we regelmatig cursussen volgen bij 3M.
